senses.definition: used before a noun when the listener or reader knows which person or thing is meant, or when there is only one of something in that context
senses.usage_note: Usually pronounced /ðə/ before a consonant sound and /ðiː/ before a vowel sound or for emphasis.

examples.sentence: Please close the door.
The sun is shining today.

ar.definition: أداة تعريف تُستعمل قبل الاسم عندما يكون الشخص أو الشيء المقصود معروفًا للمستمع أو القارئ، أو عندما يكون هناك واحد فقط منه في السياق
examples: من فضلك أغلق الباب.
الشمس مشرقة اليوم.

es.definition: artículo determinado que se usa antes de un sustantivo cuando el oyente o lector sabe de qué persona o cosa se habla, o cuando solo hay una en ese contexto
examples: Por favor, cierra la puerta.
Hoy brilla el sol.

ja.definition: 聞き手・読み手にどの人や物か分かっているとき、またはその状況で一つしかないものの前に置く定冠詞
examples: ドアを閉めてください。
今日は太陽が輝いています。

pt-BR.definition: artigo definido usado antes de um substantivo quando o ouvinte ou leitor sabe qual pessoa ou coisa se quer dizer, ou quando só existe uma naquele contexto
examples: Por favor, feche a porta.
O sol está brilhando hoje.

zh-Hans.definition: 定冠词，用在名词前，表示说话人和听话人都知道所指的人或物，或在该语境中只有一个
examples: 请把门关上。
今天阳光明媚。

senses.definition: used before some adjectives and nouns to refer to a whole class, group, or category
senses.usage_note: Common with adjectives like the rich, the poor, the young, and with many musical instruments.

examples.sentence: She plays the piano very well.
The rich should help the poor.

ar.definition: تُستعمل قبل بعض الصفات والأسماء للإشارة إلى فئة أو مجموعة كاملة

es.definition: se usa antes de algunos adjetivos y sustantivos para referirse a una clase, grupo o categoría entera

ja.definition: 一部の形容詞や名詞の前で、ある階級・集団・種類全体を表すのに使う

pt-BR.definition: usado antes de alguns adjetivos e substantivos para se referir a uma classe, grupo ou categoria inteira

zh-Hans.definition: 用于某些形容词和名词前，指整个一类人、群体或类别

senses.definition: used before comparatives to show a relationship between two changes or to mean 'by that amount'
senses.usage_note: A fixed grammar use in comparative patterns.

examples.sentence: The more you practice, the better you become.
I like it all the more because it was a gift.

ar.definition: تُستعمل قبل صيغة المقارنة لإظهار العلاقة بين تغيرين أو للدلالة على معنى "بهذا القدر"

es.definition: se usa antes de comparativos para mostrar una relación entre dos cambios o para significar 'en esa medida'

ja.definition: 比較級の前で、二つの変化の関係を示したり「その分だけ」という意味を表したりする

pt-BR.definition: usado antes de comparativos para mostrar uma relação entre duas mudanças ou para significar 'nessa medida'

zh-Hans.definition: 用于比较级前，表示两个变化之间的关系，或表示“更加、越发”

confusable_words.note: marks movement toward a place or person
often marks location or time rather than direction
often marks movement into something

senses.definition: used before a noun or pronoun to show direction, destination, or the person or thing affected
senses.usage_note: A very common preposition used for movement, destination, and indirect objects.

examples.sentence: We walked to the station.
She gave the book to her friend.

ar.definition: إلى؛ نحو؛ لِـ للدلالة على الاتجاه أو الجهة المقصودة أو المتلقي

es.definition: a; hacia; para indicar dirección, destino o destinatario

ja.definition: 〜へ、〜に；方向・到着点・受け手を表す

pt-BR.definition: a; para; indicando direção, destino ou destinatário

zh-Hans.definition: 向；到；给，表示方向、目的地或接受者

senses.definition: used to show an end point in a range of numbers, time, distance, or limits
senses.usage_note: Often appears in pairs such as from 9 to 5 or from London to Paris.

examples.sentence: The shop is open from Monday to Friday.
Count from one to ten.

ar.definition: إلى للدلالة على الحد النهائي في مدى أو فترة

es.definition: hasta; indica el punto final de un rango o período

ja.definition: 〜まで；範囲・期間・限界の終点を表す

pt-BR.definition: até; indica o ponto final de uma faixa, período ou limite

zh-Hans.definition: 到；至，表示范围、时间或数量的终点

senses.definition: used before the base form of a verb to form an infinitive
senses.usage_note: This is the infinitive marker, as in to go, to see, and to understand.

examples.sentence: I want to learn English.
It is important to be careful.

ar.definition: أداة تُستعمل قبل الفعل في المصدر الإنجليزي

es.definition: partícula usada antes del verbo base para formar el infinitivo

ja.definition: 不定詞を作るために動詞の原形の前に置く語

pt-BR.definition: partícula usada antes do verbo na forma base para formar o infinitivo

zh-Hans.definition: 用于动词原形前，构成不定式

senses.definition: used in several common patterns to show relation, attitude, proportion, or occasion
senses.usage_note: This sense groups several frequent learner patterns instead of splitting many tiny uses.

examples.sentence: She has always been kind to me.
The score was three to two.

ar.definition: إلى / تجاه / مقابل في بعض التراكيب الشائعة للدلالة على العلاقة أو النسبة أو المناسبة

es.definition: a; hacia; contra; en varias expresiones para relación, actitud o proporción

ja.definition: 〜に対して；〜対〜で；関係・態度・比率を表す

pt-BR.definition: a; com; para; em vários padrões para relação, atitude ou proporção

zh-Hans.definition: 对；向；比，在一些固定搭配中表示关系、态度或比例

senses.definition: used to join words, phrases, or clauses to show addition or connection
senses.usage_note: This is the most common coordinating conjunction in English.

examples.sentence: I bought apples and oranges.
She opened the door and smiled.
We study in the morning and work in the afternoon.

ar.definition: يُستخدم لربط الكلمات أو العبارات أو الجمل للدلالة على الإضافة أو الارتباط

es.definition: se usa para unir palabras, frases u oraciones para mostrar adición o conexión

ja.definition: 語・句・節をつないで、追加や結びつきを表すのに使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para ligar palavras, expressões ou orações, mostrando adição ou conexão

zh-Hans.definition: 用于连接单词、短语或分句，表示添加或关联

senses.definition: used to link two actions, often where the second action follows the first or is part of the same event
senses.usage_note: Especially common in spoken and everyday English.

examples.sentence: Come and sit here.
Go and ask your teacher.
I'll wait and see what happens.

ar.definition: يُستخدم لربط فعلين، وغالبًا يكون الفعل الثاني تابعًا للأول أو جزءًا من الحدث نفسه

es.definition: se usa para unir dos acciones, a menudo cuando la segunda sigue a la primera o forma parte del mismo evento

ja.definition: 二つの動作をつなぎ、後の動作が前の動作に続くことや同じ出来事の一部であることを表す

pt-BR.definition: usado para ligar duas ações, muitas vezes quando a segunda vem depois da primeira ou faz parte do mesmo evento

zh-Hans.definition: 用于连接两个动作，常表示第二个动作跟随第一个动作，或属于同一事件的一部分

confusable_words.note: used to show belonging or relation, often similar in meaning
shows origin, cause, or means in many contexts

senses.definition: used to show a relationship between one thing and another, such as belonging, connection, amount, type, source, or material
senses.usage_note: This is one of the most common English prepositions and has many uses; learners should first understand it as a general linker between nouns.

examples.sentence: the roof of the house
a piece of cake
a table made of wood

ar.definition: يُستخدم لإظهار العلاقة بين شيء وآخر مثل الملكية أو الارتباط أو الكمية أو النوع أو المصدر أو المادة

es.definition: se usa para mostrar una relación entre una cosa y otra, como posesión, conexión, cantidad, tipo, origen o material

ja.definition: 所有・関係・量・種類・起源・材料など、二つのものの関係を示すのに使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para mostrar uma relação entre uma coisa e outra, como posse, conexão, quantidade, tipo, origem ou material

zh-Hans.definition: 用于表示事物之间的关系，如所属、联系、数量、类别、来源或材料

senses.definition: used after many verbs, adjectives, and nouns to introduce the thing or person connected with a feeling, thought, report, or quality
senses.usage_note: Often best learned through common phrases rather than a single simple rule.

examples.sentence: What do you think of this idea?
She is afraid of dogs.
I had never heard of that writer before.

ar.definition: يُستخدم بعد كثير من الأفعال والصفات والأسماء لتقديم الشيء أو الشخص المرتبط بشعور أو فكرة أو خبر أو صفة

es.definition: se usa después de muchos verbos, adjetivos y sustantivos para introducir la cosa o persona relacionada con un sentimiento, pensamiento, noticia o cualidad

ja.definition: 多くの動詞・形容詞・名詞の後で、感情・考え・情報・性質に関係する物や人を導くのに使う

pt-BR.definition: usado depois de muitos verbos, adjetivos e substantivos para introduzir a coisa ou pessoa ligada a um sentimento, pensamento, informação ou qualidade

zh-Hans.definition: 用于许多动词、形容词和名词之后，引出与感情、想法、听闻或性质相关的人或事物

confusable_words.note: shows movement to the inside; 'in' shows position inside
often used for surfaces rather than enclosed spaces

senses.definition: inside a place, area, container, or space
senses.usage_note: Use 'in' for being inside an enclosed or defined space.

examples.sentence: The keys are in my bag.
She is in the kitchen.

ar.definition: داخل مكان أو منطقة أو وعاء أو حيز

es.definition: dentro de un lugar, área, recipiente o espacio

ja.definition: 場所・区域・容器・空間の中に

pt-BR.definition: dentro de um lugar, área, recipiente ou espaço

zh-Hans.definition: 在……里面；在……内

senses.definition: during a period of time, or before the end of a period
senses.usage_note: Use 'in' with months, years, parts of the day, and periods before something happens.

examples.sentence: We met in July.
The train will leave in ten minutes.

ar.definition: خلال فترة زمنية، أو قبل نهاية فترة

es.definition: durante un período de tiempo o antes de que termine un período

ja.definition: ある期間の中に、またはその時間がたてば

pt-BR.definition: durante um período de tempo ou antes do fim de um período

zh-Hans.definition: 在……期间；……之后；在……之内

senses.definition: using a language, material, color, style, or form
senses.usage_note: Common with languages, colors, and forms of expression.

examples.sentence: Please write your name in capital letters.
They spoke in English.

ar.definition: باستخدام لغة أو مادة أو لون أو أسلوب أو صيغة

es.definition: usando un idioma, material, color, estilo o forma

ja.definition: 言語・素材・色・様式・形式を使って

pt-BR.definition: usando uma língua, material, cor, estilo ou forma

zh-Hans.definition: 用……语言；以……材料/颜色/方式

senses.definition: in a particular state, condition, situation, or activity
senses.usage_note: Often used after 'be' to describe someone's state or a situation.

examples.sentence: The building is in good condition.
She is in trouble again.

ar.definition: في حالة أو وضع أو ظرف أو نشاط معين

es.definition: en un estado, condición, situación o actividad determinada

ja.definition: 特定の状態・状況・活動の中で

pt-BR.definition: em um estado, condição, situação ou atividade específica

zh-Hans.definition: 处于某种状态、情况、处境或活动中

senses.definition: as part of many common fixed phrases and adverbial expressions
senses.usage_note: Many high-frequency phrases with 'in' have meanings that learners memorize as chunks.

examples.sentence: In fact, I agree with you.
In the end, we decided to stay home.

ar.definition: يأتي ضمن كثير من العبارات الثابتة والتعابير الظرفية الشائعة

es.definition: forma parte de muchas expresiones fijas y adverbiales comunes

ja.definition: 多くの決まった表現や副詞的表現の一部として使われる

pt-BR.definition: como parte de muitas expressões fixas e adverbiais comuns

zh-Hans.definition: 用于许多常见固定短语和副词性表达中

senses.definition: used to show who something is intended for, belongs with, or helps
senses.usage_note: Common for showing the intended person or group.

examples.sentence: This present is for you.
These seats are for visitors.

ar.definition: تُستخدم للدلالة على الشخص أو الشيء المقصود به شيء ما أو المناسب له أو الذي يفيده

es.definition: se usa para indicar para quién es algo, con quién va o a quién beneficia

ja.definition: 何かの対象・受け手・用途に合う人や物を表す

pt-BR.definition: usado para indicar para quem algo é, com quem combina ou quem recebe o benefício

zh-Hans.definition: 用于表示某物是给谁的、适合谁的或对谁有帮助

senses.definition: used to show purpose, destination, occasion, or a planned time
senses.usage_note: This broad learner sense covers several common uses with nouns.

examples.sentence: We went out for dinner.
She is leaving for Paris tomorrow.

ar.definition: تُستخدم للدلالة على الغرض أو الوجهة أو المناسبة أو الوقت المخطط له

es.definition: se usa para indicar propósito, destino, ocasión o un momento previsto

ja.definition: 目的・行き先・機会・予定された時を表す

pt-BR.definition: usado para indicar propósito, destino, ocasião ou um horário planejado

zh-Hans.definition: 用于表示目的、去向、场合或预定时间

senses.definition: used to show a period of time or duration
senses.usage_note: Especially common with numbers and time expressions.

examples.sentence: I waited for ten minutes.
They have lived here for many years.

ar.definition: تُستخدم للدلالة على مدة زمنية

es.definition: se usa para indicar un período de tiempo o duración

ja.definition: 時間の長さ・継続期間を表す

pt-BR.definition: usado para indicar um período de tempo ou duração

zh-Hans.definition: 用于表示一段时间、持续时长

senses.definition: used to show a reason, cause, exchange, or what someone feels or acts about
senses.usage_note: A broad sense covering many common verb and adjective patterns.

examples.sentence: Thank you for your help.
He paid twenty dollars for the book.

ar.definition: تُستخدم للدلالة على السبب أو المقابل أو الشيء الذي يتعلق به الشعور أو الفعل

es.definition: se usa para indicar motivo, causa, intercambio o aquello sobre lo que alguien siente o actúa

ja.definition: 理由・原因・交換の対価、または感情や行為の対象を表す

pt-BR.definition: usado para indicar motivo, causa, troca ou aquilo a que um sentimento ou ação se dirige

zh-Hans.definition: 用于表示原因、理由、交换对象或某种情感/行为所针对的事物

senses.definition: used to show support, agreement, or being in favor of something
senses.usage_note: Common in discussion, voting, and opinions.

examples.sentence: Are you for or against the idea?
Most people voted for change.

ar.definition: تُستخدم للدلالة على التأييد أو الموافقة أو الوقوف مع شيء ما

es.definition: se usa para indicar apoyo, acuerdo o estar a favor de algo

ja.definition: 支持・賛成・〜に賛成していることを表す

pt-BR.definition: usado para indicar apoio, concordância ou ser a favor de algo

zh-Hans.definition: 用于表示支持、赞成、拥护某事

confusable_words.note: used for things near the speaker
plural form for things far from the speaker

senses.definition: used before a noun to refer to a specific person or thing that is farther away, less immediate, or already known in context
senses.usage_note: Commonly contrasts with this for something closer or more immediate.

examples.sentence: Who is that man over there?
I remember that day very well.

ar.definition: يُستعمل قبل الاسم للإشارة إلى شخص أو شيء معيّن يكون أبعد أو معروفًا من السياق

es.definition: se usa antes de un sustantivo para referirse a una persona o cosa específica que está más lejos o ya es conocida por el contexto

ja.definition: 名詞の前で、話し手から離れているものや文脈上わかっている特定の人・物を指すのに使う

pt-BR.definition: usado antes de um substantivo para indicar uma pessoa ou coisa específica mais distante ou já conhecida no contexto

zh-Hans.definition: 用于名词前，指较远的、较不直接的或语境中已知的特定人或物

senses.definition: used as a pronoun to refer to a specific thing, idea, or person already mentioned or indicated
senses.usage_note: Can refer to concrete objects or to whole situations and ideas.

examples.sentence: That is my seat.
I didn't expect that.

ar.definition: يُستعمل كضمير للإشارة إلى شيء أو فكرة أو شخص محدد سبق ذكره أو الإشارة إليه

es.definition: se usa como pronombre para referirse a una cosa, idea o persona específica ya mencionada o señalada

ja.definition: すでに述べられたり示されたりした特定の物・考え・人を指す代名詞として使う

pt-BR.definition: usado como pronome para se referir a uma coisa, ideia ou pessoa específica já mencionada ou indicada

zh-Hans.definition: 用作代词，指前面提到或已经指明的特定事物、想法或人

senses.definition: used to introduce a clause after verbs, adjectives, or nouns, often reporting facts, thoughts, or statements
senses.usage_note: Very common as a clause marker; often optional in informal speech and writing.

examples.sentence: She said that she was tired.
I'm glad that you came.

ar.definition: يُستعمل لإدخال جملة بعد أفعال أو صفات أو أسماء، غالبًا لنقل حقيقة أو فكرة أو تصريح

es.definition: se usa para introducir una oración subordinada después de verbos, adjetivos o sustantivos, a menudo para expresar hechos, pensamientos o declaraciones

ja.definition: 動詞・形容詞・名詞の後で節を導き、事実・考え・発言などを表すのに使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para introduzir uma oração depois de verbos, adjetivos ou substantivos, frequentemente relatando fatos, pensamentos ou declarações

zh-Hans.definition: 用于在动词、形容词或名词后引导从句，常表示事实、想法或陈述

senses.definition: used to show the result or degree of something, especially after so or such
senses.usage_note: This use links a cause-like degree with its result.

examples.sentence: It was so cold that we stayed inside.
She was such a good teacher that everyone liked her.

ar.definition: يُستعمل لبيان النتيجة أو الدرجة، خاصة بعد so أو such

es.definition: se usa para mostrar el resultado o el grado de algo, especialmente después de so o such

ja.definition: 特に so や such の後で、結果や程度を表すのに使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para mostrar o resultado ou o grau de algo, especialmente depois de so ou such

zh-Hans.definition: 用于表示结果或程度，尤其放在 so 或 such 之后

senses.definition: used to introduce a relative clause identifying the person or thing being talked about
senses.usage_note: Common in everyday English; who or which may be preferred in some formal contexts.

examples.sentence: The movie that we saw was excellent.
I know the woman that lives next door.

ar.definition: يُستعمل لإدخال جملة صلة تحدد الشخص أو الشيء المقصود

es.definition: se usa para introducir una oración de relativo que identifica a la persona o cosa de la que se habla

ja.definition: 話している人や物を特定する関係節を導くのに使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para introduzir uma oração relativa que identifica a pessoa ou coisa de que se fala

zh-Hans.definition: 用于引导限定性关系从句，说明所谈论的是哪一个人或哪一样东西

confusable_words.note: Subject form used for the speaker plus others, not the listener.
Object form referring to the speaker.
Object pronoun for a female person or animal.

senses.definition: used to refer to the person or people being spoken or written to
senses.usage_note: In modern English, you can be singular or plural, and it can be subject or object.

examples.sentence: Are you ready?
I will call you tomorrow.

ar.definition: يُستخدم للإشارة إلى الشخص أو الأشخاص الذين تتحدث أو تكتب إليهم

es.definition: se usa para referirse a la persona o personas a quienes se habla o escribe

ja.definition: 話しかけたり書いたりしている相手を指す語

pt-BR.definition: usado para se referir à pessoa ou às pessoas com quem se fala ou para quem se escreve

zh-Hans.definition: 用于指正在被说话者或写作者称呼的一个人或多个人

senses.definition: used to address people in general, meaning anyone or people in general
senses.usage_note: Common in informal and neutral English for general statements; often translated as 'people in general'.

examples.sentence: In this job, you have to be patient.
You never know what will happen.

ar.definition: يُستخدم لمخاطبة الناس عمومًا بمعنى أي شخص أو الناس بشكل عام

es.definition: se usa para hablar de la gente en general, con el sentido de cualquiera o de las personas en general

ja.definition: 一般の人々、つまり誰でもという意味で使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para falar das pessoas em geral, com sentido de qualquer pessoa ou das pessoas em geral

zh-Hans.definition: 用于泛指一般人，表示任何人或人们通常会这样

senses.definition: used as a subject or object to refer to a thing, an idea, an animal, or a situation already known or understood
senses.usage_note: This is the basic pronoun use for things, animals, ideas, and situations.

examples.sentence: I found a book and put it on the table.
The dog was tired, so it lay down by the door.

ar.definition: يُستخدم كضمير فاعل أو مفعول به للإشارة إلى شيء أو فكرة أو حيوان أو موقف معروف من السياق

es.definition: se usa como sujeto u objeto para referirse a una cosa, idea, animal o situación ya conocida o entendida

ja.definition: すでに文脈で分かっている物・考え・動物・状況を指す主語・目的語として使う

pt-BR.definition: usado como sujeito ou objeto para se referir a uma coisa, ideia, animal ou situação já conhecida ou entendida

zh-Hans.definition: 用作主语或宾语，指前文已知或语境中明确的事物、想法、动物或情况

senses.definition: used as a subject when talking about weather, time, distance, or general situations, without referring to a specific thing
senses.usage_note: Often called “dummy” or “empty” subject it.

examples.sentence: It is raining again.
It was too late to call her.

ar.definition: يُستخدم كفاعل صوري عند الحديث عن الطقس أو الوقت أو المسافة أو المواقف العامة دون الإشارة إلى شيء محدد

es.definition: se usa como sujeto al hablar del tiempo atmosférico, la hora, la distancia o situaciones generales, sin referirse a una cosa concreta

ja.definition: 天気・時間・距離・一般的な状況について話すとき、特定のものを指さずに主語として使う

pt-BR.definition: usado como sujeito ao falar sobre clima, hora, distância ou situações gerais, sem se referir a algo específico

zh-Hans.definition: 谈论天气、时间、距离或一般情况时用作主语，并不指代某个具体事物

senses.definition: used to mean success, the needed quality, or the main point in some fixed expressions
senses.usage_note: Best learned through common expressions rather than as a fully predictable pronoun use.

examples.sentence: She worked hard and finally made it as a singer.
You can do this if you have it in you.

ar.definition: يُستخدم للدلالة على النجاح أو الصفة المطلوبة أو الفكرة الأساسية في بعض التعبيرات الثابتة

es.definition: se usa para significar éxito, la cualidad necesaria o el punto principal en algunas expresiones fijas

ja.definition: いくつかの決まった表現で、成功・必要な資質・要点を表すのに使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para significar sucesso, a qualidade necessária ou o ponto principal em algumas expressões fixas

zh-Hans.definition: 在一些固定表达中表示“成功”“所需素质”或“要点”

confusable_words.note: shows something is inside or within limits, not on a surface
shows contact with a surface above something

senses.definition: touching and supported by the surface of something, or attached to it.
senses.usage_note: Use for position on a surface, attached position, and many common transport expressions like on the bus or on the train.

examples.sentence: The book is on the table.
There is a picture on the wall.
She is on the bus now.

ar.definition: على سطح شيء أو متصل به.

es.definition: sobre la superficie de algo o sujeto a ello.

ja.definition: 〜の上に、または〜に接して取り付けられて.

pt-BR.definition: sobre a superfície de algo ou preso a isso.

zh-Hans.definition: 在……上面；附着在……上。

senses.definition: used to show the day, date, or occasion when something happens.
senses.usage_note: A core time preposition for days and dates; learners often contrast it with in and at.

examples.sentence: We have class on Monday.
Her birthday is on July 10th.
Please call me on arrival.

ar.definition: في يوم أو تاريخ أو مناسبة معينة.

es.definition: se usa para indicar el día, la fecha o la ocasión en que ocurre algo.

ja.definition: 何かが起こる曜日・日付・機会を示す.

pt-BR.definition: usado para indicar o dia, a data ou a ocasião em que algo acontece.

zh-Hans.definition: 用于表示某事发生的日期、星期或时机。

senses.definition: by means of a medium, device, system, or source of information.
senses.usage_note: Common with media and platforms: on TV, on the radio, on the internet, on a list, on a page.

examples.sentence: I saw the news on TV.
The article is on the internet.
Read the answer on page 5.

ar.definition: عن طريق وسيلة أو جهاز أو نظام أو مصدر معلومات.

es.definition: por medio de un canal, dispositivo, sistema o fuente de información.

ja.definition: 媒体・機器・システム・情報源を通して.

pt-BR.definition: por meio de um meio, dispositivo, sistema ou fonte de informação.

zh-Hans.definition: 通过某种媒体、设备、系统或信息来源。

senses.definition: used to show the subject, target, basis, or thing affected by an action or state.
senses.usage_note: A broad but important pattern after many verbs and adjectives; best learned through collocations.

examples.sentence: We are working on a new project.
You can depend on me.
She spent too much money on clothes.

ar.definition: يُستخدم للدلالة على الموضوع أو الهدف أو الأساس أو الشيء المتأثر بالفعل.

es.definition: se usa para indicar el tema, el objetivo, la base o aquello afectado por una acción o estado.

ja.definition: 行動や状態の対象・主題・根拠・影響を受けるものを示す.

pt-BR.definition: usado para indicar o assunto, o alvo, a base ou aquilo afetado por uma ação ou estado.

zh-Hans.definition: 用于表示动作或状态所涉及的对象、主题、依据或受影响的事物。

senses.definition: operating, functioning, or active.
senses.usage_note: Very common predicative adjective for devices, lights, machines, and systems in an active state.

examples.sentence: The light is on.
Is the computer still on?
Leave the engine on for a minute.

ar.definition: قيد التشغيل أو العمل أو مفعّل.

es.definition: encendido, funcionando o activo.

ja.definition: 作動中で、ついていて、動いている.

pt-BR.definition: ligado, funcionando ou ativo.

zh-Hans.definition: 开着的；运行中的；处于工作状态的。

confusable_words.note: often means accompaniment or inclusion; not the same as location
means being near, beside, or by a place or person

senses.definition: used to show that people or things are together, accompanying each other, or involved jointly
senses.usage_note: A very common preposition for accompaniment, togetherness, or joint involvement.

examples.sentence: She went to the park with her brother.
Come with me.

ar.definition: يُستخدم للدلالة على أن الأشخاص أو الأشياء معًا أو يرافق بعضهم بعضًا أو يشاركون معًا

es.definition: se usa para indicar que personas o cosas están juntas, se acompañan o participan juntas

ja.definition: 人や物が一緒にいること、同行すること、共同で関わることを表す

pt-BR.definition: usado para mostrar que pessoas ou coisas estão juntas, acompanhando umas às outras ou envolvidas em conjunto

zh-Hans.definition: 表示人与人或物与物在一起、陪同或共同参与

senses.definition: used to show possession of a feature, inclusion of something, or use of a tool or material
senses.usage_note: This sense covers several closely related uses: having a feature, containing something, and using an instrument.

examples.sentence: He lives in a house with a big garden.
She wrote the note with a pencil.

ar.definition: يُستخدم للدلالة على امتلاك صفة أو احتواء شيء أو استعمال أداة أو مادة

es.definition: se usa para indicar posesión de una característica, inclusión de algo o uso de una herramienta o material

ja.definition: 特徴を持つこと、何かを含むこと、道具や材料を使うことを表す

pt-BR.definition: usado para indicar posse de uma característica, inclusão de algo ou uso de uma ferramenta ou material

zh-Hans.definition: 表示具有某种特征、包含某物，或使用某种工具或材料

senses.definition: used after adjectives or some verbs to show the person or thing affected, handled, or connected in a particular way
senses.usage_note: Common after adjectives to mark the person or thing someone feels about or deals with.

examples.sentence: She is angry with me.
He is very good with children.

ar.definition: يُستخدم بعد الصفات أو بعض الأفعال للدلالة على الشخص أو الشيء الذي يتأثر أو يُتعامَل معه بطريقة معينة

es.definition: se usa después de adjetivos o algunos verbos para indicar la persona o cosa afectada, tratada o relacionada de cierta manera

ja.definition: 形容詞や一部の動詞の後で、影響を受ける人・物や、どのように関わるかを示す

pt-BR.definition: usado depois de adjetivos ou alguns verbos para mostrar a pessoa ou coisa afetada, tratada ou relacionada de certa maneira

zh-Hans.definition: 用于形容词或某些动词之后，表示以某种方式涉及、对待或影响的人或事物

senses.definition: used to describe a situation or condition that exists at the same time as something else
senses.usage_note: Often called a 'with-phrase' of accompanying circumstance: with the lights on, with his eyes closed.

examples.sentence: She sat by the window with the door open.
He fell asleep with the TV on.

ar.definition: يُستخدم لوصف حالة أو ظرف موجود في الوقت نفسه مع شيء آخر

es.definition: se usa para describir una situación o condición que existe al mismo tiempo que otra cosa

ja.definition: 別の出来事と同時に存在する状況や状態を表す

pt-BR.definition: usado para descrever uma situação ou condição que existe ao mesmo tempo que outra coisa

zh-Hans.definition: 用于描述与另一件事同时存在的情况或状态

collocations: with his hands in his pockets

confusable_words.note: used for something near the speaker or present in the situation
used for something farther away or less immediate

senses.definition: used before a singular noun to refer to a specific person, thing, time, or situation that is near, present, or being talked about now
senses.usage_note: As a determiner, it comes before a singular noun.

examples.sentence: This book is mine.
I need to finish this work today.

ar.definition: يُستعمل قبل الاسم المفرد للإشارة إلى شخص أو شيء أو وقت أو موقف محدد قريب أو حاضر أو يجري الحديث عنه الآن

es.definition: se usa antes de un sustantivo singular para referirse a una persona, cosa, momento o situación específica que está cerca, presente o de la que se habla ahora

ja.definition: 話し手に近い、今ある、または今話題になっている特定の人・物・時・状況を指して、単数名詞の前で使う

pt-BR.definition: usado antes de um substantivo singular para se referir a uma pessoa, coisa, momento ou situação específica que está perto, presente ou sendo mencionada agora

zh-Hans.definition: 用于单数名词前，指靠近说话人、当前存在或正在谈论的特定人、事物、时间或情况

senses.definition: used as a pronoun to refer to a thing, idea, situation, or person that is near, present, or being introduced
senses.usage_note: As a pronoun, it can stand alone, often with the verb be.

examples.sentence: This is my friend Anna.
This is why I called you.

ar.definition: يُستعمل كضمير للإشارة إلى شيء أو فكرة أو موقف أو شخص قريب أو حاضر أو يجري تقديمه

es.definition: se usa como pronombre para referirse a una cosa, idea, situación o persona que está cerca, presente o que se está presentando

ja.definition: 近くにあるもの、今あるもの、紹介する人、または話題の事柄・考え・状況を指して代名詞として使う

pt-BR.definition: usado como pronome para se referir a uma coisa, ideia, situação ou pessoa que está perto, presente ou sendo apresentada

zh-Hans.definition: 作代词使用，指靠近、当前存在、正在介绍的人，或正在谈论的事物、想法、情况

senses.definition: used before an adjective, adverb, or quantity word to mean 'to this degree' or 'as much as this'
senses.usage_note: Common in expressions of degree, especially before adjectives and quantity words.

examples.sentence: I didn't know it would be this cold.
We have never seen this many people here before.

ar.definition: يُستعمل قبل صفة أو ظرف أو كلمة تدل على الكمية بمعنى «إلى هذه الدرجة» أو «بهذا المقدار»

es.definition: se usa antes de un adjetivo, adverbio o palabra de cantidad con el sentido de 'hasta este grado' o 'tanto como esto'

ja.definition: 形容詞・副詞・数量語の前で使い、「これほど」「このくらい」の意味を表す

pt-BR.definition: usado antes de um adjetivo, advérbio ou palavra de quantidade para significar 'nesse grau' ou 'tanto assim'

zh-Hans.definition: 用于形容词、副词或数量词前，表示“到这种程度”或“有这么多”

senses.definition: to exist or to have reality
senses.usage_note: This is the basic verb used to talk about existence.

examples.sentence: I think ghosts are not real, but this problem is real.
Do you believe there will be life on other planets?

ar.definition: يوجد؛ يكون له وجود حقيقي

es.definition: existir; tener realidad

ja.definition: 存在する；実在する

pt-BR.definition: existir; ter realidade

zh-Hans.definition: 存在；真实存在

senses.definition: to link the subject with a name, description, age, job, or condition
senses.usage_note: This is the most common linking use of be.

examples.sentence: She is a doctor.
The children are very tired after school.

ar.definition: يكون؛ يربط المبتدأ باسم أو وصف أو حالة

es.definition: ser/estar; unir el sujeto con un nombre, descripción o estado

ja.definition: 〜である；〜だ；〜の状態である

pt-BR.definition: ser/estar; ligar o sujeito a nome, descrição ou estado

zh-Hans.definition: 是；处于……状态

senses.definition: to be in a place or position
senses.usage_note: Use be to talk about where someone or something is.

examples.sentence: My keys are on the table.
We will be in London tomorrow.

ar.definition: يوجد في مكان أو موضع

es.definition: estar en un lugar o posición

ja.definition: ある；いる；場所にいる

pt-BR.definition: estar em um lugar ou posição

zh-Hans.definition: 在；位于

senses.definition: used to give commands or instructions
senses.usage_note: The base form be is used in imperatives.

examples.sentence: Be careful with the glass.
Please be quiet during the meeting.

ar.definition: يُستعمل في صيغة الأمر لإعطاء تعليمات أو أوامر

es.definition: usado para dar órdenes o instrucciones

ja.definition: 命令や指示を表して使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para dar ordens ou instruções

zh-Hans.definition: 用于发出命令或指示

senses.definition: used as an auxiliary verb to form continuous tenses, passive forms, and some future expressions
senses.usage_note: Learners need this auxiliary use because it is central to English grammar.

examples.sentence: They are watching a movie now.
The door was closed by the manager.

ar.definition: فعل مساعد يُستعمل لتكوين الأزمنة المستمرة والمبني للمجهول وبعض صيغ المستقبل

es.definition: verbo auxiliar usado para formar tiempos continuos, voz pasiva y algunas expresiones de futuro

ja.definition: 進行形・受け身・一部の未来表現を作る助動詞

pt-BR.definition: verbo auxiliar usado para formar tempos contínuos, voz passiva e algumas expressões de futuro

zh-Hans.definition: 助动词，用于构成进行时、被动语态和某些将来表达

confusable_words.note: used for comparison, not for role or function

senses.definition: used to say what role, job, or function someone or something has
senses.usage_note: Common before a noun to express role, job, identity, or use.

examples.sentence: She works as a nurse at the local hospital.
Use the box as a table.

ar.definition: يُستعمل لبيان الدور أو الوظيفة أو الاستعمال الذي يكون عليه الشخص أو الشيء

es.definition: se usa para indicar el papel, trabajo o función de una persona o cosa

ja.definition: 人や物の役割・職業・機能を示すのに使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para indicar o papel, profissão ou função de alguém ou algo

zh-Hans.definition: 用于表示某人或某物的身份、职业、角色或用途

senses.definition: used in comparisons to show that two things are equal in some way or amount
senses.usage_note: Used for equal comparison, often in the pattern as ... as.

examples.sentence: Tom is as tall as his brother.
Please come as soon as possible.

ar.definition: يُستعمل في المقارنة لإظهار أن شيئين متساويان في صفة أو مقدار

es.definition: se usa en comparaciones para mostrar que dos cosas son iguales en alguna cualidad o cantidad

ja.definition: 比較で、二つのものが程度や量の点で同じであることを示すのに使う

pt-BR.definition: usado em comparações para mostrar que duas coisas são iguais em alguma qualidade ou quantidade

zh-Hans.definition: 用于比较，表示两者在某方面或数量上相同

senses.definition: used to mean 'in the way that' or 'as stated, known, or expected'
senses.usage_note: Often introduces manner or refers to something already known or expected.

examples.sentence: Do it as I showed you.
As expected, the train was late.

ar.definition: يُستعمل بمعنى «بالطريقة التي» أو «كما هو مذكور أو معروف أو متوقع»

es.definition: se usa con el sentido de 'de la manera que' o 'como estaba dicho, sabido o previsto'

ja.definition: 『…したように』『予想された通りに』という意味で使う

pt-BR.definition: usado com o sentido de 'da maneira que' ou 'como foi dito, sabido ou esperado'

zh-Hans.definition: 表示“按照……的方式”或“如所说、所知、所预料的那样”

senses.definition: used to mean 'while' or 'at the same time that'
senses.usage_note: Common in clauses describing two actions happening at the same time.

examples.sentence: As I was leaving, the phone rang.
We talked as we walked home.

ar.definition: يُستعمل بمعنى «بينما» أو «في الوقت نفسه الذي»

es.definition: se usa con el sentido de 'mientras' o 'al mismo tiempo que'

ja.definition: 『…している間に』『…するときに』という意味で使う

pt-BR.definition: usado com o sentido de 'enquanto' ou 'ao mesmo tempo que'

zh-Hans.definition: 表示“当……时”或“与……同时”

senses.definition: used to give the reason for something
senses.usage_note: Used to introduce a reason, often at the beginning of a clause.

examples.sentence: As it was raining, we stayed inside.
As you are here, you can help me.

ar.definition: يُستعمل لبيان سبب شيء ما

es.definition: se usa para dar la razón de algo

ja.definition: 理由や原因を示すのに使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para dar a razão de algo

zh-Hans.definition: 用于说明原因

senses.definition: to own, hold, or possess something; to include a quality, feature, or relationship
senses.usage_note: Use this sense for possession, features, and relationships.

examples.sentence: She has a new car.
The house has a small garden.
I have two sisters.

ar.definition: يملك أو لديه شيء؛ ويتضمن صفة أو علاقة

es.definition: tener o poseer algo; incluir una cualidad, rasgo o relación

ja.definition: 何かを持っている；性質・特徴・関係がある

pt-BR.definition: ter ou possuir algo; incluir uma qualidade, característica ou relação

zh-Hans.definition: 拥有；具有；有某种特征或关系

senses.definition: to eat, drink, take, or experience something
senses.usage_note: A very common broad-use verb in many fixed combinations.

examples.sentence: We had lunch at noon.
He is having a shower now.
She had a bad headache yesterday.

ar.definition: يتناول أو يأخذ أو يمرّ بتجربة ما

es.definition: comer, beber, tomar o experimentar algo

ja.definition: 食べる、飲む、受ける、経験する

pt-BR.definition: comer, beber, tomar ou passar por algo

zh-Hans.definition: 吃；喝；进行；经历；患有

senses.definition: to receive, get, or be in a situation where something is available or happening to you
senses.usage_note: Often used where English prefers 'have' instead of a more specific verb.

examples.sentence: Do you have time today?
They had a meeting this morning.
I had a chance to talk to her.

ar.definition: يكون لديه أو يحصل على شيء أو يمرّ بحدث

es.definition: tener, recibir u ocurrirle algo

ja.definition: 時間・機会などがある；出来事を持つ／受ける

pt-BR.definition: ter, receber ou estar em uma situação em que algo acontece ou está disponível

zh-Hans.definition: 有；得到；遇到；有某事发生

senses.definition: used before another verb to show necessity or obligation
grammar_patterns: do/does/did + subject + have to + base verb
senses.usage_note: A core learner pattern; negatives and questions usually use do-support.

examples.sentence: I have to go now.
She has to work on Saturday.
Do we have to finish this today?

ar.definition: يُستخدم قبل الفعل للدلالة على الضرورة أو الوجوب

es.definition: se usa antes de otro verbo para expresar necesidad u obligación

ja.definition: 義務や必要を表して、別の動詞の前で使う

pt-BR.definition: usado antes de outro verbo para indicar necessidade ou obrigação

zh-Hans.definition: 用于另一个动词前，表示必须或有义务

senses.definition: used with a past participle to form perfect verb tenses
senses.usage_note: Important as a grammar word in perfect tenses.

examples.sentence: I have finished my homework.
They have lived here for years.
Have you ever seen snow?

ar.definition: فعل مساعد يُستخدم مع اسم المفعول لتكوين الأزمنة التامة

es.definition: verbo auxiliar usado con participio para formar los tiempos perfectos

ja.definition: 過去分詞とともに使って完了形を作る助動詞

pt-BR.definition: verbo auxiliar usado com particípio passado para formar tempos perfeitos

zh-Hans.definition: 与过去分词连用，构成完成时态的助动词

confusable_words.note: used for a position inside an area or container, not just a point or place
often used for movement to a specific place

senses.definition: in, on, or near a particular place or point
senses.usage_note: Use for a specific point, address, event place, or common location expression.

examples.sentence: She is waiting at the bus stop.
I left my bag at home.

ar.definition: في أو عند مكان أو نقطة معينة

es.definition: en, junto a o en un lugar o punto determinado

ja.definition: 特定の場所や地点で／に

pt-BR.definition: em, no/na, junto de um lugar ou ponto específico

zh-Hans.definition: 在，位于某个具体地点或位置

senses.definition: used to show a particular time
senses.usage_note: Use with clock times and some fixed expressions such as at night, at noon, and at the moment.

examples.sentence: The class starts at nine o'clock.
He usually calls me at night.

ar.definition: في وقت محدد

es.definition: a una hora o momento específico

ja.definition: 特定の時刻に

pt-BR.definition: em um horário ou momento específico

zh-Hans.definition: 在某个具体时间

senses.definition: used to show a rate, level, age, price, speed, or state
senses.usage_note: Common in patterns like at speed, at a price, at age 10, at a high level, at risk.

examples.sentence: The car was traveling at 80 kilometers an hour.
Tickets are selling at a low price today.

ar.definition: بمعدل أو مستوى أو سعر أو سرعة أو حالة معينة

es.definition: a una velocidad, nivel, precio, edad o estado determinado

ja.definition: 速度・価格・水準・年齢・状態などで

pt-BR.definition: a uma certa velocidade, nível, preço, idade ou estado

zh-Hans.definition: 以某种速度、价格、水平、年龄或状态

senses.definition: used to show the target or direction of an action, feeling, or skill
senses.usage_note: Use after many verbs and adjectives to show what someone acts toward or is skilled in.

examples.sentence: Don't shout at your brother.
She is very good at math.

ar.definition: تجاه أو نحو هدف الفعل أو الشعور أو المهارة

es.definition: para indicar el objetivo o la dirección de una acción, sentimiento o habilidad

ja.definition: 行動・感情・技能の対象や向きを表して

pt-BR.definition: para indicar o alvo ou a direção de uma ação, sentimento ou habilidade

zh-Hans.definition: 表示动作、感情或技能所针对的对象或方向

confusable_words.note: object form, not used as the subject of a verb
possessive form
female subject pronoun
used for a person when gender is unknown or irrelevant in modern general English

senses.definition: used as the subject pronoun for a male person or animal that has already been mentioned or is understood from context
senses.usage_note: Use he as a subject pronoun. In modern English, singular they is often preferred when gender is unknown or not important.

examples.sentence: Tom is my brother. He is ten years old.
I saw the dog, and he ran to his owner.

ar.definition: يُستخدم كضمير فاعل للمذكر لشخص أو حيوان ذُكر سابقًا أو يُفهم من السياق

es.definition: se usa como pronombre de sujeto para una persona o animal masculino ya mencionado o conocido por el contexto

ja.definition: すでに話に出た、または文脈で分かる男性の人や雄の動物を指す主語の代名詞

pt-BR.definition: usado como pronome do sujeito para uma pessoa ou animal do sexo masculino já mencionado ou entendido pelo contexto

zh-Hans.definition: 用作主语代词，指前面提到过的或语境中明确的男性人或雄性动物

confusable_words.note: Used to form negatives with verbs; often shortened to n't in speech and writing.
No usually modifies a noun phrase, while not usually modifies a verb, adjective, or whole clause.

senses.definition: used to make a verb, adjective, adverb, or clause negative
senses.usage_note: This is the main negative word in English. It often follows an auxiliary or the verb be.

examples.sentence: I do not understand the question.
The movie was not very good.
She is not at home today.

ar.definition: تُستعمل لجعل الفعل أو الصفة أو الحال أو الجملة في صيغة النفي

es.definition: se usa para negar un verbo, un adjetivo, un adverbio o una oración

ja.definition: 動詞・形容詞・副詞・文全体を否定するために使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para negar um verbo, adjetivo, advérbio ou uma oração

zh-Hans.definition: 用于否定动词、形容词、副词或整个句子

senses.definition: used to deny only part of a statement, not the whole idea
senses.usage_note: Common with words like all, both, always, everyone, and everything.

examples.sentence: Not everyone agreed with the decision.
It is not always easy to be patient.

ar.definition: تُستعمل لنفي جزء من العبارة فقط وليس الفكرة كلها

es.definition: se usa para negar solo una parte de una afirmación, no toda la idea

ja.definition: 文全体ではなく、その一部だけを否定するときに使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para negar apenas parte de uma afirmação, e não a ideia toda

zh-Hans.definition: 用于否定陈述中的一部分，而不是全部意思

senses.definition: used before a word or phrase to soften, limit, or correct what is being said
senses.usage_note: Often used to make a statement less direct or more nuanced.

examples.sentence: It is not exactly cheap.
I am not really sure what he meant.

ar.definition: تُستعمل قبل كلمة أو عبارة للتخفيف أو التحديد أو التصحيح

es.definition: se usa antes de una palabra o expresión para suavizar, limitar o corregir lo que se dice

ja.definition: 言い方を弱めたり、限定したり、言い直したりするために語句の前で使う

pt-BR.definition: usado antes de uma palavra ou expressão para suavizar, limitar ou corrigir o que se diz

zh-Hans.definition: 用于词或短语前，表示缓和、限制或纠正说法

senses.definition: used to show the means or method of doing something, especially transport, communication, or how something is created
senses.usage_note: Common with transport and communication: by bus, by train, by email.

examples.sentence: We went there by bus.
Please send it by email.
The picture was drawn by hand.

ar.definition: يُستخدم للدلالة على الوسيلة أو الطريقة التي يتم بها فعل شيء ما، خاصةً النقل أو التواصل أو طريقة الصنع

es.definition: se usa para indicar el medio o método de hacer algo, especialmente transporte, comunicación o la manera en que algo se crea

ja.definition: 何かを行う手段・方法を表す。特に交通手段、連絡手段、作り方について使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para indicar o meio ou método de fazer algo, especialmente transporte, comunicação ou a maneira como algo é produzido

zh-Hans.definition: 表示做某事所用的方式、手段或交通工具，也可表示制作方式

senses.definition: used to show the person or thing that performs an action, especially in passive sentences, or the creator of something
senses.usage_note: Very common in passive structures and for authorship.

examples.sentence: The book was written by my sister.
This song is by a famous singer.
The window was broken by the wind.

ar.definition: يُستخدم للدلالة على الشخص أو الشيء الذي يقوم بالفعل، خاصة في الجمل المبنية للمجهول، أو على صاحب العمل أو مبتكره

es.definition: se usa para indicar la persona o cosa que realiza una acción, especialmente en oraciones pasivas, o el creador de algo

ja.definition: 特に受け身の文で、動作を行う人・物を示す。また作品の作者を示す

pt-BR.definition: usado para indicar a pessoa ou coisa que realiza uma ação, especialmente em frases na voz passiva, ou o criador de algo

zh-Hans.definition: 表示动作的执行者，尤其用于被动句中；也可表示作品的作者或创作者

senses.definition: near or at the side of someone or something
senses.usage_note: Often used for physical position: by the door, by the river.

examples.sentence: She sat by the window.
There is a small table by the bed.
He stood quietly by her side.

ar.definition: بالقرب من شخص أو شيء أو إلى جانبه

es.definition: cerca de o al lado de alguien o algo

ja.definition: 人や物の近くに、またはそのそばに

pt-BR.definition: perto de ou ao lado de alguém ou algo

zh-Hans.definition: 在某人或某物附近，或在其旁边

senses.definition: not later than a particular time; before or at a deadline
senses.usage_note: Use by for deadlines: by Monday, by 5 p.m.

examples.sentence: Please finish the work by Friday.
I will be home by ten.
By the time we arrived, the shop had closed.

ar.definition: في موعد لا يتجاوز وقتًا معينًا؛ قبل ذلك الوقت أو عنده

es.definition: no más tarde de un momento determinado; antes o en una fecha límite

ja.definition: ある時刻までに、遅くともその時刻には

pt-BR.definition: não depois de um determinado momento; antes ou até um prazo

zh-Hans.definition: 不晚于某个时间；在某个截止时间之前或当时

senses.definition: used in fixed phrases to show manner, cause, or condition, such as by chance, by mistake, by oneself, or by law
senses.usage_note: Best learned through common phrases rather than one general rule.

examples.sentence: I took your bag by mistake.
She traveled by herself.
Smoking is forbidden by law.

ar.definition: يُستخدم في تعبيرات ثابتة للدلالة على الكيفية أو السبب أو الحالة، مثل: بالخطأ، بمفرده، أو بموجب القانون

es.definition: se usa en expresiones fijas para indicar manera, causa o condición, como por casualidad, por error, solo o por ley

ja.definition: by chance、by mistake、by oneself、by law などの決まった表現で、様態・理由・条件を表す

pt-BR.definition: usado em expressões fixas para indicar modo, causa ou condição, como por acaso, por engano, sozinho ou por lei

zh-Hans.definition: 用于固定短语中，表示方式、原因或条件，如 by mistake、by oneself、by law

confusable_words.note: adds information instead of contrast
often introduces a reason or result, not contrast

senses.definition: used to connect words, phrases, or clauses that contrast with each other
senses.usage_note: This is the most common use of but in everyday English.

examples.sentence: I wanted to go, but I was too tired.
She is small but strong.

ar.definition: لكن؛ تُستعمل لربط كلمات أو عبارات أو جمل فيها تعارض أو مقابلة

es.definition: pero; se usa para conectar palabras, frases u oraciones que contrastan entre sí

ja.definition: しかし、でも；対比する語句や節をつなぐのに使う

pt-BR.definition: mas; usado para ligar palavras, expressões ou orações que contrastam entre si

zh-Hans.definition: 但是；用于连接表示对比的词、短语或句子

senses.definition: used to mean except for someone or something
senses.usage_note: Common in patterns like everyone but me and nothing but water.

examples.sentence: Everyone but Tom was there.
I eat nothing but fruit for breakfast.

ar.definition: إلّا / باستثناء؛ تُستعمل لاستبعاد شخص أو شيء

es.definition: excepto; se usa para excluir a alguien o algo

ja.definition: ～を除いて、～以外は；人や物を除外する意味で使う

pt-BR.definition: exceto; usado para excluir alguém ou algo

zh-Hans.definition: 除…之外；用于排除某人或某物

senses.definition: used to emphasize that only one person, thing, or action is involved
senses.usage_note: This use appears in somewhat formal expressions.

examples.sentence: No one but Sarah knew the answer.
He could not but laugh.

ar.definition: فقط / لا أحد سوى؛ تُستعمل للتأكيد على أن شخصًا أو شيئًا واحدًا فقط معنيّ

es.definition: solo; se usa para enfatizar que interviene una sola persona, cosa o acción

ja.definition: ただ～だけ、～しか；一人・一つ・一つの行為だけであることを強調する

pt-BR.definition: apenas; usado para enfatizar que só uma pessoa, coisa ou ação está envolvida

zh-Hans.definition: 只有；用于强调只涉及一个人、事物或动作

confusable_words.note: used for movement to a place, not origin
used with a starting point and often pairs with 'to'

senses.definition: used to show the place, person, or source where someone or something starts or comes from
senses.usage_note: A very common preposition for origin, source, or sender.

examples.sentence: She is from Brazil.
I got an email from my teacher.

ar.definition: مِن: تُستخدم للدلالة على المكان أو الشخص أو المصدر الذي يأتي منه شخص أو شيء أو يبدأ منه

es.definition: de: se usa para indicar el lugar, la persona o la fuente de donde alguien o algo viene o se origina

ja.definition: 〜から: 人や物が来る場所・人・出所を表す

pt-BR.definition: de: usado para indicar o lugar, a pessoa ou a origem de onde alguém ou algo vem

zh-Hans.definition: 从；来自：表示某人或某物来自的地方、人物或来源

senses.definition: used to show the starting point of time, distance, or movement
senses.usage_note: Often pairs with 'to' to show a range.

examples.sentence: The shop is open from 9 a.m. to 6 p.m.
We walked from the station to the hotel.

ar.definition: مِن: تُستخدم للدلالة على نقطة البداية في الوقت أو المسافة أو الحركة

es.definition: de/desde: se usa para indicar el punto de inicio en el tiempo, la distancia o el movimiento

ja.definition: 〜から: 時間・距離・移動の出発点を表す

pt-BR.definition: de/a partir de: usado para mostrar o ponto inicial de tempo, distância ou movimento

zh-Hans.definition: 从：表示时间、距离或移动的起点

senses.definition: used to show the cause, reason, or material source of something
senses.usage_note: Common with feelings, illness, and materials.

examples.sentence: He was tired from the long trip.
Wine is made from grapes.

ar.definition: مِن: تُستخدم للدلالة على السبب أو المصدر المادي لشيء ما

es.definition: de/por: se usa para indicar la causa, la razón o el material de origen de algo

ja.definition: 〜で／〜から: 原因・理由・材料のもとを表す

pt-BR.definition: de/por: usado para indicar a causa, a razão ou a matéria-prima de algo

zh-Hans.definition: 由于；由……制成：表示原因、理由或原材料来源

senses.definition: used to show separation, difference, or distance away from something
senses.usage_note: Used in many adjective and adverb patterns showing contrast or distance.

examples.sentence: This book is different from that one.
Keep the medicine away from children.

ar.definition: مِن: تُستخدم للدلالة على الانفصال أو الاختلاف أو الابتعاد عن شيء ما

es.definition: de: se usa para indicar separación, diferencia o distancia con respecto a algo

ja.definition: 〜から: 分離・相違・距離を表す

pt-BR.definition: de: usado para indicar separação, diferença ou distância em relação a algo

zh-Hans.definition: 与……分开；不同于；远离：表示分离、差异或距离

confusable_words.note: subject pronoun; not possessive
used before a noun; unlike possessive pronouns used alone

senses.definition: used before a noun to show that something belongs to or is connected with the speaker
senses.usage_note: A possessive determiner used before a noun; unlike mine, it is not normally used alone.

examples.sentence: This is my book.
My sister lives in London.
What is my seat number?

ar.definition: يُستعمل قبل الاسم للدلالة على أن الشيء يخصّ المتكلم أو يرتبط به

es.definition: se usa antes de un sustantivo para mostrar que algo pertenece al hablante o está relacionado con él

ja.definition: 話し手の持ち物・関係を表すために名詞の前で使う

pt-BR.definition: usado antes de um substantivo para mostrar que algo pertence ao falante ou está ligado a ele

zh-Hans.definition: 用于名词前，表示某物属于说话人或与说话人有关

confusable_words.note: used to add similar items, not to present a choice
often used after a negative to mean 'and not either'

senses.definition: used to join words, phrases, or clauses to show a choice, alternative, or possibility
senses.usage_note: This is the basic word for presenting alternatives or choices.

examples.sentence: Would you like tea or coffee?
We can walk or take the bus.

ar.definition: أو: تُستخدم لربط الكلمات أو العبارات أو الجمل للدلالة على الاختيار أو البديل أو الاحتمال

es.definition: o: se usa para unir palabras, frases o cláusulas para mostrar una elección, alternativa o posibilidad

ja.definition: または・それとも: 語句や節を結んで、選択肢・代案・可能性を表す

pt-BR.definition: ou: usado para ligar palavras, expressões ou orações e indicar escolha, alternativa ou possibilidade

zh-Hans.definition: 或者；还是：连接词、短语或分句，表示选择、备选或可能性

senses.definition: used to mean that the exact number, amount, or situation is not certain, but one of the stated possibilities is true
senses.usage_note: Often used with numbers, days, and similar items to show approximation or uncertainty.

examples.sentence: It will take two or three days.
The meeting is on Monday or Tuesday.

ar.definition: أو: تُستخدم عندما لا يكون العدد أو الوقت أو الحالة محددة بدقة، لكن أحد الاحتمالين صحيح

es.definition: o: se usa cuando la cantidad, el tiempo o la situación exactos no son seguros, pero una de las posibilidades dadas es correcta

ja.definition: または: 正確な数・時・状況は不明だが、挙げた可能性のどれかであることを表す

pt-BR.definition: ou: usado quando o número, a quantidade, o tempo ou a situação exatos não são certos, mas uma das possibilidades dadas é verdadeira

zh-Hans.definition: 或者：用于表示确切的数量、时间或情况不确定，但所说的几个可能之一是对的

senses.definition: used to introduce a consequence, warning, or result if something does not happen
senses.usage_note: Common in warnings and instructions; often equivalent to otherwise.

examples.sentence: Hurry up, or we'll miss the train.
Wear a coat, or you'll get cold.

ar.definition: أو: تُستخدم لبيان النتيجة أو التحذير إذا لم يحدث شيء ما

es.definition: o: se usa para introducir una consecuencia, advertencia o resultado si algo no ocurre

ja.definition: さもないと・でないと: 何かが起こらない場合の結果や警告を導く

pt-BR.definition: ou: usado para introduzir uma consequência, aviso ou resultado caso algo não aconteça

zh-Hans.definition: 否则；不然：用于引出如果某事不发生会导致的结果或警告

confusable_words.note: subject form; object form is used after verbs and prepositions
possessive determiner form
possessive pronoun form

senses.definition: used by a speaker to refer to himself or herself and one or more other people
senses.usage_note: This is the usual subject pronoun for a group that includes the speaker.

examples.sentence: We are ready to leave.
My sister and I said that we would help.

ar.definition: نستخدمها ليشير المتكلم إلى نفسه وإلى شخص واحد أو أكثر معه

es.definition: se usa para que el hablante se refiera a sí mismo y a una o más personas más

ja.definition: 話し手が自分自身と他の一人以上を指すときに使う

pt-BR.definition: usado pelo falante para se referir a si mesmo e a uma ou mais pessoas

zh-Hans.definition: 说话人用来指自己和另外一个或多个人

senses.definition: used to refer to a group that the speaker identifies with, such as people of the same family, team, nation, or type
senses.usage_note: This use often appears with a noun or label naming the group.

examples.sentence: We teachers need more time to prepare lessons.
We humans depend on clean water.

ar.definition: تُستخدم للإشارة إلى جماعة ينتمي إليها المتكلم مثل العائلة أو الفريق أو الجنسية أو النوع

es.definition: se usa para referirse a un grupo con el que el hablante se identifica, como familia, equipo, nación o tipo

ja.definition: 話し手が家族・チーム・国民・人類など、自分が属すると考える集団を指すのに使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para se referir a um grupo com o qual o falante se identifica, como família, equipe, nação ou tipo

zh-Hans.definition: 用于指说话人所认同的一个群体，如家庭、团队、国家或某一类人

confusable_words.note: possessive form used before a noun; not the same as the contraction
used before a noun; compare with possessive pronoun used without a noun

senses.definition: belonging to or connected with the person or people being spoken to
senses.usage_note: Used before a noun to show that something belongs to the person or people you are speaking to.

examples.sentence: Is this your bag?
I like your idea.

ar.definition: الخاص بك أو المرتبط بك، ويستعمل قبل الاسم

es.definition: que pertenece o está relacionado con la persona o personas a las que se habla

ja.definition: 話しかけている相手に属する、または相手に関係する

pt-BR.definition: que pertence ou está relacionado à pessoa ou às pessoas com quem se fala

zh-Hans.definition: 你的；你们的；属于或与被说话者有关的

senses.definition: used to emphasize that something belongs especially to the person being spoken to or is done by them personally
senses.usage_note: Often used with own for emphasis.

examples.sentence: You should make your own decision.
Do it in your own way.

ar.definition: يستعمل للتأكيد على أن الشيء يخص المخاطَب نفسه أو يقوم به بنفسه

es.definition: se usa para enfatizar que algo pertenece especialmente a la persona a la que se habla o que ella misma lo hace

ja.definition: その人自身のものであること、または自分で行うことを強調して使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para enfatizar que algo pertence especialmente à pessoa com quem se fala ou é feito por ela mesma

zh-Hans.definition: 用于强调某物特别属于对方，或由对方本人亲自做

confusable_words.note: means every person or thing in a group
usually refers to the complete amount or whole thing

senses.definition: the whole amount, extent, or number of people or things in a group
senses.usage_note: Common before plural and uncountable nouns to mean the complete group or amount.

examples.sentence: All the children were happy.
She drank all the water.

ar.definition: كلّ؛ كامل كمية أو عدد شيء ما

es.definition: todo; la cantidad o el número completo de algo

ja.definition: すべての；全部の量や数の

pt-BR.definition: todo; a quantidade ou o número inteiro de algo

zh-Hans.definition: 所有的；全部的

senses.definition: everything or everyone in a particular group or situation
senses.usage_note: Used as a pronoun when the noun is not repeated.

examples.sentence: All were welcome at the meeting.
That is all I know.

ar.definition: الجميع؛ كل شيء

es.definition: todos; todo

ja.definition: みんな；すべて

pt-BR.definition: todos; tudo

zh-Hans.definition: 全部；所有人；所有事物

senses.definition: completely or entirely
senses.usage_note: Often used before adjectives in informal everyday patterns such as all ready or all wrong.

examples.sentence: The windows were all dirty.
I am all ready for the trip.

ar.definition: تمامًا؛ كليًا

es.definition: completamente; totalmente

ja.definition: すっかり；完全に

pt-BR.definition: completamente; totalmente

zh-Hans.definition: 完全地；彻底地

senses.definition: almost
senses.usage_note: Mainly in the phrase all but, especially in more formal writing.

examples.sentence: The task was all but impossible.
By noon, the work was all but finished.

ar.definition: تقريبًا؛ يكاد يكون

es.definition: casi

ja.definition: ほとんど；ほぼ

pt-BR.definition: quase

zh-Hans.definition: 几乎；差不多

confusable_words.note: very can also strengthen adjectives, but so is especially common before that-clauses or for emphasis
too means more than wanted or acceptable, unlike so

senses.definition: to a very great degree; very
senses.usage_note: Common intensifier before adjectives and adverbs.

examples.sentence: The bag is so heavy.
She was so tired that she went to bed early.

ar.definition: إلى درجة كبيرة جدًا؛ جدًا

es.definition: muy; en gran medida

ja.definition: とても; そんなに

pt-BR.definition: muito; em alto grau

zh-Hans.definition: 这么；那么；很，非常

senses.definition: used to refer back to an idea, statement, or fact already mentioned
senses.usage_note: Very common in short responses and clause replacement.

examples.sentence: "Is it going to rain?" "I think so."
If so, we should leave now.

ar.definition: يُستعمل للإشارة إلى فكرة أو قول ذُكر سابقًا

es.definition: se usa para referirse a una idea o afirmación mencionada antes

ja.definition: 前に述べた内容を受けて「そう」「そのように」の意味で使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para retomar uma ideia, afirmação ou fato já mencionado

zh-Hans.definition: 这样；如此；用于指代前面提到的情况或说法

senses.definition: therefore; for that reason; as a result
senses.usage_note: A core connector for cause and result.

examples.sentence: It was late, so we went home.
No one called, so I assumed the meeting was canceled.

ar.definition: لذلك؛ ولهذا السبب؛ ونتيجة لذلك

es.definition: así que; por eso; como resultado

ja.definition: だから; そのため

pt-BR.definition: então; por isso; como resultado

zh-Hans.definition: 所以；因此

senses.definition: used before an auxiliary verb to show that the same is true for another person or thing
senses.usage_note: Learners often meet this as a set pattern in conversation.

examples.sentence: "I love jazz." "So do I."
She was excited, and so was her brother.

ar.definition: تُستعمل قبل الفعل المساعد للدلالة على أن الأمر نفسه صحيح لشخص أو شيء آخر

es.definition: se usa antes de un verbo auxiliar para mostrar que lo mismo es cierto para otra persona o cosa

ja.definition: 助動詞の前に置いて、同じことが別の人や物にも当てはまることを示す

pt-BR.definition: usado antes de um verbo auxiliar para mostrar que o mesmo é verdadeiro para outra pessoa ou coisa

zh-Hans.definition: 放在助动词前，表示另一人或事物也是如此

senses.definition: in a particular way or to the degree already described
grammar_patterns: not so much A as B
senses.usage_note: A broader reference-use sense covering manner and degree.

examples.sentence: Hold it just so.
The problem is not so much the cost as the time.

ar.definition: بهذه الطريقة أو إلى الدرجة المذكورة

es.definition: de esa manera o en el grado ya mencionado

ja.definition: そのように; その程度に

pt-BR.definition: dessa maneira ou nesse grau já mencionado

zh-Hans.definition: 这样；那样；达到前面所说的程度

collocations: not so much A as B

confusable_words.note: shows possession for a male person or animal
shows possession for more than one person
used before a noun; unlike possessive pronouns such as mine

senses.definition: belonging to or connected with a male person, boy, or male animal that has already been mentioned or is known from context
grammar_patterns: determiner before a singular or plural noun
senses.usage_note: Used before a noun. It is a possessive determiner, not a subject form like he.

examples.sentence: His name is Daniel.
He parked his car outside.
The dog hurt his leg.

ar.definition: خاصّ بـ أو عائد إلى رجل أو صبي أو حيوان مذكّر سبق ذكره أو هو معروف من السياق

es.definition: que pertenece o está relacionado con un hombre, niño o animal macho ya mencionado o conocido por el contexto

ja.definition: すでに話に出た、または文脈で分かる男性・男の子・雄の動物の所有や関係を表す

pt-BR.definition: que pertence ou está relacionado a um homem, menino ou animal macho já mencionado ou conhecido pelo contexto

zh-Hans.definition: 表示某个已提到或语境中已知的男性、男孩或雄性动物的所属关系

senses.definition: the possessive form used without a following noun, especially in phrases like a friend of his
senses.usage_note: As a pronoun, his can stand alone after be or appear in the pattern of + his.

examples.sentence: A friend of his called this morning.
Those books on the shelf are his.
That idea of his was surprisingly useful.

ar.definition: صيغة الملكية التي تُستعمل من دون اسم بعدها، وخاصة في تراكيب مثل صديق له

es.definition: forma posesiva usada sin un sustantivo después, especialmente en expresiones como un amigo suyo

ja.definition: 後ろに名詞を伴わずに使う所有形。特に a friend of his のような表現で使う

pt-BR.definition: forma possessiva usada sem um substantivo depois, especialmente em expressões como um amigo dele

zh-Hans.definition: 不跟在名词前、单独使用的所有形式，尤其用于 a friend of his 这类结构

confusable_words.note: subject form; 'them' is the object form
possessive form
possessive pronoun

senses.definition: used as the subject pronoun for two or more people, animals, or things already mentioned or understood
senses.usage_note: Common subject pronoun for plural referents.

examples.sentence: They are my friends.
I like these shoes because they are comfortable.

ar.definition: يُستعمل ضميرًا فاعلًا لاثنين أو أكثر من الأشخاص أو الحيوانات أو الأشياء المذكورة أو المفهومة من السياق

es.definition: se usa como pronombre de sujeto para dos o más personas, animales o cosas ya mencionados o entendidos

ja.definition: すでに述べた、または文脈で分かる二人以上の人・動物・物を指す主語の代名詞

pt-BR.definition: usado como pronome sujeito para duas ou mais pessoas, animais ou coisas já mencionados ou entendidos

zh-Hans.definition: 用作主语代词，指前面提到的或语境中已知的两个或更多的人、动物或事物

senses.definition: used to refer to people in general, especially when the exact people are unknown or not important
senses.usage_note: Often used in general statements such as 'They say...'.

examples.sentence: They say this restaurant is excellent.
In some countries, they drive on the left.

ar.definition: يُستعمل للإشارة إلى الناس عمومًا، خاصة عندما لا يكون الأشخاص المحددون معروفين أو مهمين

es.definition: se usa para referirse a la gente en general, especialmente cuando las personas exactas no se conocen o no importan

ja.definition: だれなのか特定できない、または特定する必要のない人々一般を指して使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para se referir às pessoas em geral, especialmente quando as pessoas exatas são desconhecidas ou não são importantes

zh-Hans.definition: 用于泛指人们，尤指具体是谁并不知道或并不重要时

senses.definition: used to refer to one person whose gender is unknown, not stated, or nonbinary
senses.usage_note: Singular they is standard in modern English.

examples.sentence: If anyone calls, tell them they can email me.
Sam said they would arrive at noon.

ar.definition: يُستعمل للإشارة إلى شخص واحد عندما يكون جنسه غير معروف أو غير مذكور أو عندما يكون الشخص غير ثنائي

es.definition: se usa para referirse a una sola persona cuyo género es desconocido, no se menciona o es no binario

ja.definition: 性別が不明・未提示の一人の人、またはノンバイナリーの人を指して使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para se referir a uma única pessoa cujo gênero é desconhecido, não foi informado ou é não binária

zh-Hans.definition: 用于指代单个人，当其性别未知、未说明，或该人是非二元性别时

confusable_words.note: subject pronoun; used as the doer of the action, not the receiver
possessive determiner; used before a noun

senses.definition: the object form of the pronoun used by a speaker to refer to himself or herself
senses.usage_note: Use 'me' as the object form, not as the subject.

examples.sentence: Can you help me?
She gave me a book.
Please sit with me.

ar.definition: صيغة المفعول من الضمير التي يستخدمها المتكلم للإشارة إلى نفسه

es.definition: forma de objeto del pronombre que usa el hablante para referirse a sí mismo

ja.definition: 話し手が自分自身を指すときに使う目的格の代名詞

pt-BR.definition: forma oblíqua do pronome usada pelo falante para se referir a si mesmo

zh-Hans.definition: 说话人指自己时使用的宾格代词

senses.definition: used to introduce a condition or situation on which something else depends
senses.usage_note: This is the basic conditional use.

examples.sentence: If it rains, we will stay inside.
Call me if you need help.

ar.definition: إذا؛ تُستعمل لعرض شرط يعتمد عليه شيء آخر

es.definition: si; se usa para introducir una condición de la que depende otra cosa

ja.definition: もし〜なら；別のことがそれに左右される条件を示す

pt-BR.definition: se; usado para introduzir uma condição da qual outra coisa depende

zh-Hans.definition: 如果，假如；用于引出条件

senses.definition: used to introduce whether something is true, happening, or possible
senses.usage_note: Common after verbs like know, ask, see, and wonder.

examples.sentence: I do not know if he is at home.

ar.definition: ما إذا؛ تُستعمل عند الحديث عن كون شيء ما صحيحًا أو واقعًا أو ممكنًا

es.definition: si; se usa para introducir si algo es verdad, está ocurriendo o es posible

ja.definition: 〜かどうか；本当か、起きているか、可能かを示す

pt-BR.definition: se; usado para introduzir se algo é verdadeiro, está acontecendo ou é possível

zh-Hans.definition: 是否；用于引出某事是不是真的、会不会发生等

senses.definition: used in the phrase 'if only' to express a strong wish or regret
senses.usage_note: Usually learned as part of the fixed phrase 'if only'.

examples.sentence: If only I had more time.
If only we could help them.

ar.definition: ليت؛ تُستعمل في عبارة if only للتعبير عن أمنية قوية أو ندم

es.definition: ojalá; usado en la expresión if only para expresar un deseo fuerte o arrepentimiento

ja.definition: せめて〜ならいいのに；強い願い や 後悔を表す if only の形

pt-BR.definition: tomara que; usado na expressão if only para expressar um forte desejo ou arrependimento

zh-Hans.definition: 要是……就好了；用于 if only 表达强烈愿望或遗憾

confusable_words.note: Used for the number 1; unlike a/an, it emphasizes exact quantity.
Indefinite article, not the number itself in most uses.

senses.definition: the number 1; a single person or thing
senses.usage_note: Use one to talk about the number 1 or to stress a single person or thing.

examples.sentence: I have one sister.

ar.definition: الرقم واحد؛ شخص أو شيء واحد فقط

es.definition: el número 1; una sola persona o cosa

ja.definition: 数字の1；1人・1つ

pt-BR.definition: o número 1; uma única pessoa ou coisa

zh-Hans.definition: 一；一个；单个的人或事物

senses.definition: a single example of a group, often used instead of repeating a noun
senses.usage_note: As a pronoun, one can mean a single item or one member of a group.

ar.definition: واحد من مجموعة؛ ويستعمل أيضًا بدلًا من تكرار الاسم

es.definition: uno de un grupo; también se usa para evitar repetir un sustantivo

ja.definition: 一つのもの；また、名詞の繰り返しを避けるための代名詞

pt-BR.definition: um de um grupo; também usado para evitar repetir um substantivo

zh-Hans.definition: 其中一个；也可代替前面提到的单数名词

senses.definition: single, united, or the same rather than separate
senses.usage_note: This use describes unity or sameness, especially in phrases about people or things joining together.

examples.sentence: The two teams became one after the merger.

ar.definition: موحَّد أو واحد؛ غير منفصل

ja.definition: 一つの、統一された、同一の

pt-BR.definition: único, unido ou o mesmo, e não separado

zh-Hans.definition: 统一的；同一的；不是分开的

senses.definition: used as a modal verb to show ability, possibility, or permission
senses.usage_note: Very common modal verb for ability, permission, and general possibility.

examples.sentence: I can swim.

ar.definition: يُستعمل كفعل ناقص للدلالة على القدرة أو الإمكانية أو الإذن

pt-BR.definition: usado como verbo modal para indicar habilidade, possibilidade ou permissão

zh-Hans.definition: 用作情态动词，表示能力、可能性或许可

senses.definition: a metal container for food or drink
senses.usage_note: Usually refers to a sealed metal food or drink container.

examples.sentence: She opened a can of beans.
He drank a can of soda.
Put the empty cans in the recycling bin.

ar.definition: علبة معدنية للطعام أو الشراب

es.definition: recipiente metálico para comida o bebida

ja.definition: 食べ物や飲み物を入れる金属製の容器

pt-BR.definition: recipiente metálico para comida ou bebida

zh-Hans.definition: 装食物或饮料的金属罐

senses.definition: to preserve food by putting it into sealed cans or jars
senses.usage_note: This is a regular verb, different from the modal verb can.

pt-BR.definition: conservar alimentos colocando-os em latas ou potes fechados

confusable_words.note: Used for ability, permission, or possibility, not usually for future statements.

senses.definition: used with a verb to talk about the future

ar.definition: يُستخدم مع الفعل للحديث عن المستقبل

ja.definition: 未来について話すために動詞とともに使う

zh-Hans.definition: 与动词连用表示将来

senses.definition: used to express willingness, intention, or a request
senses.usage_note: Often used for promises, offers, and polite requests.

examples.sentence: I will help you with your homework.

ar.definition: يُستخدم للتعبير عن الاستعداد أو النية أو الطلب

senses.definition: used to express what is likely or generally expected to be true

ar.definition: يُستخدم للتعبير عما يُحتمل أو يُتوقع عمومًا أن يكون صحيحًا

senses.definition: the ability to control your actions and continue trying despite difficulty

ar.definition: القدرة على التحكم في أفعالك والاستمرار رغم الصعوبة

ja.definition: 困難があっても自分をコントロールし努力を続ける力

pt-BR.definition: a capacidade de controlar suas ações e continuar tentando apesar da dificuldade

zh-Hans.definition: 控制自己行为并在困难中坚持下去的能力

ar.definition: وثيقة قانونية تحدد من يجب أن يحصل على مال الشخص وممتلكاته بعد وفاته

confusable_words.note: already means earlier than now, not exactly at this moment

senses.definition: at this moment or very recently
grammar_patterns: just + past tense / present perfect in informal use

ar.definition: الآن تمامًا أو منذ وقت قصير جدًا

ja.definition: たった今、またはほんの少し前に

zh-Hans.definition: 刚刚；刚才

senses.definition: exactly, precisely, or by a very small amount
senses.usage_note: Often used to show exactness or a narrow margin.

ar.definition: تمامًا أو بدقة، أو بفارق صغير جدًا

ja.definition: ちょうど、まさに、またはほんの少しだけ

pt-BR.definition: exatamente, precisamente ou por uma quantidade muito pequena

senses.definition: only; no more than; simply
senses.usage_note: Very common in spoken and written English.

ar.definition: فقط؛ ليس أكثر من؛ ببساطة

senses.definition: used for emphasis, often to strengthen a statement or command

ar.definition: تُستعمل للتوكيد وتقوية العبارة أو الأمر

confusable_words.note: means 'love' and is usually stronger than like

senses.definition: to enjoy or feel positive about someone or something

examples.sentence: I like this song.

ar.definition: مثل؛ مشابه لـ أو من نفس النوع

pt-BR.definition: como; semelhante a ou do mesmo tipo que

zh-Hans.definition: 像；类似于；例如这一类的

senses.definition: used to politely say what you want or prefer

ar.definition: يُستعمل بطريقة مهذبة للتعبير عما تريده أو تفضله

confusable_words.note: used for movement to a place, not topic

senses.definition: on the subject of; concerning

examples.sentence: We talked about the trip.

ar.definition: حول؛ بشأن

pt-BR.definition: sobre; a respeito de

zh-Hans.definition: 关于；有关

ar.definition: حوالي؛ تقريبًا

pt-BR.definition: aproximadamente; cerca de

senses.definition: on the point of; going to happen very soon
senses.usage_note: This is a fixed grammar pattern: be about to + base verb.

examples.sentence: The movie is about to start.

ar.definition: على وشك

pt-BR.definition: prestes a

senses.definition: used to ask for someone or something, or to make a suggestion
