pt-BR.definition: acordado e fora da cama

zh-Hans.definition: 醒着的；已经起床的

senses.definition: at a higher level, amount, or intensity
senses.usage_note: Used for increases in amount, degree, or volume.

examples.sentence: Prices are up this year.
Can you turn the music up a little?

ar.definition: عند مستوى أو مقدار أو شدة أعلى

es.definition: a un nivel, cantidad o intensidad más altos

ja.definition: より高い水準・量・強さで

pt-BR.definition: em um nível, quantidade ou intensidade maior

zh-Hans.definition: 处于更高的水平、数量或强度

senses.definition: finished, ended, or ready for attention now
senses.usage_note: Common in fixed expressions about time, status, or scheduled attention.

examples.sentence: Time is up, so please stop writing.
The matter is up for discussion tomorrow.

ar.definition: منتهٍ أو انتهى أو جاهز للاهتمام الآن

es.definition: terminado, finalizado o listo para ser tratado ahora

ja.definition: 終わった、期限が来た、今扱われるべき状態の

pt-BR.definition: terminado, encerrado ou pronto para ser tratado agora

zh-Hans.definition: 结束的；到期的；现在要处理的

senses.definition: in informal speech, used to ask what is happening or how someone is
senses.usage_note: Very common informal use, especially in the greeting What's up?

examples.sentence: Hey, what's up?
You look worried. Is something up?

ar.definition: في الكلام غير الرسمي: يُستعمل للسؤال عما يحدث أو عن حال الشخص

es.definition: en habla informal, se usa para preguntar qué pasa o cómo está alguien

ja.definition: くだけた話し方で、何が起きているか、または相手の様子をたずねる表現

pt-BR.definition: na fala informal, usado para perguntar o que está acontecendo ou como alguém está

zh-Hans.definition: 非正式用法：用于问发生了什么或对方怎么样

confusable_words.note: means movement toward the inside
means away from this place, not specifically from inside to outside

senses.definition: in or to a position away from the inside of a place or container; outside
senses.usage_note: A very common adverb meaning outside or to the outside.

examples.sentence: The children are playing out in the garden.
She took the keys out of her bag.

ar.definition: في الخارج أو إلى الخارج، بعيدًا عن داخل مكان أو وعاء

es.definition: fuera o hacia afuera, no dentro de un lugar o recipiente

ja.definition: 外に、外へ、内側ではなく

pt-BR.definition: fora ou para fora, não dentro de um lugar ou recipiente

zh-Hans.definition: 在外面；向外；不在里面

senses.definition: not at home, not at work, or away from the usual place
senses.usage_note: Often used to say someone is absent from their usual place, or to describe going socially to another place.

examples.sentence: I'm sorry, Mr. Green is out right now.
We went out for dinner last night.

ar.definition: غير موجود في البيت أو العمل؛ خارج المكان المعتاد

es.definition: no estar en casa, en el trabajo o en el lugar habitual

ja.definition: 外出していてその場にいない

pt-BR.definition: fora de casa, do trabalho ou longe do lugar habitual

zh-Hans.definition: 外出；不在家；不在平常所在的地方

senses.definition: no longer burning, shining, operating, or available
senses.usage_note: Common with lights, fires, and equipment.

examples.sentence: All the lights were out when we got home.
The printer is out of service today.

ar.definition: منطفئ أو متوقف عن العمل أو غير متاح

es.definition: apagado, extinguido, fuera de funcionamiento o no disponible

ja.definition: 消えている、止まっている、使えない状態の

pt-BR.definition: apagado, extinto, fora de funcionamento ou indisponível

zh-Hans.definition: 熄灭的；停止运转的；不可用的

senses.definition: used up, no longer available, or not having any left
senses.usage_note: Very common in the pattern out of + noun.

examples.sentence: We're out of coffee.
That book is out of stock at the moment.

ar.definition: نافد أو غير متوفر أو لم يعد موجودًا

es.definition: agotado, no disponible o sin que quede nada

ja.definition: なくなった、品切れの、残っていない

pt-BR.definition: acabado, indisponível ou sem nada restante

zh-Hans.definition: 用完的；缺少的；缺货的

senses.definition: known, visible, or openly stated rather than secret or hidden
senses.usage_note: A useful broader sense covering information becoming public or someone being open about something.

examples.sentence: The news is finally out.
She is out about her political views.

ar.definition: معلن أو معروف أو غير سري

es.definition: conocido, público o dicho abiertamente, no en secreto

ja.definition: 公になっている、隠されていない、はっきり表明された

pt-BR.definition: conhecido, público ou declarado abertamente, não secreto

zh-Hans.definition: 公开的；已被知道的；不再保密的

confusable_words.note: used for people rather than things or information
asks to choose from a limited set

senses.definition: used to ask for information about a thing, idea, action, or situation
senses.usage_note: Common in direct and indirect questions.

examples.sentence: What is your name?
What happened yesterday?

ar.definition: يُستخدم للسؤال عن شيء أو فكرة أو فعل أو موقف

es.definition: se usa para preguntar por una cosa, idea, acción o situación

ja.definition: 物事・考え・行動・状況について情報をたずねるときに使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para perguntar sobre uma coisa, ideia, ação ou situação

zh-Hans.definition: 用于询问事物、想法、行为或情况的信息

senses.definition: used before a noun to ask for details or identity
senses.usage_note: Often interchangeable with a broader learner sense of question word before nouns, though which may be better for limited choices.

examples.sentence: What color do you like?
What book are you reading?

ar.definition: يُستخدم قبل الاسم للسؤال عن التفاصيل أو التحديد

es.definition: se usa antes de un sustantivo para preguntar por detalles o identidad

ja.definition: 名詞の前で、詳細やどれであるかをたずねるときに使う

pt-BR.definition: usado antes de um substantivo para perguntar por detalhes ou identidade

zh-Hans.definition: 放在名词前，用于询问细节或具体是哪一个

senses.definition: the thing or things that
senses.usage_note: This use combines the meaning of a relative word and its clause.

examples.sentence: I know what you mean.
Take what you need.

ar.definition: الشيء أو الأشياء التي

es.definition: la cosa o las cosas que

ja.definition: 〜するもの・こと

pt-BR.definition: a coisa ou as coisas que

zh-Hans.definition: 所……的事物；……的东西

senses.definition: used to introduce a clause that adds emphasis or comment on a whole statement
senses.usage_note: More common in formal speech and writing than in everyday conversation.

examples.sentence: He lost his keys and, what is worse, his phone.
She refused to help, which was what surprised me most.

ar.definition: يُستخدم لبدء جملة تضيف تأكيدًا أو تعليقًا على الكلام كله

es.definition: se usa para introducir una oración que añade énfasis o comentario sobre toda una afirmación

ja.definition: 文全体への強調やコメントを加える節を導くのに使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para introduzir uma oração que acrescenta ênfase ou comentário sobre toda a afirmação

zh-Hans.definition: 用于引出一个分句，对整个陈述进行强调或评论

confusable_words.note: asks about a place, not a time
asks about a reason, not a time

senses.definition: used to ask about the time, occasion, or situation in which something happens or happened
senses.usage_note: Common question word for time.

examples.sentence: When is your birthday?
When did you arrive?

ar.definition: متى: تُستعمل للسؤال عن الوقت أو المناسبة التي يحدث فيها شيء

es.definition: cuándo: se usa para preguntar por el momento o la ocasión en que ocurre algo

ja.definition: いつ：物事が起こる時点や機会をたずねるときに使う

pt-BR.definition: quando: usado para perguntar em que momento ou ocasião algo acontece

zh-Hans.definition: 什么时候：用于询问某事发生的时间或时刻

senses.definition: used to introduce a clause showing the time at which something happens or happened
senses.usage_note: Very common for time clauses.

examples.sentence: Call me when you get home.
I was cooking when the phone rang.

ar.definition: عندما: تُستعمل لربط جملة بوقت حدوث شيء

es.definition: cuando: se usa para introducir una oración que indica el momento en que ocurre algo

ja.definition: ～するときに：何かが起こる時を示す節を導く

pt-BR.definition: quando: usado para introduzir uma oração que mostra o momento em que algo acontece

zh-Hans.definition: 当……时候：用于引导表示某事发生时间的从句

senses.definition: used after a noun referring to time to introduce more information about that time
senses.usage_note: Learners often meet this in relative clauses after time nouns.

examples.sentence: Do you remember the day when we met?
There are times when I need to be alone.

ar.definition: حينَ/الذي فيه: تُستعمل بعد اسم يدل على الزمن لإضافة معلومات عنه

es.definition: cuando: se usa después de un sustantivo de tiempo para añadir información sobre ese momento

ja.definition: ～したときの：時を表す名詞のあとで、その時について説明を加える

pt-BR.definition: quando: usado depois de um substantivo de tempo para acrescentar informação sobre esse momento

zh-Hans.definition: ……的时候：用于时间名词后，进一步说明那个时间

senses.definition: used in the phrase 'when it comes to' to mean 'speaking about' or 'in the case of'
senses.usage_note: Best learned as a fixed expression.

examples.sentence: When it comes to cooking, she's an expert.
He becomes very careful when it comes to money.

ar.definition: فيما يتعلق بـ: تُستعمل في عبارة when it comes to بمعنى عند الحديث عن أو في ما يخص

es.definition: cuando se trata de: expresión que significa con respecto a o en el caso de

ja.definition: ～のこととなると：『when it comes to』で、～について言えば、～の点では、という意味

pt-BR.definition: quando se trata de: expressão que significa em relação a ou no caso de

zh-Hans.definition: 当谈到……时；在……方面：用于 when it comes to，表示说到或涉及

confusable_words.note: used with countable plural nouns
used with uncountable nouns

senses.definition: a larger amount, number, or degree
senses.usage_note: Very common word used before nouns and with adjectives or adverbs to show a greater amount or degree.

examples.sentence: I need more time to finish my homework.
We need more chairs for the guests.

ar.definition: مقدار أو عدد أو درجة أكبر

es.definition: una cantidad, número o grado mayor

ja.definition: より多い量・数・程度

pt-BR.definition: uma quantidade, número ou grau maior

zh-Hans.definition: 更多的数量、人数或程度

senses.definition: to a greater degree or amount
senses.usage_note: Common adverb meaning ‘to a greater extent’.

examples.sentence: She should sleep more.
I like this one more than the other one.

ar.definition: بدرجة أو مقدار أكبر

es.definition: en mayor grado o cantidad

ja.definition: より多く、より強く

pt-BR.definition: em maior grau ou quantidade

zh-Hans.definition: 更多地；更大程度地

senses.definition: an additional amount or number
senses.usage_note: Used as a pronoun when the noun is understood from context.

examples.sentence: Would you like some more?

ar.definition: كمية أو عدد إضافي

es.definition: una cantidad o número adicional

ja.definition: さらに多くのもの・量

pt-BR.definition: uma quantidade ou número adicional

zh-Hans.definition: 更多的东西；额外的数量

senses.definition: again; one additional time
senses.usage_note: Usually appears in fixed expressions such as once more or two more times.

examples.sentence: Could you say that once more?
He checked the answer more before sending it.

ar.definition: مرة أخرى؛ مرة إضافية

es.definition: otra vez; una vez adicional

ja.definition: もう一度；さらに一回

pt-BR.definition: novamente; mais uma vez

zh-Hans.definition: 再一次；又一次

confusable_words.note: often means create or make something new, while do often means perform a task or activity

senses.definition: to perform an action, task, or activity
senses.usage_note: A very common general verb for actions and tasks.

examples.sentence: I have to do my homework tonight.
She does the dishes after dinner.

ar.definition: يقوم بعمل أو مهمة أو نشاط

es.definition: realizar una acción, tarea o actividad

ja.definition: 行動・仕事・活動をする

pt-BR.definition: realizar uma ação, tarefa ou atividade

zh-Hans.definition: 做；进行（动作、任务或活动）

senses.definition: to be successful or satisfactory in a situation
senses.usage_note: Common in patterns like do well and do badly.

examples.sentence: He did well on the test.
Our team is doing fine this season.

ar.definition: يكون أداؤه جيدًا أو مرضيًا في موقف ما

es.definition: tener un buen o mal resultado en una situación

ja.definition: ある状況でうまくいく、良い成績を出す

pt-BR.definition: ter bom desempenho ou resultado em uma situação

zh-Hans.definition: （在某种情况下）表现良好；进展不错

senses.definition: to be enough or acceptable for a purpose
senses.usage_note: Often used to say something is acceptable, even if not perfect.

examples.sentence: This small table will do for now.
A sandwich will do if you're not very hungry.

ar.definition: يكفي أو يكون مناسبًا لغرض ما

es.definition: ser suficiente o aceptable para un propósito

ja.definition: 目的に対して十分である、間に合う

pt-BR.definition: ser suficiente ou aceitável para um propósito

zh-Hans.definition: 够用；合适；行

senses.definition: used as an auxiliary verb to form questions, negatives, and emphatic statements
senses.usage_note: Important grammar use for learners; includes question, negative, and emphasis patterns.

examples.sentence: Do you like coffee?
I do not understand this question.

ar.definition: فعل مساعد يُستخدم في تكوين الأسئلة والنفي والتوكيد

es.definition: verbo auxiliar usado para formar preguntas, negaciones y énfasis

ja.definition: 疑問文・否定文・強調を作るための助動詞

pt-BR.definition: verbo auxiliar usado para formar perguntas, negativas e ênfase

zh-Hans.definition: 助动词，用于构成疑问句、否定句和强调

confusable_words.note: Used to agree or permit something; opposite meaning.

senses.definition: used to give a negative answer or to refuse something
senses.usage_note: A very common way to refuse, disagree, or answer negatively.

examples.sentence: She asked me to go, but I said no.
The answer is no.

ar.definition: تُستعمل لإعطاء إجابة سلبية أو لرفض شيء

es.definition: se usa para dar una respuesta negativa o rechazar algo

ja.definition: 否定の返事をしたり、何かを断ったりするときに使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para dar uma resposta negativa ou recusar algo

zh-Hans.definition: 用于作否定回答或拒绝某事

senses.definition: not any; not one; used before a noun to show that something does not exist or is absent
senses.usage_note: Common before singular or plural nouns: no idea, no shoes, no people.

examples.sentence: I have no money.
There is no milk in the fridge.

ar.definition: لا أيّ؛ ولا واحد؛ تُستعمل قبل الاسم للدلالة على عدم وجود شيء أو غيابه

es.definition: ningún; ni uno; se usa antes de un sustantivo para mostrar que algo no existe o está ausente

ja.definition: 少しもない、ひとつもない；名詞の前で、存在しない・ないことを表す

pt-BR.definition: nenhum; nem um; usado antes de um substantivo para mostrar que algo não existe ou está ausente

zh-Hans.definition: 没有；一个也没有；用于名词前表示某物不存在或缺少

senses.definition: used on signs and notices to show that something is not allowed or not available
senses.usage_note: Often seen in fixed sign phrases such as No Smoking and No Entry.

examples.sentence: The sign says No Parking.
There is a big No Entry sign on the door.

ar.definition: تُستعمل على اللافتات والإشعارات للدلالة على أن شيئًا ما غير مسموح أو غير متاح

es.definition: se usa en señales y avisos para indicar que algo no está permitido o no está disponible

ja.definition: 標識や注意書きで、何かが禁止されている、または利用できないことを示す

pt-BR.definition: usado em placas e avisos para mostrar que algo não é permitido ou não está disponível

zh-Hans.definition: 用于标志和告示，表示某事不被允许或不可用

senses.definition: an abbreviation of number used before figures in writing
senses.usage_note: Usually written as No. with a period in formal written contexts.

examples.sentence: Please write your passport No. on the form.

ar.definition: اختصار لكلمة رقم ويُستعمل قبل الأعداد في الكتابة

es.definition: abreviatura de número usada antes de cifras por escrito

ja.definition: 書き言葉で数字の前に使う number の略

pt-BR.definition: abreviação de número usada antes de algarismos na escrita

zh-Hans.definition: 书面中用于数字前的 number 的缩写

confusable_words.note: used for things, not people
used to ask about person as subject or object in less formal speech, but 'who' is standard for people

senses.definition: used in questions to ask what person or what people
senses.usage_note: Use 'who' to ask about people, especially as the subject of a question.

examples.sentence: Who is at the door?
Who won the game?

ar.definition: مَن؛ تُستعمل في الأسئلة للسؤال عن الشخص أو الأشخاص

es.definition: quién; se usa en preguntas para preguntar por una persona o personas

ja.definition: だれ；人がだれかをたずねる疑問語

pt-BR.definition: quem; usado em perguntas para saber que pessoa ou pessoas

zh-Hans.definition: 谁；用于提问某人或哪些人

senses.definition: used to introduce a clause giving more information about a person or people
senses.usage_note: In relative clauses, 'who' refers to people and often acts as the subject of the clause.

examples.sentence: The woman who lives next door is a doctor.
I like people who are honest.

ar.definition: الذي / التي / الذين؛ تُستعمل لبدء جملة صلة تعطي معلومات إضافية عن شخص أو أشخاص

es.definition: que / quien; usado para introducir una oración relativa sobre una persona o personas

ja.definition: ～する人；人について追加情報を示す関係節を導く語

pt-BR.definition: que / quem; usado para introduzir uma oração que dá mais informação sobre uma pessoa ou pessoas

zh-Hans.definition: ……的人；用于引导关系从句，补充说明某人或某些人

senses.definition: used before an infinitive to talk about what person should or can be involved in an action
senses.usage_note: This structure is common after verbs like know, decide, ask, and choose.

examples.sentence: I do not know who to ask.
She could not decide who to invite.

ar.definition: مَن؛ تُستعمل قبل المصدر مع to للحديث عن الشخص الذي ينبغي أو يمكن إشراكه في الفعل

es.definition: quién; usado antes de un infinitivo para hablar de qué persona debe o puede participar en una acción

ja.definition: だれに～すべきか；to不定詞の前で、行為に関わる人を表す

pt-BR.definition: quem; usado antes de infinitivo para falar sobre que pessoa deve ou pode estar envolvida numa ação

zh-Hans.definition: 谁；用于不定式前，表示应该或可以对谁做某事

confusable_words.note: Possessive form of they; often used before a noun.
Contraction of there are.
Refers to place or existence, not possession.

senses.definition: belonging to or connected with people, animals, or things already mentioned or understood
senses.usage_note: Used before a noun to show possession by more than one person or by people/things already identified.

examples.sentence: Their house is very old.
The children put on their coats.

ar.definition: خاصّ بهم أو مرتبط بهم أو بها، ويأتي قبل الاسم

es.definition: que pertenece o está relacionado con ellos, ellas o con cosas mencionadas

ja.definition: すでに話題に出た人・動物・物の『彼らの／彼女らの／それらの』

pt-BR.definition: que pertence ou se relaciona a eles, elas ou coisas já mencionadas

zh-Hans.definition: 他们的；她们的；它们的；指前面提到的人、动物或事物所属

senses.definition: used with a singular indefinite person to avoid saying his or her
senses.usage_note: Very common in modern English with singular words like everyone, someone, each person, or a person whose gender is unknown or irrelevant.

examples.sentence: Every student should bring their ID card.
Someone left their phone on the table.

ar.definition: يُستخدم مع مرجع مفرد غير محدد لتجنب قول: خاصته أو خاصتها

es.definition: se usa con una persona singular e indefinida para evitar decir his or her

ja.definition: 性別を特定しない単数の人について『その人の』の意味で使う

pt-BR.definition: usado com uma pessoa singular indefinida para evitar dizer his or her

zh-Hans.definition: 用于泛指单数的人，避免使用 his or her，表示“某人的”

confusable_words.note: used to indicate place, not existence
often confused in spelling
often confused in spelling

senses.definition: used to say that something exists or happens
senses.usage_note: This is the common existential use in patterns like there is and there are.

examples.sentence: There is a book on the table.
There were many people at the concert.

ar.definition: تُستعمل للدلالة على وجود شيء أو حدوثه

es.definition: se usa para decir que algo existe o sucede

ja.definition: 何かが存在することや起こることを示すのに使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para dizer que algo existe ou acontece

zh-Hans.definition: 用于表示某物存在或某事发生

senses.definition: in or at that place
senses.usage_note: Use this to point to a place, often contrasted with here.

examples.sentence: Your bag is over there.
We stopped there for lunch.

ar.definition: في ذلك المكان أو إلى ذلك المكان

es.definition: en ese lugar o a ese lugar

ja.definition: あの場所に／あの場所で

pt-BR.definition: naquele lugar; para aquele lugar

zh-Hans.definition: 在那里；到那里

senses.definition: used when drawing attention to something or someone that has appeared or been found
senses.usage_note: This attention-drawing use is common in speech.

examples.sentence: There is the bus we were waiting for.
Ah, there are my keys!

ar.definition: تُستعمل للفت الانتباه إلى شيء أو شخص ظهر أو تم العثور عليه

es.definition: se usa para llamar la atención sobre algo o alguien que apareció o fue encontrado

ja.definition: 現れたり見つかったりした物や人に注意を向けるときに使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para chamar atenção para algo ou alguém que apareceu ou foi encontrado

zh-Hans.definition: 用于提醒别人注意刚出现或被找到的人或物

confusable_words.note: possessive adjective before a noun
possessive pronoun used without a noun in some contexts is usually 'hers'
object form for a male person
subject form, not object form

senses.definition: used as the object form of 'she' to refer to a girl, woman, or female animal
senses.usage_note: Use 'her' after a verb or preposition, not as the subject of a clause.

examples.sentence: I saw her at the station.
Please give her the message.

ar.definition: تُستخدم بوصفها صيغة المفعول من 'هي' للإشارة إلى فتاة أو امرأة أو حيوان أنثى.

es.definition: se usa como la forma de objeto de 'she' para referirse a una niña, mujer o animal hembra

ja.definition: 女性や雌の動物を指す、'she' の目的格として使う

pt-BR.definition: usado como a forma de objeto de 'she' para se referir a uma menina, mulher ou animal fêmea

zh-Hans.definition: 用作 she 的宾格，指女孩、女人或雌性动物

senses.definition: belonging to or associated with a girl, woman, or female animal
senses.usage_note: As a determiner, 'her' comes before a noun.

examples.sentence: Her car is outside.
I know her sister.

ar.definition: يخصّ فتاة أو امرأة أو حيوانًا أنثى أو يرتبط به.

es.definition: que pertenece o está asociado a una niña, mujer o animal hembra

ja.definition: 女性や雌の動物の所有・関係を表す

pt-BR.definition: que pertence a uma menina, mulher ou animal fêmea ou está associado a ela

zh-Hans.definition: 表示属于某个女孩、女人或雌性动物，或与其有关的

confusable_words.note: used for people, not things, in questions
used for places in questions

senses.definition: used in questions to ask about one person or thing from a limited set
senses.usage_note: Use when the speaker expects a choice from a known or limited group.

examples.sentence: Which jacket do you want?
Which of these answers is correct?

ar.definition: أيّ؛ يُستعمل في الأسئلة للسؤال عن شخص أو شيء واحد من بين مجموعة محددة

es.definition: qué; cuál; se usa en preguntas para preguntar por una persona o cosa dentro de un conjunto limitado

ja.definition: どの；限られた選択肢の中の人や物をたずねるときに使う

pt-BR.definition: qual; usado em perguntas para saber qual pessoa ou coisa entre um conjunto limitado

zh-Hans.definition: 哪一个；哪一；用于提问，在有限范围中选择人或事物

senses.definition: used as a relative pronoun to add information about an animal, thing, or whole clause
senses.usage_note: In defining clauses, 'that' is often possible; after a comma, use 'which', not 'that'.

examples.sentence: The bike which I bought is very light.
She missed the train, which made her late.

ar.definition: الذي / التي / مما؛ يُستعمل كضمير موصول لإضافة معلومات عن شيء أو حيوان أو عن جملة كاملة

es.definition: que; el cual; se usa como pronombre relativo para añadir información sobre un animal, una cosa o toda una oración

ja.definition: 〜するところの；〜である…；物・動物・前の文全体について情報を付け加える関係代名詞

pt-BR.definition: que; o qual; usado como pronome relativo para acrescentar informação sobre animal, coisa ou a oração inteira

zh-Hans.definition: ……的；用于关系从句，补充说明事物、动物或前面整个句子

senses.definition: used after a preposition in relative clauses
senses.usage_note: Common in formal writing: 'in which', 'for which', 'about which'.

examples.sentence: This is the room in which we met.
The topic about which they argued was money.

ar.definition: الذي / التي بعد حرف جر؛ يُستعمل بعد حروف الجر في الجمل الموصولة

es.definition: el cual / la cual / que después de preposición; se usa tras una preposición en oraciones de relativo

ja.definition: 前置詞の後の which；関係節で前置詞の後に置いて使う

pt-BR.definition: o qual / a qual / que após preposição; usado depois de preposição em orações relativas

zh-Hans.definition: 用于介词后面的 which；在关系从句中接在介词后

confusable_words.note: clock is the device; time is the measurement or period
hour is a unit of time, not the general concept

senses.definition: the thing that is measured in minutes, hours, days, and years, or a particular point in it
senses.usage_note: A very common word used for both abstract time and a specific time of day.

examples.sentence: What time is it now?
I don't have much time today.

ar.definition: الوقت؛ الشيء الذي يُقاس بالدقائق والساعات والأيام والسنوات، أو لحظة محددة فيه

es.definition: tiempo; lo que se mide en minutos, horas, días y años, o un momento concreto dentro de él

ja.definition: 時間、時刻；分・時間・日・年で測られるもの、またはその中のある時点

pt-BR.definition: tempo; aquilo que é medido em minutos, horas, dias e anos, ou um momento específico dentro dele

zh-Hans.definition: 时间；以分钟、小时、天和年计量的东西，或其中某个具体时刻

senses.definition: an occasion or period when you do something or when something happens, especially an enjoyable one
senses.usage_note: Often used in expressions like have a good time, first time, and next time.

examples.sentence: We had a great time at the beach.
The first time I met her, she was very friendly.

ar.definition: مرة أو مناسبة أو فترة يحدث فيها شيء، وخاصة إذا كانت ممتعة

es.definition: ocasión o período en que haces algo o sucede algo, especialmente si es agradable

ja.definition: 何かをしたり何かが起こったりする時・機会、特に楽しいもの

pt-BR.definition: ocasião ou período em que você faz algo ou algo acontece, especialmente algo agradável

zh-Hans.definition: 次数；某事发生或进行的一次场合或一段经历，尤指愉快的经历

senses.definition: an instance of an action or event, used when counting how often something happens
senses.usage_note: Common in counting expressions such as three times and many times.

examples.sentence: I've seen that movie three times.
She calls her mother twice a week, sometimes three times.

ar.definition: مرة؛ حالة من وقوع فعل أو حدث تُستخدم لعدّ عدد المرات

es.definition: vez; una ocasión en que ocurre una acción o un hecho, usada para contar frecuencia

ja.definition: 回、度；行為や出来事が起こる一回分で、回数を数えるときに使う

pt-BR.definition: vez; uma ocorrência de uma ação ou evento, usada para contar frequência

zh-Hans.definition: 次；动作或事件发生的一次，用于计算频率

senses.definition: a period in history or in a person's life when things are a particular way
senses.usage_note: Often appears in plural to talk about historical or social periods.

examples.sentence: People traveled differently in ancient times.
These are difficult times for many families.

ar.definition: زمن أو فترة في التاريخ أو في حياة شخص تكون فيها الأمور على نحو معين

es.definition: época o período de la historia o de la vida de una persona en que las cosas son de cierta manera

ja.definition: 時代、時期；歴史上または人生において物事がある状態にある期間

pt-BR.definition: época ou período na história ou na vida de uma pessoa em que as coisas são de certa maneira

zh-Hans.definition: 时代，时期；历史上或人生中具有某种特点的一段时间

senses.definition: to measure how long something takes, or to choose the moment when something should happen
senses.usage_note: As a verb, time means either measure duration or choose a suitable moment.

examples.sentence: The coach timed the runners with a stopwatch.
She timed her question carefully so she wouldn't interrupt.

ar.definition: يُوقّت؛ يقيس المدة التي يستغرقها شيء ما، أو يختار اللحظة المناسبة لحدوث شيء

es.definition: cronometrar; medir cuánto tarda algo, o elegir el momento en que algo debe ocurrir

ja.definition: 時間を計る；また、何かが起こるタイミングを決める

pt-BR.definition: cronometrar; medir quanto tempo algo leva, ou escolher o momento em que algo deve acontecer

zh-Hans.definition: 计时；测量某事所花时间，或选择某事发生的时机

confusable_words.note: often means receiving something from someone or somewhere
often means buying after choosing and paying
often means physically taking and bringing

senses.definition: to obtain, receive, or buy something
senses.usage_note: A very common everyday verb with a broad meaning. In American English, the past participle is often 'gotten'; in British English, 'got' is often used.

examples.sentence: I need to get some milk after work.
She got a birthday card from her friend.

ar.definition: يَحصُل على شيء أو يَستلمه أو يَشتريه

es.definition: obtener, recibir o comprar algo

ja.definition: 何かを手に入れる、受け取る、買う

pt-BR.definition: obter, receber ou comprar algo

zh-Hans.definition: 得到；收到；买到

senses.definition: to arrive at a place or move to a place
senses.usage_note: Often used with 'to' before nouns for places, but not before home, here, or there.

examples.sentence: What time did you get home?
We got to the station just before the train left.

ar.definition: يصل إلى مكان أو ينتقل إليه

es.definition: llegar a un lugar o ir a un lugar

ja.definition: 場所に着く、場所へ行く

pt-BR.definition: chegar a um lugar ou ir para um lugar

zh-Hans.definition: 到达；去到

senses.definition: to become or start to be in a particular state or condition
senses.usage_note: Very common before adjectives: get old, get sick, get better.

examples.sentence: It's getting cold outside.
He got angry when he saw the mess.

ar.definition: يُصبح أو يبدأ في أن يكون في حالة معيّنة

es.definition: volverse o empezar a estar en un estado o condición

ja.definition: ある状態になる、そうなり始める

pt-BR.definition: ficar, tornar-se ou começar a estar em certo estado

zh-Hans.definition: 变得；开始处于某种状态

senses.definition: to have the chance, permission, or possibility to do something
senses.usage_note: Often expresses something positive or special: 'I get to travel for work.'

examples.sentence: Do we get to ask questions at the end?
She didn't get to see her brother last weekend.

ar.definition: تتاح له الفرصة أو الإذن أو الإمكانية لفعل شيء

es.definition: tener la oportunidad, el permiso o la posibilidad de hacer algo

ja.definition: 何かをする機会・許可・可能性がある

pt-BR.definition: ter a chance, permissão ou possibilidade de fazer algo

zh-Hans.definition: 有机会；获准；能够做某事

senses.definition: to cause someone to do something, or to arrange for something to be done
senses.usage_note: Useful learner pattern: get someone to do something / get something done.

examples.sentence: Can you get Tom to call me?
I need to get my phone repaired.

ar.definition: يجعل شخصًا يفعل شيئًا أو يرتّب لإنجاز شيء

es.definition: hacer que alguien haga algo o arreglar que algo se haga

ja.definition: 人に何かをさせる、または何かをしてもらうよう手配する

pt-BR.definition: fazer alguém fazer algo ou providenciar que algo seja feito

zh-Hans.definition: 让某人做某事；安排某事被完成

confusable_words.note: more direct and less polite in requests or statements of desire

senses.definition: used to express a polite wish, request, or preference
senses.usage_note: Common in polite offers, requests, and expressions of preference.

examples.sentence: I would like a cup of tea, please.
Would you open the window?

ar.definition: يُستعمل للتعبير بأدب عن رغبة أو طلب أو تفضيل

es.definition: se usa para expresar un deseo, una petición o una preferencia de manera cortés

ja.definition: 丁寧な希望・依頼・好みを表すのに使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para expressar desejo, pedido ou preferência de forma educada

zh-Hans.definition: 用于礼貌地表达愿望、请求或偏好

senses.definition: used to talk about actions that happened repeatedly in the past
grammar_patterns: In the past, ... would + base verb
senses.usage_note: Used for repeated past actions, especially in storytelling.

examples.sentence: Every summer, we would visit our grandparents.
After dinner, he would sit by the fire and read.

ar.definition: يُستعمل للحديث عن أفعال كانت تتكرر في الماضي

es.definition: se usa para hablar de acciones que ocurrían repetidamente en el pasado

ja.definition: 過去に繰り返し起こった行動を表すのに使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para falar de ações que aconteciam repetidamente no passado

zh-Hans.definition: 用于谈论过去经常重复发生的动作

senses.definition: used to talk about what may happen in an imagined situation or as the result of a condition
senses.usage_note: A core modal for hypothetical meanings and conditional results.

examples.sentence: I would travel more if I had more money.
That would be great.

ar.definition: يُستعمل للحديث عما قد يحدث في موقف متخيَّل أو كنتيجة لشرط

es.definition: se usa para hablar de lo que podría pasar en una situación imaginada o como resultado de una condición

ja.definition: 仮定の状況や条件の結果として何が起こるかを述べるのに使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para falar do que pode acontecer em uma situação imaginada ou como resultado de uma condição

zh-Hans.definition: 用于谈论假设情境中可能发生的事或某个条件导致的结果

senses.definition: used as the past form of will in reported speech or from a past point of view
senses.usage_note: Very common in reported speech and future-in-the-past contexts.

examples.sentence: She said she would call me later.
I knew it would rain.

ar.definition: يُستعمل بوصفه صيغة الماضي من will في الكلام المنقول أو عند النظر إلى المستقبل من نقطة زمنية في الماضي

es.definition: se usa como forma pasada de will en estilo indirecto o desde un punto de vista pasado

ja.definition: 間接話法や過去の時点から見た未来で、will の過去形として使う

pt-BR.definition: usado como forma passada de will no discurso indireto ou a partir de um ponto de vista no passado

zh-Hans.definition: 用作 will 的过去式，表示转述的话或从过去时间点看未来

senses.definition: used to make a likely guess or to describe behavior that is typical or expected
senses.usage_note: Less basic than other senses, but useful for common inferential and characteristic uses.

examples.sentence: That would be John at the door.
She would say that, wouldn't she?

ar.definition: يُستعمل للتخمين المرجح أو لوصف سلوك نموذجي أو متوقَّع

es.definition: se usa para hacer una suposición probable o para describir un comportamiento típico o esperado

ja.definition: もっともらしい推量をしたり、その人らしい・予想される行動を述べたりするのに使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para fazer uma suposição provável ou descrever um comportamento típico ou esperado

zh-Hans.definition: 用于作出较有把握的猜测，或描述某人典型、意料之中的行为

confusable_words.note: object form, used after verbs or prepositions
used for a male person or animal
used for non-people, animals, or ideas in general

senses.definition: used to refer to a girl, woman, or female person or animal that has already been mentioned or is known from context
senses.usage_note: This is a subject pronoun. Use her, not she, as the object: I saw her.

examples.sentence: Maria is my sister. She lives in London.
I saw the cat, and she ran into the garden.

ar.definition: تُستعمل للإشارة إلى فتاة أو امرأة أو أنثى سبق ذكرها أو تكون معروفة من السياق

es.definition: se usa para referirse a una niña, mujer o animal hembra ya mencionado o conocido por el contexto

ja.definition: すでに話に出た、または文脈で分かる女の子・女性・雌の動物を指して使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para se referir a uma menina, mulher ou animal fêmea já mencionado ou conhecido pelo contexto

zh-Hans.definition: 用于指代前文提到的或根据语境已知的女孩、女人或雌性动物

senses.definition: used in some styles of English to refer to a thing such as a ship, country, or machine as if it were female
senses.usage_note: This use is less common and can sound literary, traditional, or old-fashioned depending on context.

examples.sentence: The ship is old, but she is still strong.
England hopes she will win the match.

ar.definition: تُستعمل في بعض أساليب الإنجليزية للإشارة إلى شيء مثل السفينة أو الدولة أو الآلة كما لو كان مؤنثًا

es.definition: se usa en algunos estilos de inglés para referirse a una cosa, como un barco, un país o una máquina, como si fuera femenina

ja.definition: 英語の一部の文体で、船・国・機械などを女性のように指して使う

pt-BR.definition: usado em alguns estilos de inglês para se referir a algo como navio, país ou máquina como se fosse feminino

zh-Hans.definition: 在某些英语文体中，用来把船、国家或机器等事物当作女性来指代

confusable_words.note: means not old or not previously used
means old but still in good condition or not often used

senses.definition: recently made, built, bought, or obtained; not old or used before
senses.usage_note: A very common basic meaning for objects, clothes, technology, places, and possessions.

examples.sentence: She bought a new phone yesterday.
We moved into a new house.

ar.definition: جديد؛ صُنِع أو اشتُري حديثًا ولم يُستعمل من قبل

es.definition: nuevo; hecho, comprado u obtenido recientemente; no usado antes

ja.definition: 新しい；最近作られた、買われた、または以前使われていない

pt-BR.definition: novo; feito, comprado ou obtido recentemente; não usado antes

zh-Hans.definition: 新的；新买的，新做的，未使用过的

senses.definition: starting to exist or starting recently in a place, role, or situation
senses.usage_note: Often used for people, jobs, systems, students, teachers, and activities that have just started.

examples.sentence: He started a new job last week.
I'm new at this school.

ar.definition: جديد؛ بدأ مؤخرًا أو انضم حديثًا إلى مكان أو دور أو حالة

es.definition: nuevo; que empieza a existir o empezó hace poco en un lugar, puesto o situación

ja.definition: 新しい；場所・役割・状況で最近始まったばかりの

pt-BR.definition: novo; que começou a existir ou começou recentemente em um lugar, função ou situação

zh-Hans.definition: 新的；刚开始的，刚来到某处或刚进入某种角色的

senses.definition: not known, seen, or experienced before
senses.usage_note: Useful with abstract nouns such as ideas, information, methods, and experiences.

examples.sentence: The book gave me new ideas.
Traveling alone was a new experience for her.

ar.definition: جديد؛ غير معروف أو غير مُجرَّب من قبل

es.definition: nuevo; no conocido, visto o experimentado antes

ja.definition: 新しい；以前は知らなかった、見たことがない、経験したことがない

pt-BR.definition: novo; não conhecido, visto ou experimentado antes

zh-Hans.definition: 新的；以前不知道、没见过或没经历过的

senses.definition: different from an earlier one because it has been changed, improved, or updated
senses.usage_note: Often overlaps with 'latest' and 'modern', but here the focus is on replacement or update.

examples.sentence: This app has a new version now.
Doctors are using new methods to treat the disease.

ar.definition: جديد؛ مختلف عن السابق لأنه تم تغييره أو تحسينه أو تحديثه

es.definition: nuevo; diferente de uno anterior porque ha sido cambiado, mejorado o actualizado

ja.definition: 新しい；以前のものから変更・改良・更新された

pt-BR.definition: novo; diferente de um anterior porque foi mudado, melhorado ou atualizado

zh-Hans.definition: 新的；与以前不同，因为经过了改变、改进或更新

senses.definition: human beings in general, or persons considered as a group
senses.usage_note: Common everyday noun. Usually takes a plural verb: people are, people want.

examples.sentence: Cars should stop to let people cross the road.
Technology can help people live more comfortably.

ar.definition: الناس عموماً؛ البشر بوصفهم مجموعة

es.definition: las personas en general; los seres humanos como grupo

ja.definition: 人々、一般の人間

pt-BR.definition: as pessoas em geral; os seres humanos como grupo

zh-Hans.definition: 人们；人类；作为群体的人

senses.definition: the men, women, and children of a particular country, area, or group
senses.usage_note: Use this sense for a nation's or community's population, not for one individual.

examples.sentence: The festival celebrates the history of the local people.
The island's people have a strong tradition of fishing.

ar.definition: سكان بلد أو منطقة أو جماعة معيّنة

es.definition: los habitantes de un país, una zona o un grupo determinado

ja.definition: ある国・地域・集団の人々、民族

pt-BR.definition: os habitantes de um país, região ou grupo específico

zh-Hans.definition: 某个国家、地区或群体的人民；民族

senses.definition: used to ask about the way, condition, amount, degree, or result of something
senses.usage_note: This is the main question word for asking about manner, degree, quantity, or condition.

examples.sentence: How are you today?
How old is your sister?
How did you open the door?

ar.definition: تُستخدم للسؤال عن الطريقة أو الحالة أو الكمية أو الدرجة أو النتيجة

es.definition: se usa para preguntar por la manera, el estado, la cantidad, el grado o el resultado de algo

ja.definition: 方法、状態、量、程度、結果などをたずねるのに使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para perguntar sobre a maneira, condição, quantidade, grau ou resultado de algo

zh-Hans.definition: 用于询问方式、状态、数量、程度或结果

senses.definition: used before an infinitive to talk about the way to do something
senses.usage_note: Common in statements about knowledge or instruction, not only direct questions.

examples.sentence: She taught me how to cook rice.
Do you know how to use this app?

ar.definition: تُستخدم قبل المصدر مع to للحديث عن طريقة فعل شيء ما

es.definition: se usa antes de un infinitivo para hablar de la manera de hacer algo

ja.definition: 不定詞の前で、何かをする方法を表すのに使う

pt-BR.definition: usado antes de um infinitivo para falar da maneira de fazer algo

zh-Hans.definition: 用于不定式前，表示做某事的方法

senses.definition: used in exclamations to show a strong feeling about degree or quality
senses.usage_note: In exclamations, how does not ask a question; it emphasizes a quality or degree.

examples.sentence: How beautiful this place is!
How quickly time passes!

ar.definition: تُستخدم في التعجب لإظهار شعور قوي بشأن الدرجة أو الصفة

es.definition: se usa en exclamaciones para mostrar un sentimiento fuerte sobre el grado o la cualidad

ja.definition: 程度や性質について強い感情を表す感嘆文で使う

pt-BR.definition: usado em exclamações para mostrar um sentimento forte sobre grau ou qualidade

zh-Hans.definition: 用于感叹句，表示对程度或性质的强烈感受

confusable_words.note: used in questions and negatives more often than 'some'

senses.definition: an unspecified amount or number of people or things
senses.usage_note: Common in affirmative statements and often in offers and requests; compare with 'any' in negatives and many questions.

examples.sentence: Can I have some water?
Some people arrived early.

ar.definition: كمية أو عدد غير محدد من الأشخاص أو الأشياء

es.definition: una cantidad o número no especificado de personas o cosas

ja.definition: 数量や人数がはっきりしない、いくらかの

pt-BR.definition: uma quantidade ou número não especificado de pessoas ou coisas

zh-Hans.definition: 一些；若干；某些（数量或人数不明确）

senses.definition: an unspecified person, thing, time, place, or reason
senses.usage_note: Often used when the speaker cannot or does not want to be specific.

examples.sentence: Some day I want to visit Egypt.
For some reason, he was laughing.

ar.definition: شخص أو شيء أو وقت أو مكان أو سبب غير محدد

es.definition: una persona, cosa, momento, lugar o razón no especificados

ja.definition: 特定しない人・物・時・場所・理由を表す

pt-BR.definition: uma pessoa, coisa, tempo, lugar ou motivo não especificado

zh-Hans.definition: 某个；某种；某天；某地；某种原因（未具体说明）

senses.definition: used before a singular noun to show that the speaker does not know, does not care, or has a particular attitude toward the person or thing
senses.usage_note: Often informal and tone-dependent; may suggest vagueness, dismissal, or mild surprise.

examples.sentence: Some guy called you this morning.
She was talking about some new diet.

zh-Hans.definition: 变成；转化为；译成

senses.definition: to a particular situation, condition, or involvement
senses.usage_note: Common in expressions about problems, trouble, debt, conflict, and similar states.

examples.sentence: They got into trouble at school.
The company ran into financial problems.

ar.definition: إلى موقف أو حالة أو تورط معين

es.definition: a una situación, condición o implicación determinada

ja.definition: ある状況・状態・関与の中へ

pt-BR.definition: para uma situação, condição ou envolvimento específico

zh-Hans.definition: 进入某种处境、状态或牵连之中

senses.definition: interested in or very enthusiastic about something
senses.usage_note: This informal sense is especially common after be and get.

examples.sentence: She's really into Korean dramas.
I got into cooking during the summer.

ar.definition: مهتمّ بـ أو متحمّس جدًا لشيء ما

es.definition: interesado en o muy entusiasmado con algo

ja.definition: 〜に夢中である、強い興味がある

pt-BR.definition: interessado em ou muito entusiasmado com algo

zh-Hans.definition: 对…很感兴趣；迷上

confusable_words.note: often means be aware of a situation rather than have learned information
often means understand information rather than simply have it in your memory

senses.definition: to have information or facts in your mind; to be aware of something because you learned it or were told it
senses.usage_note: Use this sense for facts, answers, names, and information.

examples.sentence: I know her name.
Do you know the answer?

ar.definition: يَعْرِف أو يَمْلِك معلومة أو حقيقة في ذهنه

es.definition: saber; tener información o datos en la mente

ja.definition: 知っている、分かっている（情報・事実を）

pt-BR.definition: saber; ter uma informação ou fato na mente

zh-Hans.definition: 知道；了解（信息、事实）

senses.definition: to understand something clearly or from experience
senses.usage_note: Common in patterns like know what/why/how.

examples.sentence: I know what you mean.
She knows how difficult this job is.

ar.definition: يَفْهَم شيئًا بوضوح أو من خلال الخبرة

es.definition: entender algo claramente o por experiencia

ja.definition: 理解している、分かる（経験や文脈から）

pt-BR.definition: entender algo claramente ou pela experiência

zh-Hans.definition: 明白；理解

senses.definition: to be familiar with a person, place, or thing because of experience with them
senses.usage_note: Use this sense for familiarity, especially with people and places.

examples.sentence: I know him very well.
She knows the city better than I do.

ar.definition: يَكُون على دِراية أو أُلْفَة بشخص أو مكان أو شيء بسبب الخبرة

es.definition: conocer; estar familiarizado con una persona, lugar o cosa por experiencia

ja.definition: 知っている、よく知っている、なじみがある

pt-BR.definition: conhecer; estar familiarizado com uma pessoa, lugar ou coisa

zh-Hans.definition: 认识；熟悉

senses.definition: to have the skill or practical knowledge to do something
senses.usage_note: Often overlaps with ability, but highlights learned method or skill.

examples.sentence: Do you know how to drive?
He knows how to fix computers.

ar.definition: يَمْتَلِك المهارة أو المعرفة العملية لفعل شيء

es.definition: saber hacer algo; tener la habilidad o el conocimiento práctico

ja.definition: 〜のやり方を知っている、〜できるだけの技能がある

pt-BR.definition: saber fazer algo; ter habilidade ou conhecimento prático

zh-Hans.definition: 知道如何做；会

confusable_words.note: hear means perceive sound, not sight
look means direct your eyes; see means notice with your eyes
watch means look at something for a time, especially something moving

senses.definition: to notice or become aware of someone or something with your eyes
senses.usage_note: This is the basic verb for visual perception.

examples.sentence: I can see a bird in the tree.
She saw her friend across the street.

ar.definition: يرى؛ يلاحظ شيئًا بعينيه

es.definition: ver; percibir a alguien o algo con los ojos

ja.definition: 見る、見える；目で気づく

pt-BR.definition: ver; perceber alguém ou algo com os olhos

zh-Hans.definition: 看见；看得到

senses.definition: to understand, realize, or recognize something
senses.usage_note: Common in spoken English for understanding.

examples.sentence: Now I see what you mean.
Do you see the problem?

ar.definition: يفهم؛ يدرك

es.definition: entender; darse cuenta de algo

ja.definition: 分かる、理解する

pt-BR.definition: entender; perceber mentalmente

zh-Hans.definition: 明白；理解；意识到

senses.definition: to meet or spend time with someone, or to visit someone for a purpose
senses.usage_note: Often used for appointments, relationships, and social plans.

examples.sentence: I'm seeing my grandparents this weekend.
You should see a doctor.

ar.definition: يقابل؛ يزور شخصًا أو يراجعه لغرض ما

es.definition: ver a alguien; reunirse con alguien o visitarlo con un propósito

ja.definition: 会う；診てもらう；訪ねる

pt-BR.definition: ver alguém; encontrar-se com alguém ou consultá-lo

zh-Hans.definition: 见；会见；看望；求诊

senses.definition: to watch a film, play, show, or other performance
senses.usage_note: Very common for going out to entertainment events.

examples.sentence: We saw a great movie last night.
Are you going to see the new play?

ar.definition: يشاهد فيلمًا أو عرضًا أو مسرحية

es.definition: ver una película, obra o espectáculo

ja.definition: 映画や劇などを見る

pt-BR.definition: assistir a um filme, peça ou espetáculo

zh-Hans.definition: 观看（电影、戏剧、演出等）

senses.definition: to make certain that something is done, or to deal with something that needs attention
senses.usage_note: Often appears in the patterns see that and see to.

examples.sentence: Please see that the door is locked.
I need to see to a few things before we leave.

ar.definition: يتأكد من؛ يهتمّ بـ؛ يتولّى أمر

es.definition: asegurarse de que algo se haga; ocuparse de algo

ja.definition: 確かめる；手配する；対処する

pt-BR.definition: garantir que algo seja feito; cuidar de algo

zh-Hans.definition: 确保；处理；照料

confusable_words.note: the number after two
the number before two
also means the number 2, but is used more in technical or formal contexts

senses.definition: the number 2
senses.usage_note: Used in counting and to show a quantity of 2.

examples.sentence: I have two sisters.
The meeting starts in two minutes.

ar.definition: الرقم ٢

es.definition: el número 2

ja.definition: 数字の2、二

pt-BR.definition: o número 2

zh-Hans.definition: 数字2；二

senses.definition: a group or set of two people or things
senses.usage_note: Often used without a following noun when the context already makes clear what two things or people are meant.

examples.sentence: Two of the students were absent.
Cut the apple into two.

ar.definition: اثنان؛ مجموعة مكوّنة من اثنين

es.definition: dos; un grupo de dos personas o cosas

ja.definition: 二つのもの；二人；二つの部分

pt-BR.definition: dois; um grupo de duas pessoas ou coisas

zh-Hans.definition: 两个；两者；两部分

confusable_words.note: do is used more for tasks, work, or general activities rather than creating something
build often suggests constructing something physical in a more specific way

senses.definition: to create, produce, or prepare something
senses.usage_note: A very common verb for creating or preparing things.

examples.sentence: She made a cake for my birthday.
Can you make some coffee?

ar.definition: يَصنع أو يُعِدّ شيئًا

es.definition: crear, producir o preparar algo

ja.definition: 何かを作る、準備する

pt-BR.definition: fazer, criar ou preparar algo

zh-Hans.definition: 制作；做；准备某物

senses.definition: to cause a result, perform an action, or bring something into existence
senses.usage_note: This broad sense covers many common learner collocations such as make a plan, make a mistake, and make money.

examples.sentence: We need to make a plan.
He made a big mistake.

ar.definition: يُحدِث نتيجة أو يقوم بفعل أو يُوجِد شيئًا

es.definition: causar un resultado, realizar una acción o producir algo

ja.definition: 結果を生み出す、行為をする、何かを生じさせる

pt-BR.definition: causar um resultado, realizar uma ação ou produzir algo

zh-Hans.definition: 造成某种结果；作出；产生

senses.definition: to cause someone or something to become a particular way or to do something
senses.usage_note: Common in patterns with an object plus verb or adjective.

examples.sentence: The joke made everyone laugh.
This music makes me happy.

ar.definition: يَجعَل شخصًا أو شيئًا يصبح على حال معيّنة أو يفعل شيئًا

es.definition: hacer que alguien o algo llegue a estar de cierta manera o haga algo

ja.definition: 人や物をある状態にする、または何かをさせる

pt-BR.definition: fazer alguém ou algo ficar de certa forma ou fazer algo

zh-Hans.definition: 使某人/某物变得……；使某人做某事

senses.definition: to succeed in reaching, achieving, or arriving in time for something
senses.usage_note: A common everyday meaning, especially with transport, deadlines, and selection.

examples.sentence: If we leave now, we can make the train.
She worked hard and made the final team.

ar.definition: ينجح في الوصول إلى شيء أو تحقيقه أو اللحاق به في الوقت المناسب

es.definition: lograr llegar, conseguir o alcanzar algo a tiempo

ja.definition: 間に合う、到達する、達成する

pt-BR.definition: conseguir chegar, alcançar ou obter algo a tempo

zh-Hans.definition: 赶上；及时到达；成功达到

senses.definition: to consist of a material or to be produced from something
senses.usage_note: Often taught as part of passive-style patterns: be made of / be made from.

examples.sentence: This table is made of wood.
Cheese is made from milk.

ar.definition: يَتكوَّن من مادة أو يُصنَع من شيء

es.definition: estar hecho de un material o producirse a partir de algo

ja.definition: ある材料でできている、何かから作られる

pt-BR.definition: ser feito de um material ou produzido a partir de algo

zh-Hans.definition: 由某种材料制成；由……加工而成

confusable_words.note: above can mean at a higher level, but not always directly across or covering

senses.definition: in or to a position higher than something, often directly above it or across it
senses.usage_note: Use for position above something or movement across the top of it.

examples.sentence: A lamp hung over the table.
The bird flew over the house.

ar.definition: فوقَ شيءٍ أو إلى موضعٍ أعلى منه، وغالبًا مباشرةً فوقه أو عبره

es.definition: encima de algo o hacia una posición más alta que ello, a menudo directamente por encima o cruzándolo

ja.definition: 何かより高い位置に、またはその上を越えて

pt-BR.definition: sobre algo ou para uma posição mais alta que isso, muitas vezes diretamente acima ou atravessando

zh-Hans.definition: 在……上方；越过……上方

senses.definition: more than a particular number, amount, or age
senses.usage_note: Common with numbers, ages, prices, and amounts.

examples.sentence: There were over fifty people at the party.
Children over twelve need a ticket.

ar.definition: أكثر من رقمٍ أو مقدارٍ أو عمرٍ معيّن

es.definition: más de un número, cantidad o edad determinados

ja.definition: ある数・量・年齢を超えて

pt-BR.definition: mais de um número, quantidade ou idade específica

zh-Hans.definition: 超过，多于（某个数字、数量或年龄）

senses.definition: during or throughout a period of time
senses.usage_note: Use with periods of time to show something happens across that span.

examples.sentence: We talked over dinner.
The village changed a lot over the years.

ar.definition: أثناء فترةٍ زمنية أو على امتدادها

es.definition: durante o a lo largo de un período de tiempo

ja.definition: ある期間のあいだに、またはその全体を通して

pt-BR.definition: durante ou ao longo de um período de tempo

zh-Hans.definition: 在……期间；在整个……过程中

senses.definition: finished or ended
senses.usage_note: Very common after be for events, games, classes, relationships, or periods that have ended.

examples.sentence: The movie is over now.
When the meeting was over, everyone went home.

ar.definition: منتهٍ أو قد انتهى

es.definition: terminado o finalizado

ja.definition: 終わった、終了した

pt-BR.definition: terminado, encerrado

zh-Hans.definition: 结束了；完了

senses.definition: about a subject while discussing, thinking about, or checking it carefully
senses.usage_note: Often appears in combinations like talk over, think over, and look over.

examples.sentence: We need to talk over the plan.
She looked over her notes before the test.

ar.definition: حول موضوعٍ ما عند مناقشته أو التفكير فيه أو مراجعته بعناية

es.definition: sobre un tema al discutirlo, pensarlo o revisarlo con cuidado

ja.definition: ある विषयについて、よく話し合ったり考えたり確認したりして

pt-BR.definition: sobre um assunto ao discuti-lo, pensá-lo ou revisá-lo com cuidado

zh-Hans.definition: 就某事进行讨论、思考或仔细检查

confusable_words.note: often means using the mind to consider something carefully
often focuses on creating new ideas rather than judging them

senses.definition: to use your mind to consider something, form ideas, or try to understand or solve something
senses.usage_note: A very common general verb for mental activity.

examples.sentence: I need a few minutes to think about your question.
She is thinking about how to solve the problem.

ar.definition: يستخدم عقله ليفكر في شيء أو يُكوّن أفكارًا أو يحاول الفهم أو الحل

es.definition: usar la mente para considerar algo, formar ideas o intentar entender o resolver algo

ja.definition: 何かを考えたり、考えをまとめたり、理解したり解決したりしようと頭を使う

pt-BR.definition: usar a mente para considerar algo, formar ideias ou tentar entender ou resolver algo

zh-Hans.definition: 用头脑思考某事、形成想法，或试图理解、解决某事

senses.definition: to have an opinion or belief about something
senses.usage_note: Often used to make statements less direct: I think... .

examples.sentence: I think this movie is great.
Do you think it will rain later?

ar.definition: يظن أو يعتقد شيئًا ما

es.definition: tener una opinión o creencia sobre algo

ja.definition: あることについて意見や考えを持つ

pt-BR.definition: ter uma opinião ou crença sobre algo

zh-Hans.definition: 对某事持有看法或认为某事如此

senses.definition: to direct your mind toward someone or something, or to keep them in your mind
senses.usage_note: Common with of/about; can suggest memory, attention, or care.

examples.sentence: I often think of my grandparents.
We were thinking about you during the trip.

ar.definition: يوجه تفكيره إلى شخص أو شيء أو يبقيه في ذهنه

es.definition: dirigir la mente hacia alguien o algo, o tenerlo presente

ja.definition: 人や物のことを心に思い浮かべる、気にかける

pt-BR.definition: dirigir a mente a alguém ou algo, ou mantê-lo em mente

zh-Hans.definition: 把注意力或思绪放在某人或某事上，把其放在心里

senses.definition: to produce an idea, answer, or plan in your mind
senses.usage_note: Often appears as think of or think up when creating ideas.

examples.sentence: Can you think of a good name for the cat?
She thought of a simple way to save time.

ar.definition: يبتكر فكرة أو إجابة أو خطة في ذهنه

es.definition: producir una idea, respuesta o plan en la mente

ja.definition: 頭の中で考えて、考え・答え・計画を思いつく

pt-BR.definition: produzir uma ideia, resposta ou plano na mente

zh-Hans.definition: 在脑中想出一个主意、答案或计划

confusable_words.note: used with singular countable or uncountable nouns to mean it does not matter which one
used when talking about every member of a group in a general way

senses.definition: used before a singular or uncountable noun to mean it does not matter which person, thing, or amount
senses.usage_note: Common in questions and negatives; can also mean 'it does not matter which'.

examples.sentence: You can choose any color you like.
Is there any milk left?

ar.definition: يُستعمل قبل الاسم المفرد أو غير المعدود للدلالة على أن الاختيار لا يهم أو للسؤال عن وجود شيء

es.definition: se usa antes de un nombre singular o incontable para indicar que no importa cuál o para preguntar si existe algo

ja.definition: 単数名詞・不可算名詞の前で、どれでもよいことや、何かあるかをたずねることを表す

pt-BR.definition: usado antes de um substantivo singular ou incontável para indicar que não importa qual ou para perguntar se existe algo

zh-Hans.definition: 用于单数名词或不可数名词前，表示任何一个都可以，或询问是否有某物

senses.definition: used before plural nouns to refer to one or more members of a group, especially in questions and negatives
senses.usage_note: With plural nouns, any often means 'one or more', especially in questions and negative statements.

examples.sentence: Do you have any questions?
I don't have any friends in this city.

ar.definition: يُستعمل قبل الأسماء الجمع للإشارة إلى فرد واحد أو أكثر من مجموعة، خاصة في الأسئلة والنفي

es.definition: se usa antes de nombres plurales para referirse a uno o más miembros de un grupo, especialmente en preguntas y negaciones

ja.definition: 複数名詞の前で、集団の中の一つ以上を表し、特に疑問文や否定文で使う

pt-BR.definition: usado antes de substantivos no plural para se referir a um ou mais membros de um grupo, especialmente em perguntas e negativas

zh-Hans.definition: 用于复数名词前，表示一组中的一个或多个，尤其用于疑问句和否定句

senses.definition: used as a pronoun to mean any person, thing, or amount, or to mean even a small amount or degree
senses.usage_note: As a pronoun, any can stand alone and may also emphasize a very small amount or degree.

examples.sentence: If you need any, take some from the box.
I can't walk any further.

ar.definition: يُستعمل كضمير ليعني أي شخص أو شيء أو مقدار، أو ليدل على قدر ولو قليل جدًا

es.definition: se usa como pronombre para significar cualquier persona, cosa o cantidad, o incluso una cantidad o grado muy pequeño

ja.definition: 代名詞として、どれか・だれか・いくらかを表し、またはごく少しの量や程度さえも表す

pt-BR.definition: usado como pronome para significar qualquer pessoa, coisa ou quantidade, ou até mesmo uma pequena quantidade ou grau

zh-Hans.definition: 作代词时，表示任何人、任何事物或任何数量，也可表示哪怕一点点数量或程度

senses.definition: used as an adverb in negative or comparative structures to mean to any degree or to any longer extent
senses.usage_note: This adverb use is common with comparatives and expressions like 'any more' and 'any longer'.

examples.sentence: It isn't any easier the second time.
She doesn't live here any more.

ar.definition: يُستعمل كظرف في النفي أو المقارنة ليعني إلى أي درجة أو إلى مزيد من الوقت

es.definition: se usa como adverbio en estructuras negativas o comparativas para significar en algún grado o por más tiempo

ja.definition: 否定文や比較表現で副詞として使われ、少しでも・これ以上は、という意味を表す

pt-BR.definition: usado como advérbio em estruturas negativas ou comparativas para significar em algum grau ou por mais tempo

zh-Hans.definition: 作副词时，用于否定句或比较结构中，表示在任何程度上或再继续下去

confusable_words.note: used for sequence in time; often contrasts with 'now' or marks the next step
'than' is used in comparisons, not for time or results

senses.definition: after that; next in time or order
senses.usage_note: A very common adverb used to show sequence.

examples.sentence: We ate dinner and then watched a movie.
First wash your hands, then sit down.

ar.definition: بعد ذلك؛ ثم

es.definition: después; luego

ja.definition: そのあとに；それから

pt-BR.definition: depois; em seguida

zh-Hans.definition: 然后；接着

senses.definition: in that case; as a result
senses.usage_note: Often used after if-clauses or to show a consequence.

examples.sentence: If you're busy, then we can meet tomorrow.
The road was closed, and then we had to take a different route.

ar.definition: في تلك الحالة؛ إذن

es.definition: entonces; en ese caso

ja.definition: その場合は；それなら

pt-BR.definition: nesse caso; então

zh-Hans.definition: 那么；那样的话

senses.definition: being such at that time in the past
senses.usage_note: Common in news and formal writing before nouns.

examples.sentence: She wrote to her then manager about the problem.
The then president spoke to the nation on television.

ar.definition: الذي كان كذلك آنذاك

es.definition: de aquel momento; de entonces

ja.definition: 当時の

pt-BR.definition: da época; de então

zh-Hans.definition: 当时的

confusable_words.note: present-tense form for ability, permission, or possibility
often marks unreal or future-in-the-past meanings more strongly

senses.definition: Past form of can, used as a less direct or past equivalent of can.
senses.usage_note: This entry is kept because could also has important modal uses beyond a simple past form.

examples.sentence: When I was five, I could swim.
She said she could come later.

ar.definition: صيغة الماضي من can، وتُستخدم كصيغة ماضية أو أقل مباشرة من can.

es.definition: Forma de pasado de can, usada como equivalente en pasado o menos directo de can.

ja.definition: can の過去形で、過去の能力や can より控えめな言い方に使う。

pt-BR.definition: Forma passada de can, usada como equivalente no passado ou de modo menos direto.

zh-Hans.definition: can 的过去式，也可作比 can 更委婉的说法。

senses.definition: Used to make polite requests, ask permission, or make polite suggestions.
senses.usage_note: A very common polite modal use taught separately from simple past ability.

examples.sentence: Could you help me with this bag?
Could I leave a little earlier today?
We could take a taxi instead.

ar.definition: تُستخدم لتقديم طلبات مهذبة، أو طلب الإذن، أو اقتراحات مهذبة.

es.definition: Se usa para hacer peticiones corteses, pedir permiso o hacer sugerencias corteses.

ja.definition: 丁寧な依頼、許可の申し出、または丁寧な提案を表す。

pt-BR.definition: Usado para fazer pedidos educados, pedir permissão ou fazer sugestões educadas.

zh-Hans.definition: 用于礼貌地提出请求、询问许可或提出建议。

senses.definition: Used to say that something is possible or may be true.
senses.usage_note: One of the core modal meanings of could.

examples.sentence: It could rain tonight.
This could be the answer.

ar.definition: تُستخدم للدلالة على أن شيئًا ما ممكن أو قد يكون صحيحًا.

es.definition: Se usa para decir que algo es posible o puede ser cierto.

ja.definition: 何かが起こる可能性がある、または本当かもしれないことを表す。

pt-BR.definition: Usado para dizer que algo é possível ou pode ser verdade.

zh-Hans.definition: 用于表示某事有可能发生或可能是真的。

senses.definition: Used with have and a past participle to talk about a possible past event, especially one that did not happen.
senses.usage_note: Useful as a separate learner pattern because form and meaning are distinctive.

examples.sentence: We could have missed the train.
She could have won if she had tried again.

ar.definition: تُستخدم مع have واسم المفعول للحديث عن حدث ماضٍ كان ممكنًا، وخاصةً ما لم يحدث.

es.definition: Se usa con have y participio para hablar de un hecho pasado posible, especialmente uno que no ocurrió.

ja.definition: have と過去分詞とともに使い、過去に起こる可能性があったこと、特に実際には起こらなかったことを表す。

pt-BR.definition: Usado com have e particípio passado para falar de um evento passado possível, especialmente um que não aconteceu.

zh-Hans.definition: 与 have 和过去分词连用，表示过去本来可能发生的事，尤其是实际上没有发生的事。

confusable_words.note: Front means the forward part or side.

senses.definition: the rear part of a body, object, or place
senses.usage_note: Often used for body parts and for the rear side of things or places.

There is a small garden at the back of the house.

ar.definition: الجزء الخلفي من الجسم أو الشيء أو المكان

es.definition: la parte trasera del cuerpo, de un objeto o de un lugar

ja.definition: 体・物・場所の後ろ側や背中

pt-BR.definition: a parte de trás do corpo, de um objeto ou de um lugar

zh-Hans.definition: 身体、物体或地方的后部；背部

senses.definition: to or toward the place, position, or state someone was in before
senses.usage_note: A very common adverb of return or restoration.

examples.sentence: She came back from school at four.
Please put the book back on the shelf.

ar.definition: إلى المكان أو الوضع السابق

es.definition: de vuelta; hacia el lugar, la posición o el estado anterior

ja.definition: 元の場所・位置・状態へ戻って

pt-BR.definition: de volta; para o lugar, posição ou estado anterior

zh-Hans.definition: 回到原来的地方、位置或状态

senses.definition: to support a person, idea, or plan
senses.usage_note: Common in news and formal everyday English.

examples.sentence: Her family backed her decision to study abroad.

ar.definition: يدعم شخصًا أو فكرة أو خطة

es.definition: apoyar a una persona, idea o plan

ja.definition: 人・考え・計画を支持する

pt-BR.definition: apoiar uma pessoa, ideia ou plano

zh-Hans.definition: 支持某人、想法或计划

senses.definition: to bet that a person, team, or animal will win
senses.usage_note: A specific betting use of the verb.

examples.sentence: He backed the local team to win the final.
Many people backed that horse before the race.

ar.definition: يراهن على فوز شخص أو فريق أو حيوان

es.definition: apostar por la victoria de una persona, equipo o animal

ja.definition: 人・チーム・動物が勝つと賭ける

pt-BR.definition: apostar que uma pessoa, equipe ou animal vai vencer

zh-Hans.definition: 押注某人、某队或某匹动物会赢

senses.definition: located at the rear or less main part of something

ar.definition: يقع في الجزء الخلفي أو الأقل بروزًا من الشيء

es.definition: situado en la parte trasera o menos principal de algo

ja.definition: 後ろ側の、奥の、表ではない

pt-BR.definition: localizado na parte de trás ou na parte menos principal de algo

zh-Hans.definition: 位于后部的；较偏后的；不主要的

confusable_words.note: singular form for one nearby item
plural form for items farther away

senses.definition: used before plural nouns to refer to specific people or things that are near the speaker or relevant now
senses.usage_note: This is the plural form used with nearby or current things.

examples.sentence: These books are mine.
I like these shoes.

ar.definition: تُستعمل قبل الأسماء المعدودة الجمع للإشارة إلى أشخاص أو أشياء محددة قريبة من المتحدث أو ذات صلة الآن

pt-BR.definition: usado antes de substantivos no plural para se referir a pessoas ou coisas específicas que estão perto do falante ou são relevantes agora

zh-Hans.definition: 用于复数名词前，指离说话人较近或当前相关的特定人或事物

senses.definition: used as a pronoun to refer to specific people or things that are near the speaker or already being pointed out
senses.usage_note: Often contrasts with those for things farther away.

examples.sentence: These are for you.

ar.definition: تُستعمل كضمير للإشارة إلى أشخاص أو أشياء محددة قريبة من المتحدث أو سبق تعيينها

ja.definition: 話し手の近くにある、またはすでに指し示されている複数の人や物を指して、代名詞として使う

pt-BR.definition: usado como pronome para se referir a pessoas ou coisas específicas que estão perto do falante ou já indicadas

confusable_words.note: subject pronoun; use before the verb as the doer
object pronoun for a single person, not a group including the speaker
object pronoun for the person being spoken to

senses.definition: the object form of 'we', used when the speaker and one or more other people receive an action or are affected by it
senses.usage_note: This is the object pronoun corresponding to 'we'.

examples.sentence: Please help us with our bags.
The teacher gave us more time.

ar.definition: ضمير مفعول يعني المتكلم مع أشخاص آخرين

ja.definition: 話し手を含む複数の人を表す目的格の代名詞

pt-BR.definition: forma objetiva de 'nós', usada quando o falante e outras pessoas recebem a ação

zh-Hans.definition: “我们”的宾格形式，表示说话者和其他人是动作的对象或受影响者

senses.definition: used after a verb plus an infinitive or complement to show that the speaker and others are the people involved
senses.usage_note: Learners often meet this in patterns like 'ask us to...' and 'make us...'.

examples.sentence: They asked us to wait outside.
The movie made us laugh.

ar.definition: يُستخدم بعد الفعل مع مصدر أو متمم ليدل على أن المتكلم ومن معه هم المعنيون بالفعل

es.definition: se usa después de un verbo con infinitivo o complemento para indicar que el hablante y otros están implicados

pt-BR.definition: usado depois de um verbo com infinitivo ou complemento para mostrar que o falante e outros estão envolvidos

zh-Hans.definition: 用于某些动词后接不定式或补足语时，表示说话者和其他人是相关对象

confusable_words.note: more formal and often less emotional than 'want'
means to need something, not simply to desire it

senses.definition: to wish to have, do, or experience something

examples.sentence: I want a glass of water.

ar.definition: يَرْغَب في امتلاك شيء أو فعله أو تجربته

ja.definition: 何かを手に入れたい、したい、経験したいと思う

pt-BR.definition: querer ter, fazer ou experimentar algo

zh-Hans.definition: 想要得到、做或经历某事

senses.definition: to lack or not have something that is needed or desired
senses.usage_note: This meaning is less common and somewhat formal, often used in writing.

examples.sentence: The house wants a new roof.

ar.definition: يَفْتَقِر إلى شيء أو لا يملكه مع الحاجة إليه أو الرغبة فيه

es.definition: carecer de algo que se necesita o se desea

ja.definition: 必要なもの・望ましいものが欠けている

pt-BR.definition: carecer de algo necessário ou desejado

zh-Hans.definition: 缺少、缺乏所需要或想要的东西

senses.definition: a state of not having enough of something essential; poverty or deprivation

ar.definition: حالة من العوز أو الحرمان من الأشياء الأساسية

pt-BR.definition: estado de falta do essencial; pobreza ou privação

zh-Hans.definition: 缺乏基本必需品的状态；贫困，匮乏

pt-BR.definition: coisas que uma pessoa gostaria de ter, mas de que não precisa

confusable_words.note: Used before a clause with a subject and verb; 'because of' is used before a noun phrase.
Can also express reason, but often sounds more formal in writing and links two clauses differently.

senses.definition: used to give the reason for something
senses.usage_note: Use 'because' before a clause to explain why something happens.

examples.sentence: I stayed home because I was tired.
She smiled because the news was good.

ar.definition: لأن؛ تُستخدم لذكر سبب شيء ما

pt-BR.definition: porque; usado na fala informal antes de uma frase curta para dar uma razão de forma abreviada

zh-Hans.definition: 因为；在非正式口语中放在简短短语前，简略说明原因

confusable_words.note: Often means movement on foot or by transport; less specific than walk.
More general than travel and often used for shorter or ordinary movement.

senses.definition: to move or travel from one place to another

ar.definition: يذهب أو ينتقل من مكان إلى آخر

pt-BR.definition: ir ou deslocar-se de um lugar para outro

ar.definition: يجري أو يتطور بطريقة معينة

adverb with similar meaning in some contexts, but often implies complete satisfaction

ar.definition: الطريق أو الاتجاه أو المسار إلى مكان

ar.definition: طريقة أو أسلوب لفعل شيء

ar.definition: حيّز أو مساحة للحركة أو التقدّم

pt-BR.definition: distância ou trecho percorrido

ar.definition: جانب أو ناحية معيّنة من الشيء

confusable_words.note: Use with countable and uncountable nouns to mean the larger number or amount.

senses.definition: used before a noun to mean the largest number or amount; the majority of

senses.definition: to a high degree; extremely
