es.definition: viejo; que ha existido durante mucho tiempo o que no es joven

ja.definition: 古い；年を取った、若くない

pt-BR.definition: velho; antigo; que existe há muito tempo ou não é jovem

zh-Hans.definition: 老的；旧的；存在很久的；不年轻的

senses.definition: from the past or from a long time ago
senses.usage_note: Often used for objects, buildings, traditions, and photos from the past.

examples.sentence: She found an old photo in the drawer.
This town is famous for its old buildings.

ar.definition: قديم؛ من الماضي أو من زمن بعيد

es.definition: antiguo; del pasado o de hace mucho tiempo

ja.definition: 昔の；古くからある

pt-BR.definition: antigo; do passado ou de muito tempo atrás

zh-Hans.definition: 古老的；过去的；很久以前的

senses.definition: connected with an earlier time in your life or with the past, not the present one
senses.usage_note: Common for things from your own past: old school, old boss, old apartment.

examples.sentence: I visited my old school last week.
He met his old boss at the airport.

ar.definition: سابق؛ مرتبط بوقت سابق في حياتك وليس الحاضر

es.definition: antiguo; anterior, de una etapa pasada de tu vida

ja.definition: 以前の；昔の自分に関係する

pt-BR.definition: antigo; de uma fase anterior da sua vida, não o atual

zh-Hans.definition: 以前的；从前的；不是现在这个的

senses.definition: of a particular age
senses.usage_note: Used in questions and statements about age: How old are you? She is ten years old.

examples.sentence: How old is your sister?
Their son is five years old.

ar.definition: بعمر معيّن

es.definition: de una edad determinada

ja.definition: ～歳である、特定の年齢の

pt-BR.definition: com determinada idade

zh-Hans.definition: ……岁的；达到某年龄的

confusable_words.note: used for a point in time up to now; differs from 'for' which gives a duration

senses.definition: from a particular time in the past until now or until a later stated time
senses.usage_note: Use 'since' for the starting point of a period, not the length of time.

examples.sentence: I have lived here since 2020.
She has not called me since Monday.

ar.definition: مُنذ وقتٍ معيّن في الماضي حتى الآن أو حتى وقت لاحق مذكور

es.definition: desde un momento concreto del pasado hasta ahora o hasta otro momento indicado

ja.definition: 過去のある時点から今、または述べられた後の時点まで

pt-BR.definition: desde um momento específico no passado até agora ou até outro momento indicado

zh-Hans.definition: 自从过去某一时间起直到现在或直到之后所说的某一时间

senses.definition: because; for the reason that
senses.usage_note: Common in writing and formal speech to introduce a reason.

examples.sentence: Since it was raining, we stayed inside.
Since you are here, can you help me?

ar.definition: لأن؛ بسبب أن

es.definition: porque; dado que

ja.definition: 〜なので、〜だから

pt-BR.definition: porque; já que

zh-Hans.definition: 因为；既然

senses.definition: from then until now or until a later time
senses.usage_note: Used mainly after a past time or event has already been mentioned.

examples.sentence: He moved to Canada in 2015 and has worked there since.
I saw her once in June, but not since.

ar.definition: منذ ذلك الحين حتى الآن أو حتى وقت لاحق

es.definition: desde entonces hasta ahora o hasta un momento posterior

ja.definition: それ以来、以後ずっと

pt-BR.definition: desde então até agora ou até um momento posterior

zh-Hans.definition: 从那时起；此后一直到现在或到后面所说的时间

confusable_words.note: used for two items, meaning the second of the two
used with plural or uncountable nouns

senses.definition: one more; an additional person or thing of the same kind
senses.usage_note: Commonly used to mean an extra one of the same kind.

examples.sentence: Can I have another cup of tea?
She bought another book yesterday.

ar.definition: واحد آخر؛ شخص أو شيء إضافي من النوع نفسه

es.definition: otro más; una persona o cosa adicional del mismo tipo

ja.definition: もう一つの；もう一人の；追加の同種のもの

pt-BR.definition: mais um; outra pessoa ou coisa adicional do mesmo tipo

zh-Hans.definition: 另一个；再一个；同类中额外的一个

senses.definition: a different person or thing; not the one already mentioned
senses.usage_note: Often used when choosing or mentioning a different option.

examples.sentence: This room is full, so let's try another hotel.
One student answered, and another asked a question.

ar.definition: شخص أو شيء مختلف؛ ليس المذكور سابقًا

es.definition: una persona o cosa diferente; no la ya mencionada

ja.definition: 別の人・物；すでに述べたものではないもの

pt-BR.definition: uma pessoa ou coisa diferente; não a já mencionada

zh-Hans.definition: 另一个不同的；不是前面提到的那个

senses.definition: an extra amount of time, money, or quantity, especially before a number or measurement
senses.usage_note: Learners often meet this pattern with time and money expressions.

examples.sentence: The meeting lasted another two hours.
We need another ten dollars to buy it.

ar.definition: مقدار إضافي من الوقت أو المال أو الكمية، خاصة قبل عدد أو قياس

es.definition: una cantidad adicional de tiempo, dinero o medida, especialmente antes de un número

ja.definition: さらに〜だけの時間・金額・量

pt-BR.definition: uma quantidade extra de tempo, dinheiro ou medida, especialmente antes de número

zh-Hans.definition: 又；再，多用于数量、时间或金额前

senses.definition: pronoun: one more or a different one
senses.usage_note: Used without a following noun when the noun is already understood.

examples.sentence: I don't like this pen; give me another.
One cookie fell on the floor, and another was broken.

ar.definition: ضمير: واحد آخر أو واحد مختلف

es.definition: pronombre: otro más o uno diferente

ja.definition: 代名詞：もう一つのもの、または別のもの

pt-BR.definition: pronome: mais um ou um diferente

zh-Hans.definition: 代词：另一个；再一个

confusable_words.note: means to have something for your use, not legal possession
means to hold or control something, often temporarily

senses.definition: to legally have something as your property
senses.usage_note: Use for legal or formal possession of things, property, or businesses.

examples.sentence: She owns a small apartment in the city.
Do you own this bike?

ar.definition: يَمتلك شيئًا قانونيًا بصفته مِلكًا له

es.definition: tener algo legalmente como propiedad

ja.definition: 物を法的に所有している

pt-BR.definition: ter algo legalmente como propriedade

zh-Hans.definition: 合法拥有；所有

senses.definition: belonging to a particular person or thing, often used for emphasis
senses.usage_note: Often used after a possessive word: my own, your own, their own.

examples.sentence: I want my own room.
She made her own decision.

ar.definition: خاصّ بشخص أو شيء معيّن، وغالبًا للتأكيد

es.definition: propio; que pertenece a una persona o cosa, a menudo con énfasis

ja.definition: 自分自身の；本人に属する

pt-BR.definition: próprio; que pertence a uma pessoa ou coisa, muitas vezes com ênfase

zh-Hans.definition: 自己的；本人的

senses.definition: to admit that something is true or that you are responsible for it
senses.usage_note: Common in modern informal English, especially about taking responsibility.

examples.sentence: He owned his mistake and apologized.
You need to own your actions.

ar.definition: يعترف بشيء أو يتحمّل مسؤوليته

es.definition: admitir algo o asumir la responsabilidad por ello

ja.definition: 過ちや責任を認める

pt-BR.definition: admitir algo ou assumir responsabilidade por isso

zh-Hans.definition: 承认；承担（责任）

confusable_words.note: can mean higher than something, not below it
usually means covered by or lower than in position

senses.definition: in, to, or below a lower position than something else
senses.usage_note: Use for physical position lower than something else.

examples.sentence: The cat is sleeping under the chair.
We sat under a tree to stay cool.

ar.definition: في أو إلى موضع أدنى من شيء آخر

es.definition: en o hacia una posición más baja que otra cosa

ja.definition: 何かより低い位置に、またはその下に

pt-BR.definition: em ou para uma posição mais baixa do que outra coisa

zh-Hans.definition: 在某物下面；到某物下面

senses.definition: less than a stated number, amount, age, or level
senses.usage_note: Common with numbers, prices, ages, and measurements.

examples.sentence: Children under five can enter for free.
The bag costs under twenty dollars.

ar.definition: أقل من رقم أو مقدار أو عمر أو مستوى محدد

es.definition: menos de un número, cantidad, edad o nivel indicado

ja.definition: 示された数・量・年齢・水準より少ない

pt-BR.definition: menos que um número, valor, idade ou nível declarado

zh-Hans.definition: 低于；少于（某个数字、金额、年龄或水平）

senses.definition: affected by a condition, force, process, or situation
senses.usage_note: Often used after be: be under pressure, be under discussion, be under attack.

examples.sentence: The team is under a lot of pressure this week.
The plan is still under discussion.

ar.definition: واقعًا تحت تأثير حالة أو قوة أو عملية أو وضع

es.definition: afectado por una condición, fuerza, proceso o situación

ja.definition: ある状態・力・過程・状況の影響下にある

pt-BR.definition: afetado por uma condição, força, processo ou situação

zh-Hans.definition: 处于某种状态、压力、力量或过程中

senses.definition: controlled, directed, or governed by a person, system, rule, or authority
senses.usage_note: Use when something is under the control, rule, or authority of something else.

examples.sentence: The country was under military rule for years.
All drivers must stop under the new law.

ar.definition: خاضعًا لسيطرة أو إدارة أو حكم شخص أو نظام أو قانون أو سلطة

es.definition: controlado, dirigido o regido por una persona, sistema, norma o autoridad

ja.definition: 人・制度・規則・権威の支配や管理のもとで

pt-BR.definition: controlado, dirigido ou regido por uma pessoa, sistema, regra ou autoridade

zh-Hans.definition: 在某人、制度、规则或权力的控制、管理或法律约束之下

senses.definition: younger than a particular age; people below a stated age
senses.usage_note: As a noun, often informal and used in age-group contexts such as sports or tickets.

examples.sentence: The museum is free for unders and seniors today.
Only under-16s can join this class.

ar.definition: من هم أصغر من عمر معين؛ أشخاص دون سن محددة

es.definition: personas menores de una edad determinada

ja.definition: 特定の年齢未満の人々

pt-BR.definition: pessoas com menos de uma certa idade

zh-Hans.definition: 低于某个年龄的人；未满某岁者

synonyms: young people below a stated age

confusable_words.note: used for a period of time inside an event or span, not for a starting point
used with a span or event, while 'for' gives the length of time
often used before a clause with a subject and verb, unlike 'during'

senses.definition: at some point in a period of time, event, or activity, or throughout it
senses.usage_note: Use 'during' before a noun phrase to talk about time inside an event or period: 'during the film', 'during July'.

examples.sentence: Please do not use your phone during the lesson.
It rained a lot during our holiday.
Many people left the city during the war.

ar.definition: أثناء فترة زمنية أو حدث ما، أو خلاله

es.definition: en algún momento de un período, evento o actividad, o a lo largo de este

ja.definition: ある期間・出来事・活動の間に、またはその間じゅう

pt-BR.definition: em algum momento de um período, evento ou atividade, ou ao longo dele

zh-Hans.definition: 在某一时期、事件或活动期间；在……过程中

senses.definition: an activity or sport with rules that people play for fun or competition
senses.usage_note: A broad everyday sense covering games for fun and sports contests.

examples.sentence: The children played a game in the park.
We watched the basketball game on TV.

ar.definition: لعبة أو نشاط أو رياضة لها قواعد ويشارك فيها الناس للمتعة أو المنافسة

es.definition: actividad, juego o deporte con reglas que la gente practica por diversión o competencia

ja.definition: 人々が楽しみや競争のためにする、ルールのある遊びやスポーツ

pt-BR.definition: atividade, jogo ou esporte com regras que as pessoas praticam por diversão ou competição

zh-Hans.definition: 有规则、供人娱乐或比赛的游戏、活动或体育比赛

senses.definition: a particular type of activity, especially one that seems difficult, risky, or not serious
senses.usage_note: Often used figuratively in fixed expressions.

examples.sentence: Getting a visa can be a waiting game.
They were playing a dangerous game with investors' money.

ar.definition: نوع من النشاط أو الموقف، خاصة إذا بدا صعبًا أو محفوفًا بالمخاطر أو غير جاد

es.definition: un tipo de actividad o situación, especialmente si parece difícil, arriesgada o poco seria

ja.definition: 特に、難しい・危険な・まじめでないように見える活動や状況

pt-BR.definition: um tipo de atividade ou situação, especialmente quando parece difícil, arriscada ou pouco séria

zh-Hans.definition: 一种活动或局面，尤其指看起来困难、危险或不太严肃的情况

senses.definition: a field of activity or business, especially one with strong competition or unwritten rules
senses.usage_note: Common in informal phrases like in the ... game.

examples.sentence: She has been in the advertising game for years.
He knows how to survive in the music game.

ar.definition: مجال نشاط أو عمل، خاصة إذا كان فيه تنافس قوي أو قواعد غير مكتوبة

es.definition: ámbito de actividad o negocio, especialmente con mucha competencia o reglas no escritas

ja.definition: 特に競争が激しかったり暗黙のルールがあったりする活動や業界

pt-BR.definition: área de atividade ou negócio, especialmente com muita competição ou regras não escritas

zh-Hans.definition: 某个活动或行业领域，尤指竞争激烈或有潜规则的领域

senses.definition: willing and ready to do something, especially something challenging or unusual
senses.usage_note: Informal adjective, especially in be game / be game to do something.

examples.sentence: I'm game if you want to go hiking at dawn.
She was game to try the new recipe.

ar.definition: مستعد وراغب في فعل شيء، خاصة إذا كان صعبًا أو غير معتاد

es.definition: dispuesto y listo para hacer algo, especialmente si es difícil o poco habitual

ja.definition: 特に難しいことや変わったことをする気があって、進んでやる用意がある

pt-BR.definition: disposto e pronto para fazer algo, especialmente algo difícil ou incomum

zh-Hans.definition: 愿意并准备好做某事，尤指有挑战性或不寻常的事

senses.definition: an object, idea, action, or event when the exact name is unknown, unimportant, or general
senses.usage_note: A very general noun used for objects, matters, ideas, actions, and events.

examples.sentence: There are a few things on the table.
We talked about many different things.

ar.definition: شيء: غرض أو فكرة أو فعل أو حدث عندما لا يكون الاسم الدقيق معروفًا أو مهمًا

es.definition: cosa: objeto, idea, acción o suceso cuando el nombre exacto no se sabe, no importa o se habla en general

ja.definition: 物事・もの：正確な名前が分からない、重要でない、または一般的に述べるときの対象・考え・行動・出来事

pt-BR.definition: coisa: objeto, ideia, ação ou evento quando o nome exato é desconhecido, não importa ou se fala de modo geral

zh-Hans.definition: 东西；事情：当确切名称未知、不重要或泛指时所说的物体、想法、行为或事件

senses.definition: an important fact, point, or detail in a situation
senses.usage_note: Often used to highlight what matters most in a situation.

examples.sentence: The main thing is to stay calm.
The thing I like most about the job is the people.

ar.definition: أمر أو نقطة مهمة في موقف ما

es.definition: aspecto, punto o detalle importante en una situación

ja.definition: 状況の中で重要な事実・要点・詳細

pt-BR.definition: fato, ponto ou detalhe importante em uma situação

zh-Hans.definition: 情况中的要点；关键之处；重要事实

senses.definition: a particular interest, style, activity, or personal preference
senses.usage_note: Common in informal speech about tastes and personal style.

examples.sentence: Jazz is not really my thing.
She likes to do her own thing.

ar.definition: اهتمام أو أسلوب أو نشاط أو تفضيل شخصي معيّن

es.definition: interés, estilo, actividad o preferencia personal particular

ja.definition: 特定の興味・スタイル・活動・好み

pt-BR.definition: interesse, estilo, atividade ou preferência pessoal específica

zh-Hans.definition: 特别的兴趣、风格、活动或个人偏好

collocations: know a thing or two about

confusable_words.note: give means transfer something to another person; offer means present or propose
give often means hand over; lend means give for a limited time

senses.definition: to hand something to someone so that they have it
senses.usage_note: This is the most common meaning of give.

examples.sentence: She gave me a book for my birthday.
Please give the keys to Tom.

ar.definition: يُعطي شيئًا لشخص ليصبح عنده

es.definition: dar algo a alguien para que lo tenga

ja.definition: 人に物を渡してその人のものにする

pt-BR.definition: dar algo a alguém para que essa pessoa fique com isso

zh-Hans.definition: 把某物交给某人，让对方得到它

senses.definition: to provide or express something such as help, information, advice, or permission
senses.usage_note: Often used with abstract nouns.

examples.sentence: The teacher gave us some useful advice.
He gave no clear answer.

ar.definition: يقدّم أو يعبّر عن شيء مثل المساعدة أو المعلومات أو النصيحة أو الإذن

es.definition: dar o proporcionar algo como ayuda, información, consejo o permiso

ja.definition: 助け、情報、助言、許可などを与える・示す

pt-BR.definition: dar ou fornecer algo como ajuda, informação, conselho ou permissão

zh-Hans.definition: 提供或给出帮助、信息、建议、许可等

senses.definition: to let someone have money, time, effort, or support
senses.usage_note: Can be used for both concrete and abstract resources.

examples.sentence: Many people gave money to the hospital.
She gives a lot of time to her children.

ar.definition: يمنح شخصًا مالًا أو وقتًا أو جهدًا أو دعمًا

es.definition: dar a alguien dinero, tiempo, esfuerzo o apoyo

ja.definition: お金、時間、努力、支援などを与える

pt-BR.definition: dar a alguém dinheiro, tempo, esforço ou apoio

zh-Hans.definition: 给予某人金钱、时间、精力或支持

senses.definition: to perform or produce an action, reaction, or event, often in a fixed expression
senses.usage_note: Very common in collocations.

examples.sentence: She gave a short speech at the meeting.
He gave me a smile and left.

ar.definition: يقوم بفعل أو يُظهر رد فعل، وغالبًا في تعبيرات ثابتة

es.definition: realizar o producir una acción o reacción, a menudo en una expresión fija

ja.definition: 行動や反応を示す・行う。決まった表現でよく使う

pt-BR.definition: realizar ou produzir uma ação ou reação, muitas vezes em expressão fixa

zh-Hans.definition: 做出某种动作或反应，常见于固定搭配中

senses.definition: if a door, window, or opening gives onto a place, it opens in that direction
senses.usage_note: Less common than the main senses, but useful in reading.

examples.sentence: The kitchen window gives onto the garden.
A narrow passage gives onto the main road.

ar.definition: يفتح أو يؤدي إلى مكان ما، ويستعمل للأبواب أو النوافذ أو الممرات

es.definition: dar a un lugar; abrirse hacia allí, dicho de una puerta, ventana o paso

ja.definition: ドア・窓・通路などがその場所に面している、通じている

pt-BR.definition: dar para um lugar; abrir-se naquela direção, falando de porta, janela ou passagem

zh-Hans.definition: 指门、窗或通道朝向某处或通向某处

confusable_words.note: A building where one family or household lives; usually smaller and more private than an apartment building.
A set of rooms in a larger building, not a separate building.

senses.definition: a building where people live, especially one for a single family
senses.usage_note: Common basic meaning for the building people live in.

examples.sentence: They bought a small house near the school.
Her grandparents live in a big old house.

ar.definition: منزل أو بيت يعيش فيه الناس، خاصةً لعائلة واحدة

es.definition: casa; edificio donde vive la gente, especialmente una sola familia

ja.definition: 家、住宅；特に一世帯が住む建物

pt-BR.definition: casa; construção onde as pessoas moram, especialmente uma família

zh-Hans.definition: 房子，住宅；尤指一家人居住的建筑

senses.definition: a lawmaking body or one part of a parliament or congress
senses.usage_note: Often capitalized in names of specific chambers.

examples.sentence: The bill was approved by both houses of parliament.
She gave a speech in the House of Commons.

ar.definition: مجلس تشريعي أو أحد مجلسي البرلمان أو الكونغرس

es.definition: cámara legislativa o una de las partes de un parlamento o congreso

ja.definition: 議会の院、議院；国会や議会を構成する一部

pt-BR.definition: câmara legislativa ou uma das partes de um parlamento ou congresso

zh-Hans.definition: 议院，立法机构；议会或国会中的一院

senses.definition: a company or business organization, especially in certain fields
senses.usage_note: Common in fixed expressions such as publishing house and fashion house.

examples.sentence: She works for a well-known publishing house.
The fashion house launched a new collection.

ar.definition: شركة أو مؤسسة تجارية، خاصة في بعض المجالات

es.definition: empresa o casa comercial, especialmente en ciertos sectores

ja.definition: 会社、企業；特定分野での事業体

pt-BR.definition: empresa ou organização comercial, especialmente em certos setores

zh-Hans.definition: 公司，机构；尤指某些行业中的企业

senses.definition: used before another noun to mean related to a house, internal use, or a particular establishment's own version
senses.usage_note: Adjectival use is common in compounds and set phrases.

examples.sentence: The restaurant serves its own house wine.
House prices have risen again this year.

ar.definition: مستخدم قبل الاسم بمعنى متعلق بالمنزل أو للاستعمال الداخلي أو النسخة الخاصة بمكان ما

es.definition: usado antes de un sustantivo para indicar relación con la casa, uso interno o la versión propia de un establecimiento

ja.definition: 別の名詞の前で使われ、家に関すること、その店・組織独自のものを表す

pt-BR.definition: usado antes de outro substantivo para indicar relação com a casa, uso interno ou a versão própria de um estabelecimento

zh-Hans.definition: 置于名词前，表示与房屋有关、内部使用，或某机构自有的版本

senses.definition: to provide a place for a person or thing to live, stay, or be kept
senses.usage_note: Common in formal or informational contexts like shelters, buildings, and collections.

examples.sentence: The shelter can house up to fifty people.
The museum houses a large collection of paintings.

ar.definition: يوفّر مكانًا لشخص أو شيء ليعيش أو يقيم أو يُحفَظ فيه

es.definition: dar alojamiento o un lugar donde una persona o cosa pueda vivir, quedarse o guardarse

ja.definition: 人や物を収容する、住まわせる、保管する

pt-BR.definition: fornecer lugar para uma pessoa ou coisa morar, ficar ou ser guardada

zh-Hans.definition: 给人或物提供居住、存放或安置的地方；容纳

confusable_words.note: more general for an area or position, not always a specific location for people or things
usually means an area, town, or space rather than any specific spot

senses.definition: a particular position, area, or part of space
senses.usage_note: Common basic noun for a location or position.

examples.sentence: This is a good place to sit.
Do you know this place?

ar.definition: مكان أو موضع معيّن

es.definition: sitio o posición determinados

ja.definition: 特定の場所、位置

pt-BR.definition: lugar ou posição específica

zh-Hans.definition: 地方；地点；位置

senses.definition: the proper or usual position, order, or role of someone or something
senses.usage_note: Includes physical order and social or functional position.

examples.sentence: Please put the book back in its place.
Everyone knew their place in the line.

ar.definition: الموضع أو الترتيب أو الدور الصحيح أو المعتاد

es.definition: posición, orden o papel correcto o habitual

ja.definition: 本来の位置、順番、役割

pt-BR.definition: posição, ordem ou papel correto ou habitual

zh-Hans.definition: 应在的位置；恰当的位置；身份或次序

senses.definition: a position in a race, competition, or list of results
senses.usage_note: A common meaning in competitions and rankings.

examples.sentence: She finished in first place.
Our team got third place in the competition.

ar.definition: مركز أو مرتبة في سباق أو مسابقة أو قائمة نتائج

es.definition: puesto o posición en una carrera, competencia o lista de resultados

ja.definition: 競争や順位表での順位

pt-BR.definition: colocação ou posição em corrida, competição ou lista de resultados

zh-Hans.definition: 名次；位次；排名

senses.definition: to put something in a particular position
senses.usage_note: Often slightly more formal than put.

examples.sentence: She placed the keys on the table.
He carefully placed the baby in the bed.

ar.definition: يضع شيئًا في موضع معيّن

es.definition: poner algo en una posición determinada

ja.definition: 何かを特定の位置に置く

pt-BR.definition: colocar algo em uma posição específica

zh-Hans.definition: 放置；安放在某处

senses.definition: to make, arrange, or submit something officially or in a deliberate way
senses.usage_note: Useful for common collocations where place means submit or assign.

examples.sentence: I placed an order for three books.
They placed great importance on clear communication.

ar.definition: يقدّم أو يرتّب شيئًا بصورة رسمية أو مقصودة

es.definition: hacer, tramitar o presentar algo de manera formal o deliberada

ja.definition: 正式に出す、申し込む、または意図的に与える

pt-BR.definition: fazer, registrar ou apresentar algo de modo formal ou deliberado

zh-Hans.definition: 正式提出；下（订单）；赋予，给予

senses.definition: a place where children or teenagers go to learn
senses.usage_note: This is the most common meaning for learners.

examples.sentence: The children walk to school every morning.
She started a new school last week.

ar.definition: مَدرَسَة، مكان يذهب إليه الأطفال أو المراهقون للتعلّم

es.definition: escuela, lugar al que van los niños o adolescentes para aprender

ja.definition: 学校、子どもや十代の若者が学ぶために通う場所

pt-BR.definition: escola, lugar onde crianças ou adolescentes vão para aprender

zh-Hans.definition: 学校；儿童或青少年学习的地方

senses.definition: the period of education when someone is studying, especially as a child or teenager
senses.usage_note: Often used without an article to mean education as an activity or life stage.

examples.sentence: He stayed in school until he was eighteen.
What did you enjoy most about school?

ar.definition: الدراسة المدرسية أو فترة التعلّم في المدرسة

es.definition: la etapa de estudios en la escuela

ja.definition: 学校生活、学校で学ぶ期間

pt-BR.definition: a vida escolar ou o período de estudo na escola

zh-Hans.definition: 学校教育；上学阶段；学校生活

senses.definition: a college department or other institution for specialized study in a particular subject
senses.usage_note: Common in names of higher-education institutions or departments.

examples.sentence: She is applying to medical school.
He teaches at the school of engineering.

ar.definition: كلية أو قسم أو مؤسسة للدراسة المتخصصة في مجال معين

es.definition: facultad, escuela o institución de estudio especializado en una materia

ja.definition: 専門分野を学ぶための学校・学部・機関

pt-BR.definition: faculdade, escola ou instituição de estudo especializado em uma área

zh-Hans.definition: 专科学校；学院；某一学科的院系或机构

senses.definition: a group of people who share the same ideas, style, or methods
senses.usage_note: More formal and abstract than the education meaning.

examples.sentence: This theory belongs to an older school of thought.
The painter was influenced by the Dutch school.

ar.definition: اتجاه أو جماعة تشترك في الأفكار أو الأسلوب أو المنهج

es.definition: corriente o grupo que comparte las mismas ideas, estilo o métodos

ja.definition: 共通の考え方・様式・方法を持つ学派・流派

pt-BR.definition: corrente, escola ou grupo que compartilha as mesmas ideias, estilo ou métodos

zh-Hans.definition: 学派；流派；具有共同思想、风格或方法的一群人

senses.definition: a large group of fish swimming together
senses.usage_note: A specific nature meaning that learners may meet in reading.

examples.sentence: We saw a school of fish near the reef.
A school of silver fish moved through the water.

ar.definition: سِرب من الأسماك يسبح معًا

es.definition: banco o cardumen de peces que nadan juntos

ja.definition: 魚の群れ

pt-BR.definition: cardume, grande grupo de peixes nadando juntos

zh-Hans.definition: 鱼群；一起游动的一大群鱼

senses.definition: one more time; another time after before
grammar_patterns: again at the end of a clause
senses.usage_note: Commonly used to talk about repeating an action or event.

examples.sentence: Please say that again.
I want to watch the movie again.

ar.definition: مرة أخرى؛ من جديد

es.definition: otra vez; de nuevo

ja.definition: もう一度；再び

pt-BR.definition: de novo; outra vez

zh-Hans.definition: 再一次；又一次

senses.definition: back to an earlier or usual state
senses.usage_note: Often used with be, feel, seem, or similar verbs.

examples.sentence: I feel well again.
The shop is open again.

ar.definition: مرة أخرى بمعنى العودة إلى الحالة السابقة

es.definition: de nuevo, en el sentido de volver a un estado anterior

ja.definition: 再び、元の状態に戻って

pt-BR.definition: novamente, no sentido de voltar ao estado anterior

zh-Hans.definition: 又；重新回到原来的状态

senses.definition: used to add a different or opposite point in conversation
senses.usage_note: Usually appears in the fixed phrases then again or but then again.

examples.sentence: I could go out tonight. Then again, I might stay home.
It's expensive. But then again, it is very well made.

ar.definition: من ناحية أخرى؛ ومع ذلك عند إضافة فكرة مختلفة

es.definition: por otro lado; aunque pensándolo bien

ja.definition: 一方で；もっとも

pt-BR.definition: por outro lado; pensando bem

zh-Hans.definition: 不过；另一方面

confusable_words.note: means immediately before in time or order
means following after the present one, often similar to next but less immediate in some contexts

senses.definition: coming immediately after the present time or one just mentioned
senses.usage_note: Common before nouns for future time periods.

examples.sentence: I will see you next week.
The next day, we went home.

ar.definition: القادم مباشرة بعد الوقت الحاضر أو بعد وقت ذُكر للتو

es.definition: que viene inmediatamente después del tiempo presente o de otro ya mencionado

ja.definition: 現在や今述べた時点のすぐ次に来る

pt-BR.definition: que vem imediatamente depois do tempo presente ou de outro já mencionado

zh-Hans.definition: 紧接当前时间或刚提到的时间之后的

senses.definition: coming immediately after another person or thing in a series, order, or position
senses.usage_note: Used for sequence and order, not only time.

examples.sentence: Who is the next person in line?
Our next stop is Boston.

ar.definition: الذي يأتي مباشرة بعد شخص أو شيء آخر في سلسلة أو ترتيب أو موضع

es.definition: que viene inmediatamente después de otra persona o cosa en una serie, orden o posición

ja.definition: 列・順序・位置で別の人や物のすぐ後に来る

pt-BR.definition: que vem imediatamente depois de outra pessoa ou coisa em uma série, ordem ou posição

zh-Hans.definition: 在系列、顺序或位置上紧接另一个人或事物之后的

senses.definition: in the closest place to someone or something; directly beside
senses.usage_note: Usually appears in phrases like next to and next door.

examples.sentence: She sat next to me on the bus.
They live next door to us.

ar.definition: في أقرب مكان إلى شخص أو شيء؛ بجانب مباشرة

es.definition: en el lugar más cercano a alguien o algo; justo al lado

ja.definition: 人や物のすぐ隣に；すぐそばに

pt-BR.definition: no lugar mais próximo de alguém ou algo; bem ao lado

zh-Hans.definition: 在离某人或某物最近的位置；紧挨着

senses.definition: after that; as the following step or point
senses.usage_note: Often used at the start of instructions or narratives.

examples.sentence: First, cut the paper. Next, fold it in half.
She explained the problem and next described the solution.

ar.definition: بعد ذلك؛ كالخطوة أو النقطة التالية

es.definition: después de eso; como el paso o punto siguiente

ja.definition: その次に；次の段階や点として

pt-BR.definition: depois disso; como o passo ou ponto seguinte

zh-Hans.definition: 接下来；作为下一步或下一点

confusable_words.note: often used with plural nouns when referring to members separately; every is more common for a whole group seen individually
all refers to the whole group together, not one by one

senses.definition: used before a singular noun or pronoun to mean every one separately in a group of two or more
senses.usage_note: Unlike every, each strongly focuses on members separately, especially in small groups.

examples.sentence: Each student got a book.
We talked to each person in the room.

ar.definition: يُستعمل قبل الاسم المفرد ليعني كل واحد على حدة ضمن مجموعة من اثنين أو أكثر

es.definition: se usa antes de un sustantivo o pronombre singular para significar cada uno por separado en un grupo de dos o más

ja.definition: 2つ以上の集まりの中で、一人一人・一つ一つを別々に表すために単数名詞や代名詞の前で使う

pt-BR.definition: usado antes de um substantivo ou pronome no singular para indicar cada um separadamente em um grupo de dois ou mais

zh-Hans.definition: 用于单数名词或代词前，表示两者或以上群体中的每一个、各自

senses.definition: used as a pronoun to refer to every person or thing in a group separately
senses.usage_note: Often used with of before pronouns or noun phrases: each of us, each of the books.

examples.sentence: The gifts were different, and each was useful.
They wore hats, and each of them smiled.

ar.definition: يُستعمل كضمير للإشارة إلى كل شخص أو شيء في مجموعة على حدة

es.definition: se usa como pronombre para referirse a cada persona o cosa de un grupo por separado

ja.definition: 集まりの中の一人一人・一つ一つを別々に指す代名詞として使う

pt-BR.definition: usado como pronome para se referir a cada pessoa ou coisa de um grupo separadamente

zh-Hans.definition: 作代词使用，指一组人或事物中的每一个、各自

senses.definition: for or by every person or thing separately; apiece
senses.usage_note: Common after amounts, prices, or quantities.

examples.sentence: The tickets cost $20 each.
We were given two cookies each.

ar.definition: لكل شخص أو شيء على حدة؛ للفرد الواحد

es.definition: para o por cada persona o cosa por separado; por unidad

ja.definition: 一人一人・一つ一つについてそれぞれ；1つあたり

pt-BR.definition: para ou por cada pessoa ou coisa separadamente; cada um

zh-Hans.definition: 对每个人或每件东西分别地；每个，分别

senses.definition: a title used before a man's family name or full name
senses.usage_note: Usually written as Mr before a man's surname; no period in British English, often Mr. in American English.

examples.sentence: Mr Smith is my teacher.
Please give this letter to Mr Brown.

ar.definition: السيد: لقب يُستخدم قبل اسم عائلة الرجل أو اسمه الكامل

es.definition: señor: título que se usa antes del apellido o del nombre completo de un hombre

ja.definition: 〜氏、〜さん、ミスター：男性の姓またはフルネームの前に付ける敬称

pt-BR.definition: senhor: título usado antes do sobrenome ou do nome completo de um homem

zh-Hans.definition: 先生；先生（用于男性姓氏或全名前）

confusable_words.note: means accompanied by something, not lacking it

senses.definition: not having, using, or including someone or something
senses.usage_note: A very common preposition used to show absence or lack.

examples.sentence: I can't live without my phone.
She left without her bag.

ar.definition: من دون؛ بدون وجود أو استعمال أو تضمين شيء أو شخص

es.definition: sin; no teniendo, usando o incluyendo algo o alguien

ja.definition: 〜なしで；〜を持たずに、使わずに、含まずに

pt-BR.definition: sem; não tendo, usando ou incluindo algo ou alguém

zh-Hans.definition: 没有；不带；不用

senses.definition: if someone does not do a particular action
senses.usage_note: Commonly used before an -ing form to talk about not doing an action.

examples.sentence: He left without saying goodbye.
Don't go out without locking the door.

ar.definition: من دون أن؛ إذا لم يقم الشخص بفعل معين

es.definition: sin; sin realizar una acción determinada

ja.definition: 〜しないで；ある行動をせずに

pt-BR.definition: sem; sem realizar uma determinada ação

zh-Hans.definition: 没有做…就；不…而

senses.definition: used in fixed expressions to mean certainly or definitely
senses.usage_note: Best taught through common phrases rather than as a separate grammar rule.

examples.sentence: She is without doubt the best player on the team.
We will contact you tomorrow without fail.

ar.definition: يستعمل في تعبيرات ثابتة بمعنى بالتأكيد أو حتمًا

es.definition: usado en expresiones fijas con el sentido de ciertamente o definitivamente

ja.definition: 決まった表現で、確かに・必ずという意味で使う

pt-BR.definition: usado em expressões fixas com o sentido de certamente ou com certeza

zh-Hans.definition: 用于固定表达，表示“无疑地；一定”

confusable_words.note: shows movement toward and touching a surface; against emphasizes contact or support
can mean very close to; against usually means touching

senses.definition: touching or very close to a surface or object
senses.usage_note: Use against for physical contact with a surface, often with verbs like put, lean, or stand.

examples.sentence: She put the bike against the fence.
He was standing against the wall.

ar.definition: ملاصقًا لسطح أو شيء أو قريبًا جدًا منه

es.definition: tocando o muy cerca de una superficie u objeto

ja.definition: 面や物に接して、または非常に近い状態で

pt-BR.definition: encostado em ou muito perto de uma superfície ou objeto

zh-Hans.definition: 贴着，靠着，紧挨着某个表面或物体

senses.definition: in opposition to a rule, idea, plan, or someone's wishes
senses.usage_note: A very common use for opinions, votes, laws, and rules: against the idea, against the law, vote against.

examples.sentence: It is against the law to park here.
She spoke against the plan.

ar.definition: في معارضة قاعدة أو فكرة أو خطة أو رغبة شخص ما

es.definition: en oposición a una regla, idea, plan o a los deseos de alguien

ja.definition: 規則・考え・計画・人の希望などに反して、または反対して

pt-BR.definition: em oposição a uma regra, ideia, plano ou à vontade de alguém

zh-Hans.definition: 反对；违背规则、想法、计划或某人的意愿

senses.definition: as protection from something harmful or unpleasant
senses.usage_note: Common after words about defense or prevention: protect against, insurance against, a guard against.

examples.sentence: These glasses protect your eyes against the sun.
The vaccine works against the disease.

ar.definition: للحماية من شيء ضار أو مزعج

es.definition: como protección frente a algo dañino o desagradable

ja.definition: 有害・不快なものから守るために

pt-BR.definition: como proteção contra algo prejudicial ou desagradável

zh-Hans.definition: 防御，抵御，预防有害或令人不快的事物

senses.definition: facing an unfavorable force, background, or condition
senses.usage_note: This use often describes movement or success in difficult conditions: against the wind, against the odds.

examples.sentence: The boat moved slowly against the wind.
Against all odds, they won the match.

ar.definition: في مواجهة قوة أو ظرف غير ملائم

es.definition: frente a una fuerza, contexto o condición desfavorable

ja.definition: 不利な力・状況・条件に直面して

pt-BR.definition: diante de uma força, contexto ou condição desfavorável

zh-Hans.definition: 顶着，迎着，面对不利的力量、背景或条件

confusable_words.note: beginning means the first part, not the last part
ending often means the final part of a story or film

senses.definition: the final part of something, or the point where something stops
senses.usage_note: Common with of-phrases and in expressions like at the end and in the end.

examples.sentence: We stayed until the end of the movie.
School is near the end of the street.

ar.definition: الجزء الأخير من شيء ما أو النقطة التي يتوقف عندها

es.definition: la parte final de algo, o el punto donde algo termina

ja.definition: 何かの最後の部分、または何かが終わる地点

pt-BR.definition: a parte final de algo, ou o ponto em que algo termina

zh-Hans.definition: 某事物的最后部分，或某事停止的点

senses.definition: to stop happening, or to make something stop
senses.usage_note: Very common as both an intransitive and transitive verb.

examples.sentence: The lesson ends at three o'clock.
They ended the meeting early.

ar.definition: يتوقف عن الحدوث أو يجعل شيئًا يتوقف

es.definition: dejar de ocurrir, o hacer que algo termine

ja.definition: 終わる、または何かを終わらせる

pt-BR.definition: parar de acontecer, ou fazer algo terminar

zh-Hans.definition: 结束；使某事停止或结束

senses.definition: the farthest part or tip of something long, such as a road, table, or room
senses.usage_note: This sense focuses on physical position rather than time or completion.

examples.sentence: She sat at the end of the table.
There is a shop at the north end of town.

ar.definition: الطرف الأبعد أو النهاية لشيء طويل مثل الطريق أو الطاولة

es.definition: la parte más alejada o punta de algo largo, como una calle, mesa o habitación

ja.definition: テーブルや道など長いものの端・先端

pt-BR.definition: a parte mais distante ou a ponta de algo comprido, como uma rua, mesa ou sala

zh-Hans.definition: 长形物体最远的一端或尽头，如桌子、道路、房间等的端头

senses.definition: a goal, purpose, or result, especially in a formal expression
senses.usage_note: Often seen in formal phrases such as to that end or an end in itself.

examples.sentence: We are working to achieve that end.
The new rules were designed with a clear end in mind.

ar.definition: هدف أو غاية أو نتيجة، خاصة في الاستعمال الرسمي

es.definition: un objetivo, propósito o resultado, especialmente en expresiones formales

ja.definition: 目的、意図、結果。特にやや形式的な表現で使う

pt-BR.definition: um objetivo, propósito ou resultado, especialmente em uso formal

zh-Hans.definition: 目的、目标或结果，尤用于较正式表达

senses.definition: past tense and past participle of find
senses.usage_note: This is mainly the past form of find.

examples.sentence: I found my keys under the sofa.
She has found a new job.

ar.definition: صيغة الماضي واسم المفعول من find

es.definition: pasado y participio de find

ja.definition: findの過去形・過去分詞

pt-BR.definition: passado e particípio de find

zh-Hans.definition: find 的过去式和过去分词

senses.definition: to establish an organization, company, school, or city
senses.usage_note: A separate verb from find, common in formal contexts like business and history.

examples.sentence: She founded the company in 2010.
The university was founded more than a century ago.

ar.definition: يؤسّس شركة أو منظمة أو مدرسة أو مدينة

es.definition: fundar una organización, empresa, escuela o ciudad

ja.definition: 組織・会社・学校・都市などを設立する

pt-BR.definition: fundar uma organização, empresa, escola ou cidade

zh-Hans.definition: 创立，建立（组织、公司、学校或城市）

confusable_words.note: often used for external obligation; can overlap with must
stronger and more formal than should

senses.definition: used to say that something is necessary or that someone is obliged to do it
senses.usage_note: Must is a modal verb and is followed by the base form of a verb.

examples.sentence: You must wear a seat belt.
I must finish my homework tonight.

ar.definition: يُستخدم للدلالة على أن شيئًا ما ضروري أو أن على شخص ما القيام به

es.definition: se usa para decir que algo es necesario o que alguien está obligado a hacerlo

ja.definition: 何かが必要であること、または誰かがそれをしなければならないことを表す

pt-BR.definition: usado para dizer que algo é necessário ou que alguém é obrigado a fazer algo

zh-Hans.definition: 用于表示某事是必要的，或某人有义务去做

senses.definition: used to say that you are very sure something is true based on what you know
senses.usage_note: This use often expresses deduction, not obligation.

examples.sentence: She must be tired after the long trip.
They left early, so they must be home by now.

ar.definition: يُستخدم للدلالة على أنك متأكد جدًا من صحة شيء ما بناءً على ما تعرفه

es.definition: se usa para decir que estás muy seguro de que algo es verdad según lo que sabes

ja.definition: 知っていることに基づいて、何かが本当だと強く確信していることを表す

pt-BR.definition: usado para dizer que você tem quase certeza de que algo é verdade com base no que sabe

zh-Hans.definition: 用于表示根据已知情况，你非常确定某事是真的

senses.definition: used in the negative to say that something is not allowed
senses.usage_note: Must not expresses prohibition; it is different from don't have to.

examples.sentence: You must not smoke here.
Students must not use phones during the exam.

ar.definition: يُستخدم في النفي للدلالة على أن شيئًا ما غير مسموح به

es.definition: se usa en negativo para decir que algo no está permitido

ja.definition: 否定形で、何かが許されていないことを表す

pt-BR.definition: usado na negativa para dizer que algo não é permitido

zh-Hans.definition: 用于否定形式，表示某事是不被允许的

senses.definition: something that is considered essential, highly desirable, or too good to miss
senses.usage_note: As a noun, must is common in phrases like a must-see and a must-have.

examples.sentence: This guidebook is a must for new teachers.
The museum is a must-see when you visit the city.

ar.definition: شيء يُعد أساسيًا أو مرغوبًا جدًا أو لا ينبغي تفويته

es.definition: algo que se considera esencial, muy deseable o imposible de perderse

ja.definition: 必須だと考えられるもの、非常に望ましいもの、または見逃せないもの

pt-BR.definition: algo considerado essencial, muito desejável ou imperdível

zh-Hans.definition: 被认为是必不可少、非常值得拥有或不容错过的事物

confusable_words.note: usually means to look at something yourself, not to let another person see it
often means to present formally or display for viewing

senses.definition: to let someone see something, or to point something out to them
senses.usage_note: Common in everyday speech for objects, documents, directions, and evidence.

examples.sentence: She showed me her new phone.
Please show your ticket at the door.

ar.definition: يُري شخصًا شيئًا أو يلفت انتباهه إليه

es.definition: enseñar o mostrar algo a alguien, o señalarlo para que lo vea

ja.definition: 人に何かを見せる、またはそれと分かるように示す

pt-BR.definition: mostrar algo a alguém ou indicar algo para que a pessoa veja

zh-Hans.definition: 给某人看某物；指给某人看

senses.definition: to make a feeling, quality, or fact clear or noticeable
senses.usage_note: Often used with emotions, evidence, data, and visible signs.

examples.sentence: His face showed surprise.
The results show that the plan worked.

ar.definition: يُظهر شعورًا أو صفة أو حقيقة ويجعلها واضحة

es.definition: hacer evidente o perceptible un sentimiento, una cualidad o un hecho

ja.definition: 感情・性質・事実を明らかにする、見て分かるようにする

pt-BR.definition: tornar claro ou perceptível um sentimento, uma qualidade ou um fato

zh-Hans.definition: 显示，表明，使感情、特征或事实变得明显

senses.definition: to explain or demonstrate how to do something
grammar_patterns: show someone how to do something
senses.usage_note: Very common with how to, what to do, and practical instructions.

examples.sentence: Can you show me how to use this app?
The coach showed the players what to do.

ar.definition: يشرح أو يبيّن كيفية القيام بشيء

es.definition: explicar o demostrar cómo hacer algo

ja.definition: やり方を説明したり実演して示したりする

pt-BR.definition: explicar ou demonstrar como fazer algo

zh-Hans.definition: 演示；说明如何做某事

senses.definition: a programme or performance made for people to watch
senses.usage_note: Common noun for TV, radio, and live entertainment contexts.

examples.sentence: We watched a comedy show on TV.
The school put on a dance show.

ar.definition: عرض أو برنامج يشاهده الناس

es.definition: programa o actuación para que la gente la vea

ja.definition: 人が見るための番組や公演

pt-BR.definition: programa ou apresentação feita para as pessoas assistirem

zh-Hans.definition: 供人观看的节目；演出

senses.definition: an event where things are displayed for the public or for judging
senses.usage_note: Useful for public exhibitions, competitions, and commercial displays.

examples.sentence: They entered their dog in the local show.
We visited a car show on Saturday.

ar.definition: فعالية تُعرَض فيها أشياء للجمهور أو للتحكيم

es.definition: evento donde se exhiben cosas al público o para ser juzgadas

ja.definition: 一般公開や審査のために物が展示される催し

pt-BR.definition: evento em que coisas são exibidas ao público ou para avaliação

zh-Hans.definition: 展览会；展出活动；评比展示活动

confusable_words.note: often means great in amount or degree, not physical size
usually refers to short height for people, not general size

senses.definition: large in size
senses.usage_note: Use for physical size.

examples.sentence: They live in a big house.
The dog is very big now.

ar.definition: كبير في الحجم

es.definition: grande de tamaño

ja.definition: 大きい、サイズが大きい

pt-BR.definition: grande em tamanho

zh-Hans.definition: 大的；尺寸大的

senses.definition: great in amount, degree, or importance
senses.usage_note: Often used for abstract nouns, not only physical objects.

examples.sentence: This is a big problem for the team.
There is a big difference between the two plans.

ar.definition: كبير من حيث المقدار أو الدرجة أو الأهمية

es.definition: grande en cantidad, grado o importancia

ja.definition: 大きい、多い、重要な

pt-BR.definition: grande em quantidade, grau ou importância

zh-Hans.definition: 大的；重大的；程度高的

senses.definition: important, successful, or famous
senses.usage_note: Common in expressions about companies, stars, names, and events.

examples.sentence: She works for a big company.
He became a big star in the 1990s.

ar.definition: مهم أو ناجح أو مشهور

es.definition: importante, exitoso o famoso

ja.definition: 重要な、成功した、有名な

pt-BR.definition: importante, bem-sucedido ou famoso

zh-Hans.definition: 重要的；成功的；有名的

confusable_words.note: used for opinions or emotions in many contexts
used for physical sensation through touch

senses.definition: to experience an emotion or physical condition
senses.usage_note: Common with adjectives such as happy, sad, tired, and sick.

examples.sentence: I feel tired after work.
She felt happy when she saw her friends.

ar.definition: يشعر بعاطفة أو حالة جسدية

es.definition: experimentar una emoción o un estado físico

ja.definition: 感情や身体の状態を経験する

pt-BR.definition: sentir uma emoção ou um estado físico

zh-Hans.definition: 感到，觉得（情绪或身体状态）

senses.definition: to notice something through your body, especially through touch
senses.usage_note: Often used for heat, pain, movement, pressure, and texture.

examples.sentence: Can you feel the heat from the fire?
She felt something soft in her pocket.

ar.definition: يحسّ بشيء عبر الجسد، خاصة عن طريق اللمس

es.definition: notar algo con el cuerpo, especialmente por el tacto

ja.definition: 特に触覚で何かを感じ取る

pt-BR.definition: perceber algo com o corpo, especialmente pelo toque

zh-Hans.definition: 感觉到，摸到（尤指通过身体或触觉）

senses.definition: to have a particular opinion or impression
senses.usage_note: In this sense, feel is often less direct and more personal than think.

examples.sentence: I feel that this plan is a good idea.
They felt it was unfair.

ar.definition: يرى أو يعتقد انطباعًا أو رأيًا معينًا

es.definition: tener una opinión o impresión determinada

ja.definition: ある意見や印象を持つ

pt-BR.definition: ter uma opinião ou impressão específica

zh-Hans.definition: 觉得，认为（有某种看法或印象）

senses.definition: to want to do something or to be in the mood for something
senses.usage_note: A very common spoken pattern for expressing mood or desire.

examples.sentence: I feel like going for a walk.
Do you feel like some coffee?

ar.definition: يرغب في فعل شيء أو يكون في مزاج لشيء ما

es.definition: tener ganas de hacer algo o apetecerle algo

ja.definition: 何かをしたい気分である、何かが欲しい気分である

pt-BR.definition: estar com vontade de fazer algo ou de consumir algo

zh-Hans.definition: 想要，想做；有心情做

senses.definition: the quality or character of something as it seems when touched or experienced
senses.usage_note: As a noun, feel is common in everyday descriptions of texture, design, and atmosphere.

examples.sentence: I like the feel of this fabric.
The cafe has a relaxed feel.

ar.definition: الملمس أو الطابع الذي يبدو به الشيء عند لمسه أو تجربته

es.definition: la cualidad o carácter de algo al tocarlo o experimentarlo

ja.definition: 触ったときや体験したときに感じられる質感や雰囲気

pt-BR.definition: a qualidade ou caráter de algo ao ser tocado ou vivenciado

zh-Hans.definition: 手感；感觉；整体氛围或特质

collocations: give the room a modern feel

confusable_words.note: more formal and often used for confidence based on evidence
means definitely true, not confident

senses.definition: feeling confident that something is true or correct
senses.usage_note: Often used after the verb be to show confidence or certainty.

examples.sentence: I am sure that this is the right answer.
Are you sure about the time of the meeting?

ar.definition: واثق من أن شيئًا ما صحيح أو مؤكد

es.definition: seguro de que algo es verdadero o correcto

ja.definition: 何かが正しい、または本当だと確信している

pt-BR.definition: certo ou confiante de que algo é verdadeiro ou correto

zh-Hans.definition: 确信某事是真实的或正确的

senses.definition: certain to happen or certain to be achieved; reliable or guaranteed
senses.usage_note: Common in phrases describing dependable results or guaranteed outcomes.

examples.sentence: There is no sure way to win every game.
Her support gave us a sure chance of success.

ar.definition: مؤكد الحدوث أو مضمون أو موثوق

es.definition: seguro, garantizado o fiable

ja.definition: 必ず起こる、達成される、または確実な

pt-BR.definition: certo de acontecer ou garantido; confiável

zh-Hans.definition: 必然会发生的；可靠的；有保证的

senses.definition: used in conversation to say yes, to agree, or to show willingness
senses.usage_note: Very common spoken response meaning yes or of course.

examples.sentence: "Can you help me?" "Sure."
Sure, we can meet after lunch.

ar.definition: تُستعمل في الحديث للموافقة أو لإبداء الاستعداد

es.definition: se usa en la conversación para decir sí, aceptar o mostrar disposición

ja.definition: 会話で、承諾・同意・応諾を表して使う

pt-BR.definition: usado na conversa para dizer sim, concordar ou mostrar disposição

zh-Hans.definition: 在对话中用于表示同意、答应或愿意

senses.definition: used to emphasize that someone should check something or not forget to do something
senses.usage_note: Especially common in the phrases make sure and be sure to.

examples.sentence: Please make sure the door is locked.
Be sure to call me when you arrive.

ar.definition: تُستعمل للتأكيد على ضرورة التحقق من شيء أو عدم نسيان فعله

es.definition: se usa para enfatizar que alguien debe comprobar algo o no olvidar hacerlo

ja.definition: 何かを確認したり、忘れずにしたりするよう強調して使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para enfatizar que alguém deve verificar algo ou não esquecer de fazer algo

zh-Hans.definition: 用于强调某人应确认某事或不要忘记做某事

senses.definition: a group of people who play a sport or game together against another group
senses.usage_note: Common for school, club, and professional sports groups.

examples.sentence: She is on the school basketball team.
Our team won the match yesterday.

ar.definition: فريق من الأشخاص يلعبون رياضة أو لعبة معًا ضد فريق آخر

es.definition: grupo de personas que practican un deporte o juego juntas contra otro grupo

ja.definition: 他のグループと戦うために一緒にスポーツやゲームをする人たちの集まり

pt-BR.definition: grupo de pessoas que pratica um esporte ou jogo junto contra outro grupo

zh-Hans.definition: 一起进行体育运动或比赛、与另一组对抗的一群人

senses.definition: a group of people who work together to do a task or achieve a goal
senses.usage_note: Often used for workplace, school, and professional groups.

examples.sentence: Our team is working on a new project.
The hospital has a team of skilled doctors and nurses.

ar.definition: مجموعة من الأشخاص يعملون معًا لإنجاز مهمة أو تحقيق هدف

es.definition: grupo de personas que trabajan juntas para realizar una tarea o lograr un objetivo

ja.definition: 仕事や目標達成のために一緒に活動する人たちの集まり

pt-BR.definition: grupo de pessoas que trabalha junto para realizar uma tarefa ou alcançar um objetivo

zh-Hans.definition: 为完成任务或实现目标而一起工作的一群人

senses.definition: to join with another person or group in order to work together
senses.usage_note: More common in the phrasal pattern 'team up with' than as a simple verb alone.

examples.sentence: Two local companies teamed up to create the app.
She teamed with a friend for the science competition.

ar.definition: يتحد مع شخص أو مجموعة أخرى للعمل معًا

es.definition: unirse a otra persona o grupo para trabajar juntos

ja.definition: 一緒に活動するために他の人やグループと組む

pt-BR.definition: juntar-se a outra pessoa ou grupo para trabalhar em conjunto

zh-Hans.definition: 与另一个人或团体联合起来一起做事

senses.definition: at any time; used especially in questions, negatives, and with comparatives
grammar_patterns: ever + past participle in present perfect questions
senses.usage_note: A very common grammar word. In negatives, ever can add emphasis; in comparisons, it means 'at any previous time'.

examples.sentence: Have you ever been to Canada?
I don't ever want to see that again.
She looks happier than ever.

ar.definition: في أي وقت؛ تُستعمل خاصةً في الأسئلة والنفي ومع صيغ المقارنة

es.definition: alguna vez; en algún momento, especialmente en preguntas, negaciones y comparativos

ja.definition: これまでに一度でも；特に疑問文・否定文・比較表現で使う

pt-BR.definition: alguma vez; em algum momento, especialmente em perguntas, negativas e comparativos

zh-Hans.definition: 曾经；在任何时候，用于疑问句、否定句和比较结构中尤其常见

senses.definition: always or for all future time
senses.usage_note: This use is less common by itself; learners often meet it in the phrase 'for ever' or the spelling 'forever'.

examples.sentence: I will love you for ever.
After that day, their lives changed for ever.

ar.definition: إلى الأبد؛ دائمًا أو طوال المستقبل

es.definition: para siempre; siempre o durante todo el futuro

ja.definition: 永遠に；この先ずっと

pt-BR.definition: para sempre; sempre ou por todo o futuro

zh-Hans.definition: 永远；一直到未来的所有时间

senses.definition: very; used for emphasis, especially in informal British English
senses.usage_note: Mostly found in fixed expressions like 'ever so much' and 'ever so kind'.

examples.sentence: Thank you ever so much for your help.
It was ever so kind of her to call.

ar.definition: جدًا؛ تُستعمل للتوكيد، خاصة في الإنجليزية البريطانية غير الرسمية

es.definition: muy; se usa para dar énfasis, especialmente en inglés británico informal

ja.definition: とても；特にイギリス英語のくだけた表現で強調に使う

pt-BR.definition: muito; usado para dar ênfase, especialmente no inglês britânico informal

zh-Hans.definition: 非常，很；用于强调，尤其见于非正式英式英语

senses.definition: a group of people related to each other, especially parents and their children
senses.usage_note: In British English, 'family' may take a singular or plural verb depending on whether the group is seen as a unit or as individuals.

examples.sentence: Her family lives in London.
We visited our family during the holiday.

ar.definition: مجموعة من الأشخاص تربطهم صلة قرابة، وخاصة الوالدان وأطفالهما

es.definition: grupo de personas emparentadas, especialmente padres e hijos

ja.definition: 特に親と子どもからなる、血縁や結婚で結ばれた人々の集まり

pt-BR.definition: grupo de pessoas com parentesco entre si, especialmente pais e filhos

zh-Hans.definition: 家庭；家人；家属，尤指父母和孩子组成的一家人

senses.definition: a particular group of related people, especially across generations
senses.usage_note: Often used with a surname to talk about a well-known or extended family.

examples.sentence: The Kennedy family is well known in the United States.
This house has belonged to our family for generations.

ar.definition: عائلة معينة أو سلالة من الأقارب، خاصة عبر أجيال متعددة

es.definition: grupo particular de personas emparentadas, especialmente a lo largo de varias generaciones

ja.definition: 特定の一族、特に何世代にもわたる血縁集団

pt-BR.definition: grupo específico de parentes, especialmente ao longo de gerações

zh-Hans.definition: 家族；家族世系；家族中的一支，尤指延续几代的家族

senses.definition: a group of things or people that are similar or connected in some important way
senses.usage_note: Common in academic and technical contexts for classification.

examples.sentence: Spanish and Italian are in the same language family.
These products are part of the same family of brands.

ar.definition: مجموعة من الأشياء أو الأشخاص المتشابهين أو المرتبطين بطريقة مهمة

es.definition: grupo de cosas o personas similares o relacionadas de manera importante

ja.definition: 重要な点で似ている、または結びついている物や人の集まり

pt-BR.definition: grupo de coisas ou pessoas semelhantes ou ligadas de modo importante

zh-Hans.definition: 家族；同类；族；科，指在重要方面相似或相关的一组事物或人

confusable_words.note: usually means to continue having or holding something; not simply to put it somewhere
means to save for later use or safety

senses.definition: to continue to have something and not give it away, lose it, or throw it away
senses.usage_note: Common for possession that continues over time.

examples.sentence: You can keep the book after you finish it.
I keep old letters in a box.

ar.definition: يحتفظ بشيء ولا يتخلص منه أو يفقده

es.definition: conservar algo y no regalarlo, perderlo ni tirarlo

ja.definition: 物を手放したり捨てたりせず、そのまま持っている

pt-BR.definition: ficar com algo e não dar, perder ou jogar fora

zh-Hans.definition: 保留；留着；不丢弃或不失去某物

senses.definition: to continue doing something or to make something continue
senses.usage_note: Very common in patterns like keep doing, keep going, keep quiet.

examples.sentence: Please keep talking.
It kept raining all afternoon.

ar.definition: يستمر في فعل شيء أو يجعل شيئًا يستمر

es.definition: seguir haciendo algo o hacer que algo continúe

ja.definition: 何かをし続ける、または何かを続いた状態にする

pt-BR.definition: continuar fazendo algo ou fazer algo continuar

zh-Hans.definition: 继续做某事；使某事持续

senses.definition: to not tell other people something; to keep something secret
senses.usage_note: Often used with secret, quiet, or from someone.

examples.sentence: Can you keep a secret?
She kept the news from her parents.

ar.definition: لا يخبر الآخرين بشيء؛ يكتمه

es.definition: no contar algo a otras personas; mantenerlo en secreto

ja.definition: 他の人に何かを言わないで秘密にしておく

pt-BR.definition: não contar algo para outras pessoas; manter em segredo

zh-Hans.definition: 保守（秘密）；不告诉别人

senses.definition: to do what you promised or what is required by a rule, arrangement, or agreement
senses.usage_note: Used for obligations such as promises, rules, or appointments.

examples.sentence: He always keeps his promises.
Employees must keep the safety rules.

ar.definition: يفي بما وعد به أو بما تتطلبه قاعدة أو اتفاق

es.definition: cumplir lo prometido o lo exigido por una regla, cita o acuerdo

ja.definition: 約束や規則、取り決めを守る

pt-BR.definition: cumprir o que foi prometido ou exigido por uma regra, compromisso ou acordo

zh-Hans.definition: 遵守，履行（承诺、规则、约定）

senses.definition: to own and take care of animals
senses.usage_note: A common but narrower use, especially with animals and farming.

examples.sentence: They keep chickens in the yard.
Her family has kept bees for years.

ar.definition: يربي الحيوانات ويعتني بها

es.definition: tener y cuidar animales

ja.definition: 動物を飼う、世話をする

pt-BR.definition: criar e cuidar de animais

zh-Hans.definition: 饲养；养（动物）

confusable_words.note: Often expresses a stronger possibility than 'might'.
Shows future possibility but is less formal and less grammaticalized as a modal auxiliary.

senses.definition: used to say that something is possible, but not certain
senses.usage_note: Common modal verb for possibility; often slightly less direct or less certain than 'may' in some contexts.

examples.sentence: It might rain later.
She might come to the party.

ar.definition: تُستخدم للدلالة على أن شيئًا ما ممكن لكنه غير مؤكد

es.definition: se usa para decir que algo es posible pero no seguro

ja.definition: 何かが起こる可能性はあるが確実ではないことを表す

pt-BR.definition: usado para dizer que algo é possível, mas não certo

zh-Hans.definition: 表示某事有可能发生，但不确定

senses.definition: used to make a suggestion or give advice in a polite, indirect way
senses.usage_note: Often used to soften advice so it sounds less direct.

examples.sentence: You might want to check your email.
We might try a different approach.

ar.definition: تُستخدم لتقديم اقتراح أو نصيحة بطريقة مهذبة وغير مباشرة

es.definition: se usa para hacer una sugerencia o dar un consejo de manera educada e indirecta

ja.definition: 丁寧で遠回しに提案したり助言したりするときに使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para fazer uma sugestão ou dar um conselho de modo educado e indireto

zh-Hans.definition: 用于较委婉、间接地提出建议或劝告

senses.definition: used in very formal language to ask for or refer to permission respectfully
senses.usage_note: This use is formal and less common than 'may' or 'can'.

examples.sentence: Might I ask a question?
If I might add something, the plan needs more time.

ar.definition: تُستخدم في اللغة الرسمية جدًا لطلب الإذن أو الإشارة إليه باحترام

es.definition: se usa en un lenguaje muy formal para pedir permiso o aludir a él con respeto

ja.definition: 非常に丁寧でフォーマルな場面で、許可を求めたり丁重に発言したりするときに使う

pt-BR.definition: usado em linguagem muito formal para pedir permissão ou referir-se a ela com respeito

zh-Hans.definition: 用于非常正式的场合，礼貌地请求许可或插话

senses.definition: used in questions to show surprise, doubt, or emphasis
senses.usage_note: This is an extended question use of the modal, especially in more careful or written English.

examples.sentence: How might they solve such a big problem?
Why might he say that?

ar.definition: تُستخدم في الأسئلة لإظهار الدهشة أو الشك أو التوكيد

es.definition: se usa en preguntas para mostrar sorpresa, duda o énfasis

ja.definition: 疑問文で、驚き・疑い・強調を表すために使う

pt-BR.definition: usado em perguntas para mostrar surpresa, dúvida ou ênfase

zh-Hans.definition: 用于疑问句中，表示惊讶、怀疑或强调

senses.definition: great power or strength
senses.usage_note: As a noun, 'might' is a separate common learner-relevant meaning, especially in reading.

examples.sentence: The empire expanded through military might.
They admired the economic might of the country.

ar.definition: قوة أو بأس عظيم

es.definition: gran poder o fuerza

ja.definition: 大きな力、強大な勢力

pt-BR.definition: grande poder ou força

zh-Hans.definition: 强大的力量；威力

senses.definition: used to make a request or to speak politely when asking for something
senses.usage_note: A very common polite word in requests. It can come at the start or end of the sentence.

examples.sentence: Please open the window.
Can I have some water, please?

ar.definition: من فضلك؛ تُستعمل لجعل الطلب مهذبًا

es.definition: por favor; se usa para hacer una petición de manera educada

ja.definition: お願いします；丁寧に頼んだり求めたりするときに使う

pt-BR.definition: por favor; usado para fazer um pedido com educação

zh-Hans.definition: 请；用于礼貌地提出请求或索要某物

senses.definition: used to accept an offer politely or to show a polite positive response
senses.usage_note: Often heard in fixed replies such as Yes, please.

examples.sentence: Would you like some tea? Yes, please.
If you have time, please do come in.

ar.definition: نعم، من فضلك؛ تُستعمل للقبول المهذب أو لإظهار استجابة إيجابية مهذبة

pt-BR.definition: sim, por favor; usado para aceitar uma oferta educadamente ou dar uma resposta positiva cortês

ar.definition: يُسعِد أو يُرضي شخصًا

ja.definition: 人を喜ばせる、満足させる

pt-BR.definition: agradar ou satisfazer alguém

zh-Hans.definition: 使某人高兴或满意

confusable_words.note: often means carrying something to a person or place, rather than positioning it

senses.definition: to move something or someone to a particular place or position
senses.usage_note: A very common general verb. The past form is also put.

ar.definition: يضع شيئًا أو شخصًا في مكان أو وضع معيّن

ar.definition: يجعل شيئًا في حالة أو وضع معيّن

ja.definition: 物事をある状態・状況にする

pt-BR.definition: fazer com que algo fique em certo estado, condição ou situação

ar.definition: يعبّر عن شيء أو يطرحه بالكلمات أو بطريقة معيّنة

ar.definition: يبذل أو يخصص وقتًا أو جهدًا أو مالًا أو موارد أخرى لهدف ما

senses.definition: the coins, notes, or digital funds used to buy things and pay for services

ar.definition: النقود أو الأموال التي تُستخدم لشراء الأشياء ودفع ثمن الخدمات

ar.definition: الثروة المالية أو الدخل؛ امتلاك الكثير من المال

confusable_words.note: means having no work or use at a particular time
means not busy or not occupied

senses.definition: not busy or not being used, so able to do something or be used by someone

A lot of people came to the party.

ar.definition: كمية كبيرة أو عدد كبير

es.definition: una gran cantidad o un gran número

ja.definition: たくさん、多量、多数

pt-BR.definition: grande quantidade ou grande número

zh-Hans.definition: 大量；许多；很

senses.definition: a piece of land, especially one used or intended for building on or for a particular purpose
senses.usage_note: Common in American English for property and land use.

examples.sentence: They bought the lot next to their house.
The company plans to build offices on this lot.

ar.definition: قطعة أرض، خاصة للبناء أو لغرض معين

pt-BR.definition: lote; terreno, especialmente para construção ou uso específico

zh-Hans.definition: 地块；场地；一块土地

senses.definition: a method of deciding something by chance, especially by drawing marked objects or numbers
senses.usage_note: Less common in modern everyday speech, but useful in fixed expressions.

examples.sentence: They drew lots to decide who would go first.
The winner was chosen by lot.

ar.definition: طريقة لاتخاذ القرار بالقرعة أو بالحظ

ja.definition: くじ、くじ引きによる決定

examples.sentence: She was determined to improve her lot in life.

ar.definition: حال الإنسان أو نصيبه في الحياة، خاصة ما يصعب تغييره

es.definition: situación o suerte de una persona en la vida, especialmente difícil de cambiar

ja.definition: 人生で与えられた境遇、身の上

pt-BR.definition: condição ou sorte na vida, especialmente difícil de mudar

zh-Hans.definition: 人生境遇；命运；处境

confusable_words.note: a title like Mr, Dr, or Professor, not the personal or family word itself
a short informal form of a name

senses.definition: the word or words that a person, place, or thing is called
senses.usage_note: This is the most common meaning for personal names and names of things.

examples.sentence: My name is Anna.
What is the name of this street?

ar.definition: الاسم؛ الكلمة أو الكلمات التي يُعرَف بها شخص أو مكان أو شيء

es.definition: nombre; palabra o palabras con que se llama a una persona, lugar o cosa

ja.definition: 名前；人・場所・物が呼ばれる語

pt-BR.definition: nome; palavra ou palavras pelas quais uma pessoa, lugar ou coisa é chamada

zh-Hans.definition: 名字；名称；人、地方或事物被称呼的词语

senses.definition: a reputation or the general opinion people have about someone or something
senses.usage_note: Often used in set phrases about reputation, especially good name and family name.

examples.sentence: The restaurant has a good name in the city.
He wanted to protect the family name.

ar.definition: سمعة؛ الرأي العام عن شخص أو شيء

es.definition: reputación; opinión general que la gente tiene de alguien o algo

ja.definition: 評判；人や物についての世間の見方

pt-BR.definition: reputação; opinião geral que as pessoas têm sobre alguém ou algo

zh-Hans.definition: 名声；名誉；人们对某人或某事的总体评价

senses.definition: to give a person, place, or thing a particular name
senses.usage_note: Common in patterns like name someone X and be named after someone.

examples.sentence: They named their daughter Sofia.
The school was named after a famous writer.

ar.definition: يُسَمّي؛ يُطلِق اسمًا على شخص أو مكان أو شيء

es.definition: nombrar; poner un nombre a una persona, lugar o cosa

ja.definition: 名付ける；人・場所・物に名前を付ける

pt-BR.definition: dar nome a; chamar oficialmente uma pessoa, lugar ou coisa

zh-Hans.definition: 命名；给人、地方或事物取名

senses.definition: to say or identify who or what someone or something is
senses.usage_note: This sense covers mentioning a name and identifying someone or something by name.

examples.sentence: Can you name all the planets?
She refused to name the person who told her.

ar.definition: يذكر أو يحدد بالاسم؛ يقول من هو الشخص أو ما هو الشيء

es.definition: nombrar; decir o identificar quién o qué es alguien o algo

ja.definition: 名を挙げる；誰・何であるかを言う、特定する

pt-BR.definition: nomear; dizer ou identificar quem ou o que é alguém ou algo

zh-Hans.definition: 说出…的名字；指出；确认是谁或是什么

senses.usage_note: More formal than the basic naming sense; often used for roles, titles, and appointments.

examples.sentence: The company named her director of marketing.

ar.definition: يعيّن أو يعلن رسميًا شخصًا لمنصب أو دور

es.definition: designar o nombrar oficialmente a alguien para un cargo, función o propósito

ja.definition: 任命する；役職や役割に公式に選ぶ、発表する

pt-BR.definition: nomear ou designar oficialmente alguém para um cargo, função ou finalidade

zh-Hans.definition: 任命；指定；正式宣布某人担任职位或承担某种角色

confusable_words.note: The period with sunlight, opposite in meaning.
A 24-hour period, not just the dark part.

senses.definition: the time between evening and morning when it is dark
senses.usage_note: This is the most common meaning of the word.

examples.sentence: I can see stars at night.
It was cold last night.

ar.definition: الوقت بين المساء والصباح عندما يكون الجو مظلمًا

es.definition: el tiempo entre la tarde y la mañana cuando está oscuro

ja.definition: 夕方から朝までの暗い時間

pt-BR.definition: o período entre a tarde e a manhã, quando está escuro

zh-Hans.definition: 夜晚；从傍晚到清晨的黑暗时段

senses.definition: one evening and the following dark period, often counted as a unit of time
senses.usage_note: Often used when counting stays, events, or periods lasting overnight.

examples.sentence: We stayed there for two nights.
It happened on the first night of the trip.

ar.definition: ليلة واحدة تُعدّ كوحدة زمنية تشمل المساء وفترة الظلام التالية

es.definition: una noche contada como unidad de tiempo, incluyendo la tarde y el período oscuro siguiente

ja.definition: 時間の単位として数える一晩

pt-BR.definition: uma noite contada como unidade de tempo, incluindo a parte da noite e a madrugada seguinte

zh-Hans.definition: 一夜；作为时间单位的一晚

senses.usage_note: As an exclamation, it commonly appears in the fixed phrase 'good night'.

examples.sentence: Good night, everyone.
She kissed the child and said, "Good night."

ar.definition: تعبير يُقال عند المغادرة ليلًا أو قبل النوم

es.definition: expresión que se usa al despedirse por la noche o cuando alguien va a dormir

ja.definition: 夜に別れるときや寝る前に言うあいさつ

pt-BR.definition: expressão usada ao se despedir à noite ou quando alguém vai dormir

zh-Hans.definition: 晚安；在夜里告别或睡前说的话

senses.definition: to take part in a game or sport for enjoyment or competition
senses.usage_note: Use for sports, games, and children's activities.

examples.sentence: The children play in the park after school.
She plays tennis every weekend.

ar.definition: يشارك في لعبة أو رياضة من أجل المتعة أو المنافسة

es.definition: participar en un juego o deporte por diversión o competencia

ja.definition: 楽しみや競争のためにゲームやスポーツをする

pt-BR.definition: participar de um jogo ou esporte por diversão ou competição

zh-Hans.definition: 参加游戏或运动，作为娱乐或比赛

senses.definition: to perform music on an instrument, or to make music come out of a device
senses.usage_note: Use for instruments and recorded music.

examples.sentence: He plays the guitar very well.
Can you play my favorite song?

ar.definition: يعزف على آلة موسيقية أو يشغّل موسيقى من جهاز

es.definition: tocar un instrumento o hacer sonar música desde un aparato

ja.definition: 楽器を演奏する、または機器から音楽を流す

pt-BR.definition: tocar um instrumento ou fazer música sair de um aparelho

zh-Hans.definition: 演奏乐器，或让设备播放音乐

senses.definition: to act the part of a person or character in a film, play, or show
senses.usage_note: Common with role, part, character, and names of characters.

examples.sentence: She played the queen in the school play.

ar.definition: يمثل دور شخص أو شخصية في فيلم أو مسرحية أو عرض

es.definition: interpretar el papel de una persona o personaje en una película, obra o espectáculo

ja.definition: 映画や演劇などで人や登場人物の役を演じる

pt-BR.definition: interpretar o papel de uma pessoa ou personagem em filme, peça ou espetáculo

zh-Hans.definition: 在电影、戏剧或表演中扮演某人或某个角色

senses.definition: to do enjoyable activities for fun, especially as a child
senses.usage_note: Broader than sports or games; often about free-time fun.

examples.sentence: The baby likes to play with blocks.
We played on the beach all afternoon.

ar.definition: يقوم بأنشطة ممتعة للتسلية، خاصة عند الأطفال

es.definition: hacer actividades divertidas por diversión, especialmente siendo niño

ja.definition: 特に子どもが楽しみのために遊ぶ

pt-BR.definition: fazer atividades divertidas por diversão, especialmente quando se é criança

zh-Hans.definition: 进行有趣的活动来娱乐，尤指儿童玩耍

senses.usage_note: Countable noun; the common term is stage play or theater play in some contexts.

examples.sentence: We watched a play at the city theater.

ar.definition: نص مسرحي يؤديه الممثلون على المسرح

ja.definition: 劇場で俳優によって上演される脚本作品

pt-BR.definition: texto dramático representado por atores no teatro

zh-Hans.definition: 由演员在剧院表演的戏剧作品

confusable_words.note: until refers to a time limit; by means no later than a deadline
till is a common, slightly less formal variant with the same meaning

senses.definition: up to the time when something happens or up to a particular time
senses.usage_note: Until can be followed by a noun phrase or a clause. In clauses about the future, English often uses the present tense after until: Wait until he arrives.

examples.sentence: We stayed there until midnight.
Wait here until I come back.
The shop is open until 9 p.m.

ar.definition: حتى وقت حدوث شيء ما أو حتى وقت معين

ja.definition: 何かが起こる時まで、または特定の時点まで

pt-BR.definition: até o momento em que algo acontece ou até um horário específico

zh-Hans.definition: 直到某事发生的时候；到某个时间为止

senses.usage_note: This use is especially common with not: not until five, not until she called. It often translates as ‘only when/only after’ in context.

examples.sentence: I did not realize the problem until yesterday.
It was not until last week that she replied.

ar.definition: يُستعمل في التراكيب المنفية أو للتوكيد لبيان أن شيئًا لم يحدث قبل وقت معين

ja.definition: 否定文や強調構文で、ある時より前には起こらなかったことを示す

pt-BR.definition: usado em estruturas negativas ou enfáticas para mostrar que algo não aconteceu antes de certo momento

zh-Hans.definition: 用于否定或强调结构，表示某事在某个时间之前没有发生

confusable_words.note: A company is a business organization; a factory is a building where goods are made.

senses.definition: a business organization that sells goods or services
senses.usage_note: This is the most common meaning in everyday and business English.

examples.sentence: She works for a software company.
The company plans to open a new office next year.

ar.definition: شركة، وهي مؤسسة تجارية تبيع سلعًا أو خدمات

ja.definition: 会社、商品やサービスを提供する事業組織

pt-BR.definition: empresa, organização comercial que vende produtos ou serviços

zh-Hans.definition: 公司，销售商品或提供服务的商业组织

senses.definition: the state of being with another person or other people

examples.sentence: I enjoy your company.

ar.definition: صُحبة أو مرافقة الآخرين

ja.definition: 人と一緒にいること、付き添い、同席

pt-BR.definition: companhia, estado de estar com outra pessoa ou outras pessoas

zh-Hans.definition: 陪伴，和他人待在一起的状态

senses.usage_note: This sense is less common than the business meaning but still useful.

examples.sentence: She joined a theater company after college.

ar.definition: فرقة أو وحدة منظَّمة من المؤدين أو الجنود أو غيرهم يعملون معًا

es.definition: grupo organizado de artistas, soldados u otras personas que trabajan juntas

ja.definition: 劇団、舞踊団、部隊などの組織された集団

pt-BR.definition: grupo organizado de artistas, soldados ou pessoas semelhantes que trabalham juntas

confusable_words.note: means a small number, often emphasizing not many enough

senses.definition: a small number of people or things; not many

examples.sentence: Few students were absent today.
She has few close friends in the city.

ar.definition: عدد قليل من الأشخاص أو الأشياء؛ ليس كثيرًا

ja.definition: 人や物の数が少ない、あまり多くない

pt-BR.definition: um número pequeno de pessoas ou coisas; não muitos

zh-Hans.definition: 少量的，没几个；不多

examples.sentence: Only a few knew the answer.

ar.definition: عدد قليل يُنظر إليه كمجموعة أو يُستعمل كضمير

ja.definition: 少数の人・物をひとまとまりとして表す、または代名詞として使う

pt-BR.definition: um pequeno número considerado como grupo ou usado como pronome

zh-Hans.definition: 少数人或物；作代词时表示“没几个”

confusable_words.note: allow means permit; let is usually followed by an object + base verb
leave means go away from; let means permit

senses.definition: to allow someone to do something or to allow something to happen
senses.usage_note: A very common verb. After let, use the base form of the next verb, not to + verb.

examples.sentence: My parents let me stay up late on Saturday.

ja.definition: 人が何かをするのを許す、または何かが起こるのを許す

pt-BR.definition: permitir que alguém faça algo ou permitir que algo aconteça

examples.sentence: Let's take a break.

ar.definition: يُستعمل لتقديم اقتراح أو دعوة للقيام بشيء معًا

ja.definition: いっしょに何かをしようと提案するときに使う

pt-BR.definition: usado para fazer uma sugestão ou proposta de fazer algo juntos

zh-Hans.definition: 用于提出建议，表示一起做某事

senses.usage_note: Common especially in British English for property being rented to others.

examples.sentence: They let the apartment to a young couple.

ar.definition: يؤجر بيتًا أو غرفة أو أرضًا أو عقارًا آخر مقابل المال

ja.definition: 家・部屋・土地などをお金をもらって貸す

pt-BR.definition: alugar para outra pessoa uma casa, quarto, terreno ou outra propriedade em troca de dinheiro

zh-Hans.definition: 把房屋、房间、土地等出租给别人

confusable_words.note: means true or correct, often about facts or statements
means existing in fact, not fake or imagined

senses.definition: actually existing or happening; not imagined, artificial, or false

examples.sentence: The story is based on a real event.

ar.definition: حقيقي؛ موجود بالفعل وليس خياليًا أو مزيفًا

ja.definition: 本物の、現実に存在する、作り物や想像ではない

pt-BR.definition: real; que existe de fato, não é imaginário, artificial nem falso
